As one of our top supporters, your voice carries real weight-- **the path we take next begins with you, Peter.**

With the far-left plotting to retake the Senate Majority, we're staring down the barrel of higher taxes, weaker borders, _and even more radical control over our everyday lives._

If we let them back in charge, it'll be the end of America.

**[Your voice will help guide our strategy in the weeks ahead--and ensure we don't lose ground in the fight for America's future. _**[Your House Republican Membership is about to EXPIRE.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0369b821131b46e7a966a23df0256eb6&_e=89vpKwU0P22YgSjGDjdtZu4-X-Yexb0mM1EE_Qnzht3XyXq21JGpYeOcSSceOFpTAsGWredBjl2mkAFUPzNF5fTBSpO6TXHtMS4q1-ioHNAyaJVrY-_BU5FwJCFgoIz7wlLIVNKpZcRbWJl9Q03Nf8d-tREersMQerjemXLGyPHERywAvnQUMO5mWuPBrDbwU6WPfzQjYpy1CPgMapCQpiy8qcVs17iaQdMfhU_e9kgF-IcFrGttACKNVw0SSzlYqTsGIfaZa4T4NtbQQFht4n8iEnHBhWKhXZg9pY182c5-8obY0CpTMDI4XVKh5TZKv17WahHCzlWjNr7Vkdtucfqee7ZLmcXTHYnzEUGhZmmKp52ld2tE0kAa9kOmbZZwBefXm_XcyUAg-ilXOS77hZ4nOdpMSq8MebeUhvmhRzw%3D "Your House Republican Membership is about to EXPIRE.")**_ I'm not going to sugarcoat it - if you don't renew _NOW_ , we'll lose a crucial patriot in our fight against the Radical Left's socialist agenda.

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0369b821131b46e7a966a23df0256eb6&_e=89vpKwU0P22YgSjGDjdtZu4-X-Yexb0mM1EE_Qnzht3XyXq21JGpYeOcSSceOFpTAsGWredBjl2mkAFUPzNF5fTBSpO6TXHtMS4q1-ioHNAyaJVrY-_BU5FwJCFgoIz7wlLIVNKpZcRbWJl9Q03Nf8d-tREersMQerjemXLGyPHERywAvnQUMO5mWuPBrDbwU6WPfzQjYpy1CPgMapCQpiy8qcVs17iaQdMfhU_e9kgF-IcFrGttACKNVw0SSzlYIa8ZTKHlGP-zZIxEyE0amKR2TCvjiPJRdzzGam8QlmxHrDjxUO4CNVEVLJFBidGRTfUp5Q_n9TZSsiy_Jdz7Tw6eJSmMAALSuZ27GHSKulhNQ4kauilWhaYCdmdl7gKzujcZajT6I9h-Ld3Exlu2jxpSMja6-5kAqVBxs2wNneA%3D "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

**I know I can count on you, Friend.** You've been a rock-solid supporter of our conservative movement for years, fighting alongside me and House Republicans against the Radical Left's attempts to undermine our values and destroy everything we've worked for.

__**[But I need you to renew your Membership today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0369b821131b46e7a966a23df0256eb6&_e=89vpKwU0P22YgSjGDjdtZu4-X-Yexb0mM1EE_Qnzht3XyXq21JGpYeOcSSceOFpTAsGWredBjl2mkAFUPzNF5fTBSpO6TXHtMS4q1-ioHNAyaJVrY-_BU5FwJCFgoIz7wlLIVNKpZcRbWJl9Q03Nf8d-tREersMQerjemXLGyPHERywAvnQUMO5mWuPBrDbwU6WPfzQjYpy1CPgMapCQpiy8qcVs17iaQdMfhU_e9kgF-IcFrGttACKNVw0SSzlYEhZKJnilNP8oLO_qhHbcmxm9pqnzH5RX_-bbJivYZGjYDwFsAsgvYgIHAgeRiZ8CWnxn4WEwSD2101Am13eLWoAaHAmCQ2vvcU9fV0-zota4_X5maj66B_4vSs6WKcGLPdtqBNzdksMgcgi9XfU6QVv8_0cICj1XaPP_S2eOc0c%3D "But I need you to renew your Membership today.")**__ We're on the cusp of the biggest battle of our lives, and I need to know if you're with me. **The Radical Left is gearing up to take down our conservative leaders and destroy everything we've worked for. We can't let that happen.**

Don't let the Radical Left gain the upper hand. _**[Renew NOW, Friend.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0369b821131b46e7a966a23df0256eb6&_e=89vpKwU0P22YgSjGDjdtZu4-X-Yexb0mM1EE_Qnzht3XyXq21JGpYeOcSSceOFpTAsGWredBjl2mkAFUPzNF5fTBSpO6TXHtMS4q1-ioHNAyaJVrY-_BU5FwJCFgoIz7wlLIVNKpZcRbWJl9Q03Nf8d-tREersMQerjemXLGyPHERywAvnQUMO5mWuPBrDbwU6WPfzQjYpy1CPgMapCQpiy8qcVs17iaQdMfhU_e9kgF-IcFrGttACKNVw0SSzlYGtUbDymoSgxVK8fl3jfBEPn8SgAXu4yVrrEFptCttkWmnZoQOrzGQI14c0j70ZCPSLMLfi2Tqk9Y3fj4zRECpuWlV860e8KhXLUJA1anpmRD_UnxaPs0lfMB5bUOiwpSF-Mv_dZHaqnhbQRJpILNS1fxOaFQeUsBaYRcujygA24%3D "Renew NOW, Friend.")**_

clean_body: It’s Stefanie reaching out from Team Gillibrand! Donald Trump and Elon Musk are waging a war on Social Security, so we asked you to sign our urgent petition to support Democrats’ bill to expand benefits by $2,400 per year. This would be lifechanging for millions of Americans. And it would help defend our Social Security from further attacks. | | Thanks for all you do, Stefanie Team Gillibrand — BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE — Right now, Elon Musk and DOGE are attempting to completely gut Social Security to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy. That’s why Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Kirsten Gillibrand and top Democrats are fighting to EXPAND Social Security by $2,400 per year. | | 72 million Americans rely on Social Security to make ends meet. This includes seniors, veterans and people with disabilities. Now, unelected billionaire Elon Musk and wannabe dictator Donald Trump are gambling with their lives and attempting to gut Social Security to provide massive tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans. Meanwhile, Democrats are fighting to expand it — by increasing annual benefits by $2,400 and ensuring it’s funded through 2096! | | Thanks for your input, Team Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Assault Weapons Ban of 2025
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We cannot give up on a dream where our streets, stores, schools, and homes are safe from acts of gun violence.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8543%2E5257348%2EE6d0zn)
Derek,
I just introduced the _Assault Weapons Ban of 2025_. And it has never been more important to revive this legislation.
The assault weapons ban was a vital tool in the struggle to reduce gun violence and mass shootings. It saved lives. It worked. And I’m honored to try and carry on a small part of the giant legacy of Dianne Feinstein and work to ban these weapons of war that have led to the most terrible mass casualty events in our communities.
I’ve long been a champion of gun safety legislation — inspired by the leadership of the late Senator Dianne Feinstein, who was thrust into the national spotlight by an act of gun violence perpetrated against San Francisco Mayor George Moscone and Supervisor Harvey Milk.
She pushed the _1994 Federal Assault Weapons Ban_ over the finish line in the Senate, which prohibited the manufacturing and sale of assault weapons and large-capacity magazines. And she never gave up her fight to end gun violence. Nearly three decades after that ban, she cast one of the deciding votes for the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ — the most significant gun safety legislation since 1994.
I knew that stepping up to run for the Senate brought a responsibility to try and carry on the amazing legacy of Dianne Feinstein. She showed what it means to lead with courage. The terrible reality is that far too many families have been devastated by acts of gun violence. And for _far_ too long, our country, especially members of the Republican Party, have refused to act because they’re afraid of the NRA.
I see why they’re afraid. Mere hours after introducing the _Assault Weapons Ban of 2025,_ the NRA attacked me repeatedly. They will do and spend anything to prevent real progress. At the expense of human lives — parents, children, community members, teachers, grocery store workers, and countless others.
**We need the courage to act, Derek.**
**[Please sign on in support of the _Assault Weapons Ban of 2025_ , and help me fight to finally pass some legislation to keep our communities safe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202505-assault-weapon-ban.zpQnw0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250505_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8543%2E5257348%2EE6d0zn)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202505-assault-weapon-ban.zpQnw0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250505_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8543%2E5257348%2EE6d0zn)
---
We cannot give up on a dream where our streets, stores, schools, and homes — and our kids — are safe from acts of gun violence. We must work tirelessly until that is our reality.
Thank you for taking action,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5245?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250505_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8543%2E5257348%2EE6d0zn)
| | [DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5243?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250505_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8543%2E5257348%2EE6d0zn)
---

name: James Carville
subject: As important as it gets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM)
Peter,
I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: **this one is as important as it gets.**
The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.
**[So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution between Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia and State Democrats Committee?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM)**
Here’s what’s got me terrified:
The _Cook Political Report_ has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.
If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen.
Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.
That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.
**[Will you contribute right now to State Democrats Committee and Abigail Spanberger to help Abigail Spanberger win this race and deliver a major victory for Democrats?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88377?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88376?refcode=em20250505-8919&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8919%2E614464%2E-aNumM)
---
Thank you,
James Carville

name: John Padora
subject: Families like mine are worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/Bxz88_g3yVwCZxAuQdJdkLp-huHQa_UCu2iGehJN2sWIhlzq33llmkwsN7YCF_rPaNnvv7OWfLu4XU6XFKa5cw3dUzu-mozwNdWuZ0EW34x_SpoyZrtFbj06Qy128gF4MH_53HpGev9yUSn7NbW7jz1PDPvBIFilhlBggNkWACbcMSP34_U-kj-oETRFyRdRFYjtyVS84vUr49PGCoJ3eREOCpAny411eiAmBSGpQv42eY2P4H2CA5Yw7wc-7lNEO5yocgh1qxGiRuw8KFlLBCdZl8xCg4GqFvrAr_99tP3SFkRFijfup9M4CPhn2ZR_TMGCAitu_1kKf8RxcJzjRqcTt0GJef7roTw-HAJSaJb-NZrX9X88B_yah1g294PxH53P2FId6Y4katuezBbobhTj71fMhsWKYFO52leKrdDxQJlKyObYyEDLBVdmi8GCo8wA0q4apZUZ_jqUjM0/USI0K7ySOhgse6weFgUI_vSlaw2FLEjh/8) Friend, My name is John Padora. I’m a husband, a father, and a manufacturing engineer — in that order. I’ve spent the last 20 years turning wrenches, programming CNC machines, and pouring sweat in un-airconditioned shops to solve problems and keep production moving. I’m not a politician. I’m a working man who’s fed up with the lies, the corruption, and how our “leaders” look down on families like mine. That’s why I’m running for Congress — to fight for a future that working families can believe in again. **[Will you join me by pitching in $5, $10, or more to help start my campaign off strong?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/88ryxJN_411Z0qus73h5RJ25MC8qIpTqbfYcgLkMzsCIOj1Yrp-onjVDyP5yHIe5eNQFtxDrNS-3hPVTmo9RgMZjJjB4EacFPSWVEtVIWMQ39_AIjs66kfnD-kBW4oNciE0W6RdjFvfn96l5mDap2zsFfOgaVn2aMExoE4ju1XiTVhNfg3OO5iZ5Nih-3eCLO2Mi7EHb_InlDsD0lOS2S9Ve2mpy-Qafnds9NFxQZZdpsyL06h2gzjIB4y_dVbEydcycij1lA8GGX7fncFZjAkwR6NNXiHFMIQSkDSRmJJS5B6R6lYm5gTXe8WPt9gnJme50Dm1ue3PNYKWD07uRQNYd1J-nu6WjLvYelcITbz2LwmyL45kZ1zf9tAl_UdUPMObXHJQMZgUUHv0ULtuxORjqFANjrQrMHq1ZiO-pF_plP4uWUVKrOZFqJaS8wQ6MuwAhrf5xu_t7Nzn-pySGESF8Yg8xtoE/kjIkJBuuM8LBBvmerBgIUMJb7NU694q5/8)** I grew up in Southeastern Pennsylvania — coal country, farm country — a place where everyone worked with their hands. My dad was a carpenter. My mom was a nurse. We didn’t have a lot, but we had everything that mattered: love, grit, and dignity. When I was six years old, my dad was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis. By the time I was ten, I was one of his sole caregivers. **We relied on Medicaid and food stamps just to survive.** I’ll never forget the look on my dad’s face in the checkout line — the shame he carried, as if asking for help meant he failed. But he didn’t fail. This system did. We were the working poor — and we held on because of our family, our church, and our community. **Today, politicians like Lauren Boebert — backed by the billionaire class and the far-right — are trying to strip away what little safety net we have left. They mock families like mine. They vote to cut SNAP, to destroy Medicaid, to make it even harder for struggling Americans to get by.** They say "pull yourself up by your bootstraps" — but how do you do that when you’re working two jobs and still can’t afford health insurance or child care? I’ve had enough. And I know I'm not alone. This campaign is about building an America that respects work again. That doesn’t punish people for getting sick. That doesn’t shame parents for needing help. That stands up for the folks who make this country run. **[But I need your help to do it. Will you help build the grassroots power this campaign needs to win and throw Lauren Boebert out of office by pitching in a donation of any size today?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/LuBvoyhGVT-icotGTkRdcnC7426HAq3XFW-6dCHJeb75TngErWeFPXMFmKUbiO7N8tMfvN62FBD7zW5Cs2J6UwytbUh5Wh6fETFTIl_YF798TcE8oTulSthDgMLdYEoL-dokcGCITk3UPdYt8yi5tLCnts5xzUiAq1-CDD-a5U_xkBzE_ypqHqusNFDGf4PfZW5MG5spqEo9Oq-BfXyiWH4cXzko2J1RXmj8ow73izL_NokZAOyMgrUqZEd5jeZoxMfTk0roit6W01mmGnTlDeR4TaI6rFxuxZzsjbFzkJTMeavs8BtMKj-R4VKDKhsUuytm7pO67r2UEOoHjB5-DAhRaN2A7QxHoQxcAMz_6uapKWDbqteIhwWikYvMZl6NJ2Q4PQ0w2Lv-n3YjOXg7-_UIV0Rv3j9ikloK73dmrB7u8OLqR5N7S98MaxZMyJjZbZz2viapoP6UtGX5f0PVN2ZmOal-Y_U/nyFuRS7lfgAii8Rnk_G1IF6gXzP9y4FY/8)** clean_body: | | | Friend, My name is John Padora. I’m a husband, a father, and a manufacturing engineer — in that order. I’ve spent the last 20 years turning wrenches, programming CNC machines, and pouring sweat in un-airconditioned shops to solve problems and keep production moving. I’m not a politician. I’m a working man who’s fed up with the lies, the corruption, and how our “leaders” look down on families like mine. That’s why I’m running for Congress — to fight for a future that working families can believe in again. I grew up in Southeastern Pennsylvania — coal country, farm country — a place where everyone worked with their hands. My dad was a carpenter. My mom was a nurse. We didn’t have a lot, but we had everything that mattered: love, grit, and dignity. When I was six years old, my dad was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis. By the time I was ten, I was one of his sole caregivers. We relied on Medicaid and food stamps just to survive. I’ll never forget the look on my dad’s face in the checkout line — the shame he carried, as if asking for help meant he failed. But he didn’t fail. This system did. We were the working poor — and we held on because of our family, our church, and our community. Today, politicians like Lauren Boebert — backed by the billionaire class and the far-right — are trying to strip away what little safety net we have left. They mock families like mine. They vote to cut SNAP, to destroy Medicaid, to make it even harder for struggling Americans to get by. They say "pull yourself up by your bootstraps" — but how do you do that when you’re working two jobs and still can’t afford health insurance or child care? I’ve had enough. And I know I'm not alone. This campaign is about building an America that respects work again. That doesn’t punish people for getting sick. That doesn’t shame parents for needing help. That stands up for the folks who make this country run. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | In solidarity, John Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: 🎟️ Tickets ON SALE: Eric Trump Headlines Mountain Majesty Gala
body:
Be part of a historic night for Colorado conservatives—June 21 in Golden.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | |
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**This is it. Tickets are officially LIVE.**
The moment is here.
This isn’t just another event. It’s a turning point for Colorado.
This summer, conservatives from across Colorado will gather for the first annual **Mountain Majesty Gala** —hosted by _Rocky Mountain Voice_ —for an evening that marks the beginning of a movement that is long overdue.
[Tickets are officially on sale.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) And YOU are the first to know.
On **Saturday, June 21** , the Mountain Majesty Gala will bring together influential conservatives, grassroots leaders, media voices, and political power players for one bold mission: _to take back Colorado_.
This isn’t politics as usual—it’s the launchpad for the most strategic and energized conservative movement this state has seen in decades.
|
---
**🎤 Special Guest: ERIC TRUMP**
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
We are honored to welcome **Eric Trump as our keynote speaker** —a national conservative voice who understands the stakes and believes in the power of grassroots-led transformation.

|
---
**🎟 Location & Ticket Options**
The Mountain Majesty Gala will take place on **Saturday, June 21, 2025** , at the **Denver Marriott West** in Golden, Colorado. Guests are encouraged to wear formal attire for this unforgettable evening of connection, inspiration, and momentum-building for Colorado conservatives.
* **General Gala Dinner Tickets:**
_Registration begins at 6:00pm, Doors open at 6:30pm, Dinner at 7:00pm_
$200 Individual | $400 Couple
* **VIP Reception + Dinner Ticket:**
_Registration begins at 5:00pm, VIP Reception at 5:30pm, Dinner at 7:00pm_
$750 Individual | $1,500 Couple
* **Photo + VIP Reception + Dinner Ticket:**
_*Space is limited on clicks*_
$2,500 Individual
* **Full Table:**
$2,000 | Premium seating for 10
* Sponsorships available starting at $2,500 (includes dinner tickets)

_If you are interested in sponsorships, please**reply to this email** or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) for more information! *Limited photo opportunities with Eric Trump available for VIPs and Sponsors._
[GET YOUR TICKETS HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|

**➤➤ NEW: Trump shuts down vital election security program** Friend, The Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing and Analysis Center (EI-ISAC) united over 1,300 election and law enforcement officials nationwide to monitor and block threats to our elections. **Now, because of Trump, EI-ISAC is gone.** This isn’t just an administrative change – it’s a direct assault on the integrity of our electoral process. By dismantling EI-ISAC, Trump has weakened our nation’s ability to detect and prevent cyber threats targeting our elections. **You don’t have to take it from us – hear it straight from our Secretaries of State:** | **“We’ve lost information sharing among election officials nationwide.”**
_– Shenna Bellows, Maine Secretary of State_

**“The very existence of these agencies is, in itself, a deterrent. If they’re gone, we’re going to have a lot more problems.” **
_– Adrian Fontes, Arizona Secretary of State_
---
At DASS, we’re committed to defending our democracy against these reckless actions. But we can’t do it alone. Your support is crucial to help us counter these threats and ensure free and fair elections.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: RE: Hannity Town Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

Ted Cruz here.

Sean Hannity hosted a town hall with myself and six other Republican Senators. We outlined a concrete plan of action to deliver REAL RESULTS for the American people.

But one thing is still missing... _input from voters like _YOU_._

We had our chance to speak at the Hannity Town Hall. Now it's time to hand over the mic to the American people and ensure _your_ voice, _your_ concerns, and _your_ priorities are heard loud and clear.

clean_body: The Fake News just trashed your favorite President – ME! | | CNN just released an INSANE poll claiming I have the lowest approval rating EVER for a President in his first 100 days. Can you believe that? After EVERYTHING we've accomplished -- securing the border, rebuilding the economy, restoring strength -- the FAKE NEWS wants you to think the People don't support your ME. They are the ENEMY OF THE PEOPLE, and they'll do anything to bring me down. But I've got news for them: the American People see RIGHT THROUGH IT. That's why I've set an emergency goal of collecting 1 MILLION responses to my MAGA Poll by MIDNIGHT to PROVE the Fake Polls wrong. Hey Peter,
We hope you're sitting down for this one, because this is huge.

](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/DMktTpwvzu93IJx48ou_KElL0K2VJ8LYnRVUvN_YkNYtapJDJgjMP-gpyOfGo2FFT0toWIZWTxhT12G0esvIrUOSHPyrA2fely73Kz3WxXzfwNRfeSr7Bafi7Asi2G_wBURnkZyZj_pcaJxBXTVz_5mAWdZavEQT9R0DKDtHhiHolaOK5CusufNmXSI7i-u7JChusydWnMGONBlyfGlq-RD2w_sOTO5XiGBjDVkZvFPsnFXlxmUfXhDRlVKwui3vB8wjOHmbNtGpEf5R-8zzn79yza7xTeaKzeX_KQgOXScahsSTYmRqZygN0c-mRG5_BEks2In7Tg_Zb0lgY5ZtAjK3cITh2kVjYuob80cxuMiKptPvlidAE7BAJFfR4y0RG2w7I5ATqEkTazt5NmNF81InQaT3mYSovPv9YDFk6cj9y7Z5WVkjFlbM0yPujmSllw03-yStbiQjneEisqRWWirf8uCKNHuQ8UvvQoHctPs_hW9MxA/3XBH0zMz88ofxtVjvdSeeWjWQfb2vU6D/8)Peter, we wouldn't be where we are today if it weren't for you, and that's an undeniable fact. body:
Are you fed up with mainstream media outlets like MSNBC, CNN, and The New York Times constantly pushing their agendas instead of giving you the straight facts?

Hey there! We’re Ayla & Amy, hosts of [**The Flyover Podcast**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4drlfbrdhh92stgk41g7i0q2drglh50okiqucrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clh6eob2c3h2bs) — your new go-to source for quick, unbiased daily news in just 15 minutes. | **Ayla** | **Amy**
---|---
Every day of the week, we break down the biggest stories across politics, business, sports, culture, and more. No noise. No hidden agendas. Just the day’s top headlines you need to start your day — with a few laughs sprinkled in to keep it light.
Whether you're commuting, working out, walking the dog or sipping your morning coffee, we're here to help you stay in the know without the stress.
Here’s how you can join us:

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsu44o73he96a01g5hleptf30h6nehk46bllnppg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clh69oj2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ngkp1r0m613jehvhjqh9vln7akunaelo5g9nv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clh69oj2cjh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjukh6tdqn3bcl35v0b3rlp6uirqpv1q4vv9bdbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clh69oj2cjh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr5tn0qo628amd0s4cb1ub3u6pvqk5mt0j56bo48_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clh69oj2cjh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z76i8c07k7g50u3mbaog6f8evs1b1q9gvggc5jtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clh69oj2cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "," now available on DVD. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below: Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Haley Jones
subject: New speakers confirmed: North Andover GOP Spring Fling!
body:
the buffet is BACK!!!
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOAJK-R_sbh2XJB-v3L_ujo527znYgjnsKVjbKisQCqnpfv5WVhYBet_mqczPJv-TMrkbhhwPI376mFo4oLgHcbUSkyLlWq-kqKl6juTjplNlYeiGQxihgZ-B87MJzUdWhZcgX_VMc2ptp6R11LgOg==&c=LCdNopqCA8EBo1ex6OHaJhLifucyCTalBn8xXt1Chs5tib3dj629Kw==&ch=JV1p4Ln2Na4m1ycmj5JLr8YJ9WziZkwIMlowTAdwveVNc-LWKtQcMw==)
---
| Hi Peter,
Please join the North Andover Republican Town Committee for their annual Spring Fling Fundraiser TOMORROW May 7th at China Blossom! I've included your invitation from Kevin Dube, the North Andover RTC Chair, below.
Thank you! Haley
Haley Jones, Finance Director, MassGOP
---
| |
---
Friends,
The North Andover Republican Town Committee Spring Fling will be held Wednesday, May 7 at China Blossom, 946 Osgood St., North Andover, MA. Doors open at 6PM and the program starts promptly at 7.
Our Featured speaker is Toby Leary Host of RapidFire Radio on 95.1 WXKT FM, WCRN 850 AM 2A Tuesday on the Grace Curley Show on WRKO 680 AM Chairman of The Civil Rights Coalition, where he has become a leading voice to defend constitutional freedoms in MA. Under his leadership the coalition gathered over 100,000 signatures to repeal the overreaching firearms law chapter 135 on the 2026 ballot.
Additional speakers: Mass GOP National Committeeman Brad Wyatt Mike Kennealy, candidate for Governor John Deaton, potential Senate candidate Micah Jones, potential Congressional candidate Tickets are $60 and will include the FULL China Blossom Buffet! A cash bar will be available. Also, as in past years, we will be holding our annual straw poll! This year's straw poll will cover the job our President, Governor and Governments are doing. We are asking people to please bring a canned good or other non-perishable food item. These will be delivered to St. Michael's Parish. This is traditionally one of the largest annual Republican gatherings in the area. It is also out biggest fundraiser of the year. All proceeds will go to supporting Republican candidates and building the local party.
For more information visit [https://www.northandovergop.com/spring-fling](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOAJK-R_sbh2XJB-v3L_ujo527znYgjnsKVjbKisQCqnpfv5WVhYBbql1A_5D65Wye05wean5U4xdSSqF3yl3bLlwA-7xcIr-OUpNnEZEobxKRx78rnkVIEdu-0fgyXh8rg79-z6fm-SeIFr2Lt0kcZd22WBg9WmoODz3yPaGtzaj_wmoA5A_c5Yun4f-2FX-7whUxXFyGDOcmhafkdeeIf0XWUoiaIekU--v28db_1PEYgJl0nhHf_d0MWbmBLH9wm5BQZ7GHfu3doZWXaKUXWDsQ-M0PCB&c=LCdNopqCA8EBo1ex6OHaJhLifucyCTalBn8xXt1Chs5tib3dj629Kw==&ch=JV1p4Ln2Na4m1ycmj5JLr8YJ9WziZkwIMlowTAdwveVNc-LWKtQcMw==) To purchase tickets, or to donate to the committee if you can't make the event, you may do so here: [https://secure.winred.com/north-andover-republican-town-committee/springfling25](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOAJK-R_sbh2XJB-v3L_ujo527znYgjnsKVjbKisQCqnpfv5WVhYBbql1A_5D65WD34ihx7zTiGOKZ2zm5ZKmZ3N-VP5zEaCeGQ-NvbxA1UvMTRN9LwOj4Wd3994MuwHM3UNw--UJLWV7vB7nODf46QBGzf7YD4W9H-y7p2VXrpz_uhqXg9sHZay6IEusc6UGaJF6nt-99vgQLhSops45WbcdWZT921cmPwaISJcMdB76ck2Y2UhhsXUiiheNbXMPPWKXHsKsXHeM7ukjY8LFdmIVksIrkMI&c=LCdNopqCA8EBo1ex6OHaJhLifucyCTalBn8xXt1Chs5tib3dj629Kw==&ch=JV1p4Ln2Na4m1ycmj5JLr8YJ9WziZkwIMlowTAdwveVNc-LWKtQcMw==) Or checks can be made payable to "North Andover Republican Town Committee" and can be mailed to: North Andover RTC PO Box 252 North Andover, MA 01845
Note: Per OCPF regulations we cannot accept cash. We can only accept Check or Credit Card. I look forward to seeing you all! We have a great deal to celebrate this year, let's keep the momentum going as we head into the mid-terms! Thank you, Kevin Dube, Chairman North Andover Republican Town Committee
---
| |
---

| Greater Georgia Newsletter May 6, 2025
---
| The 2025 Georgia legislative session has wrapped, and Greater Georgia is hitting the ground running! This April, we've been on a mission to ignite conservative passion across the state, spotlighting the boldest victories passed during the session.
From kicking off a high-energy statewide education tour to rallying volunteers at GOP conventions, our team is all in--educating diverse communities, registering voters, and mobilizing voters who feel left out and left behind.
Don't just take our word for it, [check out this article](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsoaYqpdYBj7tz1TYVrvXAk3uZ70aw2PWkOzRnbNd0Qbm3LWYmcSV5lQL5KufIjrYzX2s-rGfPXuBF78KdBOEZrjpvIF_UiEDtKZ2Q_W0sZPlzeZM2xw97R34_1B9acvsNtc9iVISo8lCYgprRFuqCfUn_NUOZB2KVCN8gU_1vK0kYc1B0rKnCN65yInQ4S1Gv84yTlFum2GZsNXMDc5pVCfPnUdg0e1Ai4XtPDCA4CA_Uev98CygnrbwiSOKUOZGyDYiklLefs4qwe_MPvi7YA7GbUCdXWKONZQvo7hq5QODBwej8ZbUD2qEOHtBl4GtpfGPOGoWok=&c=o_B0GLhFz3p76RsS4o1TY6ahct-PBI-w6jrWSAAJw1qIhUdvRue4eA==&ch=nU7HfkSFjXqdYgt9T4ICnhU5wQdnSViyoX5lnuBexA2_5n0pzyttZQ==) in the AJC by former State Representative Melvin Everson about our recent town hall in Dekalb County:
---
| [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsoaYqpdYBj7tz1TYVrvXAk3uZ70aw2PWkOzRnbNd0Qbm3LWYmcSV5lQL5KufIjrYzX2s-rGfPXuBF78KdBOEZrjpvIF_UiEDtKZ2Q_W0sZPlzeZM2xw97R34_1B9acvsNtc9iVISo8lCYgprRFuqCfUn_NUOZB2KVCN8gU_1vK0kYc1B0rKnCN65yInQ4S1Gv84yTlFum2GZsNXMDc5pVCfPnUdg0e1Ai4XtPDCA4CA_Uev98CygnrbwiSOKUOZGyDYiklLefs4qwe_MPvi7YA7GbUCdXWKONZQvo7hq5QODBwej8ZbUD2qEOHtBl4G5fxFrDITPCE=&c=o_B0GLhFz3p76RsS4o1TY6ahct-PBI-w6jrWSAAJw1qIhUdvRue4eA==&ch=nU7HfkSFjXqdYgt9T4ICnhU5wQdnSViyoX5lnuBexA2_5n0pzyttZQ==)
---
| |
---
| 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION
---
| | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsoaYqpdYBj7tz1TYVrvXAk3uZ70aw2PWkOzRnbNd0Qbm3LWYmcSV3L3ruM7tnkSFinmVK_IhigsZ8WvGFa1JQyZRICziEHWV3ro2mja1zDP-AmTmYMYzi4ADooIFAJwUp_iOyrb2ijGwOQVZmY2-kJZXbG2eTyixMLrPUYfLz0HTrUmxdDfNtqUUCQFZ1FYG9usRDB0Ns4tSdEpBSu0xfn9I54V82PoDBuKuOHCFgpnSFee-DD6OuegeNs0Hiaw&c=o_B0GLhFz3p76RsS4o1TY6ahct-PBI-w6jrWSAAJw1qIhUdvRue4eA==&ch=nU7HfkSFjXqdYgt9T4ICnhU5wQdnSViyoX5lnuBexA2_5n0pzyttZQ==)
---
| At the beginning of April, the Georgia General Assembly adjourned Sine Die, and Governor Kemp has been busy signing key legislation to make Georgia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Below are some important bills that have already been signed by Governor Kemp:
SIGNED BY GOVERNOR KEMP:
Taxes & Government Spending
* HB 111: Sweeping income tax cut for Georgia families; returning more than $800 million to Georgia taxpayers.
* HB 112: Returns $250-$500 to every qualifying Georgia taxpayer.
* HB 223: Implements robust protections to exempt Hurricane Helene relief from taxation for Georgians while introducing a timber tax credit to support South Georgia's timber industry in recovering from the storm's devastating effects.
* HB 92: Streamlines the homestead exemption by allowing governing authorities to rescind opt-outs through 2029 and defines eligible homesteads as primary residences with up to five acres.

Education & Student Safety
* HB 268: Implements new safety protocols and tougher penalties to mitigate threats against school children.
* HB 340: Bans the use of personal cellphones, smartwatches, and tablets for K-8 grades, ensuring students have distraction-free learning environments.
* HB 192: Introduces middle and high schoolers to Georgia's high-demand professions, empowering students to excel in post-secondary education or vocational training.
* SB 93: Bans the use of the outdated Three-Cueing Systems Model, a flawed teaching method that relies on meaning, structure, syntax, and visual cues, ensuring students receive more effective reading instruction grounded in evidence-based practices.

Veterans & Military Support
* HB 266: Exempts full-time active duty military income from the state income tax.
* HB 182: Prohibits life insurance companies from denying claims made by families of Georgia veterans.
* HB 454: Establishes the Vince Dooley Battlefield Trust Fund and Program, offering matching grants to organizations dedicated to acquiring and preserving historic battlefield properties through strategic investments.

Family Values
* SB 1: Prevents biological males from competing in women's sports.
* SB 36: Restores religious freedom protections from government-mandated shutdowns.
* HB 428: Protects individual rights to IVF.

---
| |
---
| Statewide Education Tour on Tort Reform
---
| |
---
| In April, Greater Georgia [kicked off our statewide education tour](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsoaYqpdYBj7tz1TYVrvXAk3uZ70aw2PWkOzRnbNd0Qbm3LWYmcSV5lQL5KufIjrwAfNLbKOklVtURPF_0qC-L0k1r4fl2EPBtEfMe3IwqQ7OzlipSBO63vsgGiWErrm2ZSxAdIxmIQ7znwHtz6W6vmxjw8SokfmN0pmIcUyi-N-Adjq742735xiohvfQyXN77Ict9GnYBi0SkR7J9OGkCGWo6BkKzW02SY4XRCWLLnkdU04G4OQKg==&c=o_B0GLhFz3p76RsS4o1TY6ahct-PBI-w6jrWSAAJw1qIhUdvRue4eA==&ch=nU7HfkSFjXqdYgt9T4ICnhU5wQdnSViyoX5lnuBexA2_5n0pzyttZQ==) with over 50 residents joining us in Dekalb County, featuring Georgia Insurance Commissioner John King.
A huge thank you to everyone who joined us to dive into Georgia's latest lawsuit reforms and their impact on families and businesses.
[Read more](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsoaYqpdYBj7tz1TYVrvXAk3uZ70aw2PWkOzRnbNd0Qbm3LWYmcSV5lQL5KufIjrYzX2s-rGfPXuBF78KdBOEZrjpvIF_UiEDtKZ2Q_W0sZPlzeZM2xw97R34_1B9acvsNtc9iVISo8lCYgprRFuqCfUn_NUOZB2KVCN8gU_1vK0kYc1B0rKnCN65yInQ4S1Gv84yTlFum2GZsNXMDc5pVCfPnUdg0e1Ai4XtPDCA4CA_Uev98CygnrbwiSOKUOZGyDYiklLefs4qwe_MPvi7YA7GbUCdXWKONZQvo7hq5QODBwej8ZbUD2qEOHtBl4Gf-hZUnLj9BY=&c=o_B0GLhFz3p76RsS4o1TY6ahct-PBI-w6jrWSAAJw1qIhUdvRue4eA==&ch=nU7HfkSFjXqdYgt9T4ICnhU5wQdnSViyoX5lnuBexA2_5n0pzyttZQ==) about how Governor Kemp's lawsuit reforms are a lifeline for black businesses and entrepreneurs in this AJC piece by Former State Representative Melvin Everson:
---
| | [AJC Op-Ed by Melvin Everson](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsoaYqpdYBj7tz1TYVrvXAk3uZ70aw2PWkOzRnbNd0Qbm3LWYmcSV5lQL5KufIjrYzX2s-rGfPXuBF78KdBOEZrjpvIF_UiEDtKZ2Q_W0sZPlzeZM2xw97R34_1B9acvsNtc9iVISo8lCYgprRFuqCfUn_NUOZB2KVCN8gU_1vK0kYc1B0rKnCN65yInQ4S1Gv84yTlFum2GZsNXMDc5pVCfPnUdg0e1Ai4XtPDCA4CA_Uev98CygnrbwiSOKUOZGyDYiklLefs4qwe_MPvi7YA7GbUCdXWKONZQvo7hq5QODBwej8ZbUD2qEOHtBl4GoEmILQuVKr4=&c=o_B0GLhFz3p76RsS4o1TY6ahct-PBI-w6jrWSAAJw1qIhUdvRue4eA==&ch=nU7HfkSFjXqdYgt9T4ICnhU5wQdnSViyoX5lnuBexA2_5n0pzyttZQ==)
---
| |
---
| JOIN US!
---
| Greater Georgia is excited to invite you to join us for our Third Annual Legislative Awards ceremony featuring special guests Governor Brian Kemp, Lt. Governor Burt Jones, and the Honorable Kelly Loeffler, who will be joining us for a fireside chat about small businesses and Georgia's job growth.

clean_body: | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter May 6, 2025 | The 2025 Georgia legislative session has wrapped, and Greater Georgia is hitting the ground running! This April, we've been on a mission to ignite conservative passion across the state, spotlighting the boldest victories passed during the session. From kicking off a high-energy statewide education tour to rallying volunteers at GOP conventions, our team is all in--educating diverse communities, registering voters, and mobilizing voters who feel left out and left behind. Don't just take our word for it, == in the AJC by former State Representative Melvin Everson about our recent town hall in Dekalb County: | == | | | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION | | == | At the beginning of April, the Georgia General Assembly adjourned Sine Die, and Governor Kemp has been busy signing key legislation to make Georgia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Below are some important bills that have already been signed by Governor Kemp: SIGNED BY GOVERNOR KEMP: Taxes & Government Spending HB 111: Sweeping income tax cut for Georgia families; returning more than $800 million to Georgia taxpayers. HB 112: Returns $250-$500 to every qualifying Georgia taxpayer. HB 223: Implements robust protections to exempt Hurricane Helene relief from taxation for Georgians while introducing a timber tax credit to support South Georgia's timber industry in recovering from the storm's devastating effects. HB 92: Streamlines the homestead exemption by allowing governing authorities to rescind opt-outs through 2029 and defines eligible homesteads as primary residences with up to five acres. Education & Student Safety HB 268: Implements new safety protocols and tougher penalties to mitigate threats against school children. HB 340: Bans the use of personal cellphones, smartwatches, and tablets for K-8 grades, ensuring students have distraction-free learning environments. HB 192: Introduces middle and high schoolers to Georgia's high-demand professions, empowering students to excel in post-secondary education or vocational training. SB 93: Bans the use of the outdated Three-Cueing Systems Model, a flawed teaching method that relies on meaning, structure, syntax, and visual cues, ensuring students receive more effective reading instruction grounded in evidence-based practices. Veterans & Military Support HB 266: Exempts full-time active duty military income from the state income tax. HB 182: Prohibits life insurance companies from denying claims made by families of Georgia veterans. HB 454: Establishes the Vince Dooley Battlefield Trust Fund and Program, offering matching grants to organizations dedicated to acquiring and preserving historic battlefield properties through strategic investments. Family Values SB 1: Prevents biological males from competing in women's sports. SB 36: Restores religious freedom protections from government-mandated shutdowns. HB 428: Protects individual rights to IVF. | | | Statewide Education Tour on Tort Reform | | | In April, Greater Georgia == with over 50 residents joining us in Dekalb County, featuring Georgia Insurance Commissioner John King. A huge thank you to everyone who joined us to dive into Georgia's latest lawsuit reforms and their impact on families and businesses. == about how Governor Kemp's lawsuit reforms are a lifeline for black businesses and entrepreneurs in this AJC piece by Former State Representative Melvin Everson: | | == | | | JOIN US! | Greater Georgia is excited to invite you to join us for our Third Annual Legislative Awards ceremony featuring special guests Governor Brian Kemp, Lt. Governor Burt Jones, and the Honorable Kelly Loeffler, who will be joining us for a fireside chat about small businesses and Georgia's job growth. There are just NINE DAYS left to reserve your tickets, so click the link below to secure your seat today! | | == | | == | | == | | | RECENT EVENTS | Georgia Republican Party 14th Congressional District Convention April 26, 2025 Thank you to the GAGOP 14th District Convention for welcoming our team! We're recruiting volunteers to crush it in 2026--registering voters and securing victories for our principles. | | | | | WHAT WE'RE READING | == Georgia Insurance Commissioner John King discusses new tort reform law at DeKalb County town hall == 5 soon-to-be laws every Georgia parent should know == Biden believed transgender athletes had unfair advantage against biological girls: report == Georgia leads nation in REAL ID compliance ahead of May 7 deadline | | | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | == == == | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988 | Atlanta, GA 30355 US | |

Israel’s security cabinet has approved a [military plan to “capture” and hold territory in Gaza](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdEHjiX9C4eI2dLntlmjA48QbgyMyCiJPv2JfYbsjHenTOd_XdbhSLnm5_aeZg6Q6LLy9CovwOtzoQ0IPrm9el1TiSkmkxokGBLQnsCdwQ6Rc9sE0MSRm5HPDQXvjLDqNvrkHGg122rP3UWt0ndF6TJYhWjNar7smh4MGFpwGuBjbEnRmcmwhMUS4GGWAY5a6tt81L3LnVPZjUjvVuSnhLvJ8qfM_hb3Cftu2dhyno1PYH2cU9rRKngofcdp2MI9Zfx5QmzXE55ZLyS_nlYHbTLn8UuVPKt4BfwIAAP__4nNxkw) as part of a wider push to dismantle Hamas and retrieve hostages, an Israeli official announced Monday.

# Tuesday, May 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1851, inventor John Gorrie received a patent for a revolutionary ice-making machine. It allowed people for the first time to make ice rather than have it shipped by boat, marking it as a forerunner of the modern refrigerator. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPozAQhX8NdBMZYxsoXFxDl2uvRHP2GCYxdmSsRNyvP2VX226z9af33qf357pckSOn9TfuZGvIS6LXEalWKsuK_7DinfKTSgrRFwy1Zu9wkUJqEBqEWTxyPBfVehuIJPUt2W5QRkvTyaHdbCe0ntzgJh_6SSscO2VQTf7v0DtDxrRs321CC9MJMSp9QTEpZ0iLQMKLUTVKkOeay-WWOdWNQjzfSheX9zbardbH0fS_Gjk3cn5gpVTPvPIbN3KuGx_g8QRO8Alh46PmcjZyzgl2PMFAN-oObnlLsOZSmKCQI36SB_xKhVwAE7Aj2PHOaYUd3caJ4NuJtlj_eHGMfJihUWLdkeOHev3R308r_wcAAP__4RWW5A)) Kissing used to be just chemistry. Now it’s bugs, bread, and autoimmune backlash. In today’s _Science_ section: your red lipstick might be made from [crushed insects](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUc2K2zAQfhr5NkGWZCc5-JCl-LaFUmjpycjSyJ6uLAVpEpN9-uK-wt4--OD7_f0-vVuKlJbvdsOBQ54S7jUiM5ZpsZ-W7QfmJ5YUoi82MGfv7KSk6kB2IPvJW4qvyTR-CIgKdYNDezZ9p_pWnZt1uJ7DrHVr0V60b10XeqNb7cJsrmrW17ah4VCTnexbKS-mO1l5Na7HTgaUXl6MMBI9cS6nv5kSrxji64h0cnlr4rAy36vQN6FGocZ9309bTQcn1IgJHlWosTrC5FCocaYc8_I6UI4eCnqIdK9M7gMW5ArEFVyOuUAoeQNXHnVFD_NjqcArVZgpM7oVKtvCjzts1iNYeGKplBPwahkqUKroGELBw9UWuN3azx9vf34KPWZHXuhvb8fsuNdfWO5NGfx9pxip9mdh5LJZiv8L8pdeeQ7qXwAAAP__0E6ksA), though new research shows kissing after gluten might not be as risky for your celiac partner as once feared. Today's sponsor is [OneSkin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUgOHTwBbrGQPGA0OHempaqUOrTojAI6EhENlPsdLTV-kVeoFP__-5d3ufS67HV39BS6m5ittakAgXd_Q_nvwZ2w2XmkpcfCJqMXgnQKgdqB1oF30udyd5tAlR4MDR9qPUSuhejPxkxwmGSfRiOBymMUTjzRQBojZoQq-D5Nk-NFCgewAjVedhkkGjgoQQwUgmAWOmtnTfLVc6YSr3R1IX2oUXeyK6rmx4YmJmYt62rWsV13OuXWhMzPPL19vH8ztfbLxuuZS86pFJOF58Ln8C_Wv7ZsVvAAAA__9-iGrH). ## Israel OKs Plan to Seize Gaza
Israel's security cabinet has approved a [military plan to "capture" and hold territory in Gaza](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdEHjiX9C4eI2dLntlmjA48QbgyMyCiJPv2JfYbsjHenTOd_XdbhSLnm5_aeZg6Q6LLy9CovwOtzoQ0IPrm9el1TiSkmkxokGBLQnsCdwQ6Rc9sE0MSRm5HPDQXvjLDqNvrkHGg122rP3UWt0ndF6TJYhWjNar7smh4MGFpwGuBjbEnRmcmwhMUS4GGWAY5a6tt81L3LnVPZjUjvVuSnhLvJ8qfM_hb3Cftu2dhyno1PYH2cU9rRKngofcdp2MI9Zfx5QmzXE55ZLyS_nlYHbTLn8UuVPKt4BfwIAAP__4nNxkw) as part of a wider push to dismantle Hamas and retrieve hostages, an Israeli official announced Monday. Prime Minister Benjamin [Netanyahu said the operation aims to move Gaza's population south](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMQL8GuiBPIMAUKa6hm2uvRJ7EAd-GBCXRsLNfv8r-wnZPsmy953-P9YHsOWx_8SBdXFwDXdlTKZTWDb-w4AfFF6XgvE3oSonW4CpBKgFKwLhaZP9eh9ZqRySpb0nfpmFUcrzJqd012tnOzkgAc8cJzITTszcg1Tz3gPLesq7XQMF4A5gH1SHcBzOSAkdgYR6aAchyian7HzmUnZx_V6XOxKP1ei_lzE3_p5FLI5frujrzzLWizhu5VGzkwjkheVGbxIVJ7HhgFtE5CplfJOjzxGA5bJXIixM95cKBMdT1Nml7Xuw953FqBtgOZP9jUH71tpeW3wEAAP__WxaDqw) "for its protection," suggesting long-term occupation. The plan, backed unanimously by Israel's ministers, includes ramping up strikes, blocking Hamas from controlling aid, and expanding buffer zones. UN-affiliated humanitarian groups condemned it, warning that it violates international law and endangers civilians and workers. Implementation is expected after President Trump visits the region in mid-May.
## Trump Offers $1,000 for Self-Deportation
The Trump administration has rolled out a new immigration policy offering [illegal immigrants $1,000 and free travel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQhZ8GOqNZr_FC4eI2dHvblGgWj8GJf5A9WbR5-ogUeYE0pzhH-vTpvN3nO_rg0_ofIxl2eU501EDMVOYVv5Dxg_KTSnLBFnTM2S44S5C9gF6Ani368JpVa40jknRtyVxuSvdSX-St3cx1HLR69HpAxHGQg0MHywiEaB8jjLb15qRBD_oCMKi-QxjVoqkHR2BhUI0Csp5z6d6zT7yRC69TqVtybIPZmPfaXP81cmrkdBxHt6THco6NnE50Iyf4DS6fcRd2q4ILPimIJVeuorLfKVnhY_RrwXRWFJywtOfC3cYxtMXY_fAh-KpvjYI1og8_Dvyn455GfgcAAP__QZmCjw) if they voluntarily return to their country of origin. The program, run through the Customs and Border Protection's Home app, is designed to slash deportation costs by 70% and ease pressure on immigration enforcement, with one Honduran migrant already using it. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem called it the "[safest and most cost-effective](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8GukVrYzhTuEhz3aVNifbwGpwYjMwGdHn6iP8V_nI00uib79drfFFMcZt_0spOQh43vo7EIlzGmf6R0B_OJ5ctJF8oiGQ_0ahRd4AdYD96iukzmtq7wKy5rdmph-k73Sv9qBfH9k0YLA8DslKDGtoJTbBk31OwKpg6unsNO-wVojVdQziYqecOA6NHayqD7KPk0vzOcZOFQ_rcSM2U1zq5RWQ_qvZHpZ-Vfl7X1Wxezru8Yy7Jw_2p0s-_B-QQuBygABGBNg87fSDkAlLo5ASSYY1zoU0OuJYMB6cAnvdcBGzbWhxMXZzfr5hSPPpHZXBeKaYvFvmWwNPp_wEAAP__pTmFHA)" option for both migrants and law enforcement. Critics say it risks rewarding unlawful entry, though DHS argues it could leave the door open for legal immigration later. The program doesn't bar migrants from applying to legally reenter the U.S. in the future.
## List: Easiest and Hardest States to Save Money

Prime Minister Benjamin "for its protection," suggesting long-term occupation. The plan, backed unanimously by Israel's ministers, includes ramping up strikes, blocking Hamas from controlling aid, and expanding buffer zones. UN-affiliated humanitarian groups condemned it, warning that it violates international law and endangers civilians and workers. Implementation is expected after President Trump visits the region in mid-May. Trump Offers $1,000 for Self-Deportation The Trump administration has rolled out a new immigration policy offering if they voluntarily return to their country of origin. The program, run through the Customs and Border Protection's Home app, is designed to slash deportation costs by 70% and ease pressure on immigration enforcement, with one Honduran migrant already using it. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem called it the "" option for both migrants and law enforcement. Critics say it risks rewarding unlawful entry, though DHS argues it could leave the door open for legal immigration later. The program doesn't bar migrants from applying to legally reenter the U.S. in the future. # MUSK'S SILVER HUNGER:
## TESLA ACCELERATES GLOBAL SHORTAGE
Elon Musk's Tesla Push Could Send Silver Prices Through the Roof
Elon Musk is back in the spotlight—this time for fueling a global scramble for silver.
Tesla's relentless production of electric vehicles and solar technology is driving demand for the precious metal to unprecedented levels.
Silver—critical for EV batteries, solar panels, and advanced electronics—is now at the center of a supply crisis.
**Industry analysts are sounding the alarm:**
_"Tesla's expansion is amplifying a demand surge across green energy and AI tech,"_ reports one expert. _"The pressure on silver supplies is mounting, with no immediate solution in sight."_
* **Silver demand skyrockets:** Clean energy and tech industries are consuming more silver than ever, with AI-driven semiconductors alone projected to require an additional 23 million ounces annually by 2030.
* **Supplies are limited:** Mining output has fallen short of demand, creating fears of a supply crunch.
* **Prices are rising fast:** After a 25% jump in 2024, experts predict silver could hit record highs in 2025.

**What does this mean for Americans?**
With Tesla and other corporate giants snapping up silver, everyday investors could be priced out of the market.
That's why a new [**2025 Silver Wealth Guide**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGO0zAQxvGncW4bjWccpznkwFIFCSQuCAF7qRx73HqJ66zttlqeHrXq9jrzk76_iesS_Pso-meBeAiuCERBnwTi259LzKfX-O3Lk_qdvj696e-xu37x852e8YGP1rz-ff7x62WeXsp2a34m-gdn-eD1feUHvo-2HE1Yrtd-27iRvAPV8Ch7pTvsAbE5jFr6YSNp8EQzgQTbO62dGkAC23nwTRgRsIMOtAREGFoFsyQi8M5710kSCm47rYmcgzWy1IvJOaXY2hSbZTzUupZb2CRwyrymXEu7T4vjo81cauRqlnLVAqcSljPncsp7FjTt2O9qNsdibA3puAtO0BbI4iw3PZvNrJis6ZzesHEDacU9DwK18f5G5SAF6pJO2fLu49Lk0a2XsCyh6F4o2N_yr7HnEf8HAAD__0xMg9o) is now available.

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Sunoco Buys Competitor, Houston Police Raise, and Medal-Winning Beers
body:
Dallas-based fuel distributor and pipeline operator Sunoco LP has agreed to acquire Canadian fuel retailer Parkland Corp. for $9.1 billion. Parkland is one of the largest owners of gas stations in Canada, with [about 4,000 locations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OrCAUx_Gn0Q4DBxAoKG5jN7fd0iAcRxKEiTB_fPuNu4-w_cn55vP7us03F1PM9_9uR9s-a5kzvmvC1vCY6zMXX5bnWX3ZH9hiK8dWnrXNQEESKgkd5-BiOmfRB7vQYFiPlikxSjAgVL_ZdQFUxjEDGpVSjHE3chM4sFVzXHUf7fWMSjoyRqkQg5FaMs0XzrSROoROUAxXemgbNvy4uqazvPAYfNn7ZLfWHrXj_zqYOpjWmF32OJxuK-W66GC6SB1MvxxyeYh32YXoMrm7SnzJL8wRs0fCBAMQYmTD1vbUHzY83jGlWEfVCXrfXUw_3fa3tV4WvgMAAP__X5l_Gg).

Founded by Mrs. Massey Sparks Millard as Union Baptist Church, it was later renamed [Old North Baptist Church](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUQOHV4M7WBYN_CorXuMtrp7QwkIAGcy24jpPdjzJbmA2cTzpft_VmYor58d_sXtPrjmv2V02eyJe1nhktbue7WtwPT5GwBDwrrQKEakG1MKzOxPReZeP0Bm7mjdd8lIMSs5BjE7SyUo4zqKGf-tlwsM5KmO6mVwO3XEET9ScGCgbOAaTsZjUpPvVbz6dZTc4xCd596I6CJ_8y9Z7e-PSls7g3SQeio7L-HxMLE8t1XR3VYDCnmH2H5cHEEkx2G-I3E4vPVKKvTCyYXJuxUGg3c1Cs1NpwFhuaot1xxZRiHUYm4bGbmH4t-tuhpxY_AQAA__-rqnv1). _Battleship Texas_ is welcoming groups of visitors once a week over the next two months, highlighting the ship's role during the D-Day invasion. ## Sunoco Acquiring Canadian Fuel Retailer
Dallas-based fuel distributor and pipeline operator Sunoco LP has agreed to acquire Canadian fuel retailer Parkland Corp. for $9.1 billion. Parkland is one of the largest owners of gas stations in Canada, with [about 4,000 locations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OrCAUx_Gn0Q4DBxAoKG5jN7fd0iAcRxKEiTB_fPuNu4-w_cn55vP7us03F1PM9_9uR9s-a5kzvmvC1vCY6zMXX5bnWX3ZH9hiK8dWnrXNQEESKgkd5-BiOmfRB7vQYFiPlikxSjAgVL_ZdQFUxjEDGpVSjHE3chM4sFVzXHUf7fWMSjoyRqkQg5FaMs0XzrSROoROUAxXemgbNvy4uqazvPAYfNn7ZLfWHrXj_zqYOpjWmF32OJxuK-W66GC6SB1MvxxyeYh32YXoMrm7SnzJL8wRs0fCBAMQYmTD1vbUHzY83jGlWEfVCXrfXUw_3fa3tV4WvgMAAP__X5l_Gg). Sunoco’s offer [represents a 25% premium](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAYhJ9GOxzgAKGgSHPdpU3pgP_vyQTBEdTz7TOXPEL6nd39vq_H8HAhhvT8dAva-prykPAsEWvFbSh7ymP2-1XGvKxYQ83bnPdSB065JFQSqgZwIV6DaMF6Coa1aFkvlOSGi76dLYJXWipFwUvDFDjvDZejmsTIx0mLNth3GZVUMUapEJ2RWjJ98zemjdQAjaAI7-muzljx5coUr3zg1o15aaOda11Lc_to-L3h9_M8u5AOLDWvCMG9Qw2__6GQmonfLzK65CC4RKYdI9nC4SJZ3fYdXQISEtkLGMI8AXSRMNZzLbRpNwvrGWIMRfWNoM_Fhfj7of7P3GH5TwAAAP__efiEQQ) over the seven-day average price of Parkland’s stock. Parkland has faced pressure from its largest shareholder to restructure. The deal is expected to close in the second half of this year and will result in the formation of a new publicly traded entity, SUNCorp LLC. Last year, Sunoco acquired fuel storage and pipeline operator [NuStar Energy for $7.3 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOrCAYhZ8GOg38AmpBcRu7ue2WBARHsihGfsfx7TfuJvsC25zmJN-Xcz4e5mFjiuvzv12CxveUzRrOkgJi2E051jxmd1xlzMsWMGLe53wUNMBAVkxWTBlvY7qMoF475ntOg-atUBJ6EC2dteo8tFZNjeNKuNBOVsHUy0YpZ4UDS6O-YUwyxTljQtS97CTvGtfwrped90Sw4G91jXPA8LZlSld-hb0e80KTnhG3Qpp_BAYCw3me9bi68S4JDDebwMB-42dThblyx1Vtdv9MdvX1jEuiu_bbGVOKRbVEsOdiY_qW4N-ueWn4CgAA__-xiHdU).
## Dallas Shopping Center Redevelopment Paused
The $200 million redevelopment of a Far North Dallas shopping center is on hold after the developer, the city, and residents opposed to the project have [agreed to a jury trial on October 6](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yhCAUhZ8GO3bgCv4UFGnsNm1KB-WqZFAMXHfXPH3GfYU0pzkz3znzfd37u_XBb_OnXdHQa4r9hs8ckAhTn48tjnE4zjzGdUfyFNMSj0w9CNBcaC6q3lkfzl4VzgzCtbJAI2tVaWhB1cVitFKgJjmIUWmnZNla1M5K0K5uBbSu8OaCCS0qKYVQ6tbqRsumHErZtLpxjimB7pq-0YKEL5uncMYHptsY1yKYhWjPrPxg0DHoRru5Mzuf6KoZdBedQSfeAQy6HfcdE88_h03If-Pmt5lPfl6Iz2hT5sfOp5j495FOTsnbwKArknH704fgc1UzJebV-vA-QP_T9jDwFwAA___n7YEt). Developer Henry S. Miller plans to convert the Pepper Square shopping center into a [mixed-use project with up to 868 apartments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD0OpCAcxU-DHQYQVAqKKdZutthmS4PyR0kQWMBxZk-_ca6w3Ute8nsfv5_zUzvvwvZTH6Dq28Y5wFU81Ap5LmeIa1zOT1njkaC6GvMez1JnRpjARGDSz0Y7_5l5Y9RCjKQNKDrwXjDJ-NDsal06Is3Ae9ONIBY79qOVnA5S2qWzBBqnbhgRpKeUEM5bKUZBx27p6CjFaAziBMwd3dYdKrx1sf4TX5DbNR6NV3utqaDugdiE2HRdV3uUcHuITRDwWRCb7lGITV_9NwYXNmzdtld8czAj5MAJUoKMy59TZ8AZDLzAx3RAqDh5HXCBim3MuGanPWKTzvjxoD94v_xqsjLpct670g-Ik-3Qzn_r1f879aXYvwAAAP__DXaNOQ)—including at least one 12-story building—and 35,000 square feet of retail space. The city approved rezoning for the development last month. Residents sued to stop the project last October, alleging the developer had not provided adequate notice of a rezoning proposal. Since then, they have accused the city of violating its comprehensive land use plan, arguing the development is an [example of illegal "spot zoning."](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb9GOww8QaWg2MZutt3SgDxHEhQDz3Hm7zfuL2x3i5t7cs_PY3rYEMP-_LYbGnovadrxKhGJME_l3NOc3Pkpc9oOpEApr-ksNAEHxbhivJu8DfEzydobx70WNRrRy06BBtnXq3FceWhn1AtY7fpeObfMrXCowYGcZR3MPcYV74TgXMpGq0GJoXWtGLQavK8kR3-jG1qR8G3LEj_phbmZ01ZHsxIdpWq_KhgrGK_rapb0lveNu1DBeMcKxsVmtqdMK_M2RluYxxfGdGy4E_OhHCchW9H6sD8Z5WBjnY0_rhBjKF1fSf7cbIh_VPqfq5eB3wAAAP__BoiBMQ) “ _Taller buildings with more and denser housing options are suited for Downtown Dallas, while shorter buildings with less focus on residential and more focus on community retail, restaurant, and personal service options are better suited for suburban areas_ ,” [reads the lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGupCAQRb8GdxhAQF2w6GTirmc7S4NSrSQIDpRt-_cv9i-83UkqOXXv_fccn9YHH5e_dgODn1caI5wlACLksRwxzWk6rjKnbQf0mPKajoKjYEJRpijTo7M-XKOsnJmY63kFhrdSK9EL2Var6ZXV0zy3jXOtloopzdtZ6O7VaRCu7ytvbhlTTHPOmJR1rzrFu2ZqeNerzjkiGbj7dY0rIHxseYUrvSHXc9qqYFbEvZDmQcRAxHCeZ72VeN-IGCDSoxAx3KWIGL5s45IvGsEv65RyoRnwyJFionM6Mt6w2oB0h32HTMv_w2agGRy8IaR9g4i3JdPHg_-5VjFU2bj99CH4olsi2bJZH77h8HeTvo34CQAA__8YUY1E).
## Battleship Texas Offering "Normandy Tour"
The historic battleship USS _Texas_ , which has been closed to the public since 2019 as it undergoes repairs, is [welcoming small groups of visitors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQhU8DmZF_AQcONiGbTTdEZVw0lux2y65uhtuvmCtMVsGnr957_77WL4gpPh9_IaOj772sTzxbQiKsa3s_y1b8-2pbyS-kSKUe5d1olVwaxg3j4xogpmvVfXCeByt6dGLSo5FW6qk_3CZBKY0KPYTJIyqwoxZBSzAClbJ9dLeMGz4KwbnWgzWzEbPySszWzCF0mmO4Xw90IOE3tD1d5YN12ErukzuIXq1Tfzq5dHI5z3N4QPrcNW6gk8t9dnLxQJSwHfHFfiyMyrs2dsaU2FZyxlwqELKbaCywABerJWEnF6gUt4QrWDPK2Xu24x6YmaedWWEC44A758qrOejhoJz66sLrNsc2Tp3mjwwx_eSl3638cfJ_AAAA__9BGpMa) once a week for the next two months. It is being prepared to reopen next year after securing a location at Galveston’s Pier 15 as its new home. The [2-hour guided Normandy Tour](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAUheGnwU6zQUApKG5jN7c9pUHBkQTdBrbO-PYnM69w-pX1Jf_PY3y4mOL-_O-2YOm94LiHV0mBKOSxnDvOOJ13mXE7AkXCvOJZaBQgVA2qBj16F9M9ysrbCbzhVbC8k1oJI2RXrdbMivdOu35eWq_nzvkJpOk0TEYtoNsq2s8ZKNCcA0jZGNUr3rdTy3ujeu-ZhOA_dENroPB2ZUk3XiE3M25VsivRUVj7j4mBiWFyRCmUNR7faYP5ycRwJLfXN565vmKJxMSwY97c7u-a8MxMDFW2_njFlGLRHZPw3FxMX4H-1uWy4jcAAP__vy95EA) highlights the ship’s role in the D-Day invasion and showcases its half-deck, 45-caliber guns, and the captain’s cabin. Hard hats are required, as the ship is still being repaired. During the June 6, 1944, invasion of Normandy, the battleship supported Allied troops scaling the cliffs of Pointe du Hoc, firing 255 shells at the German defenses in just over half an hour. USS _Texas_ is the last surviving battleship from D-Day. "_We're the last battleship that can tell the story, and we want to make sure we get it right_ ," [said a representative](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2uqzAQxfHVmM5oPNh8FC5eQ5fX3hIZPARLBiM8hLD7q2QLtz7S_yedn8fwcCGG7fnfrWT5PadhoytHYqZjyOeWpjSed57SuhMHTseSzswDAhoJRkI9eBfiPejC2xF8pwqyqtG1wQ51UywWnR5nbQx43zhftdQRuGoeG6VQeZiLYD8xMFArBaB12ZnWqLYaK9V2pvVeaCD_oUteiOnt8hzv9KKjnNJaRLsw71lU_wT2AvvrusppOdL2WQX2zzPOckous8DeHRymSAL70TFHykvY5TcpOZ2H9NK7WyJUoE2H5b7sxWH9foUYQ64boeG5uhC_MP_trpfF3wAAAP__Yi1_zg) for the Battleship Texas Foundation during a recent media event. Tours cost $100 and are offered only on Sundays through the end of June.

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Sunoco Acquiring Canadian Fuel Retailer Dallas-based fuel distributor and pipeline operator Sunoco LP has agreed to acquire Canadian fuel retailer Parkland Corp. for $9.1 billion. Parkland is one of the largest owners of gas stations in Canada, with . Sunoco’s offer over the seven-day average price of Parkland’s stock. Parkland has faced pressure from its largest shareholder to restructure. The deal is expected to close in the second half of this year and will result in the formation of a new publicly traded entity, SUNCorp LLC. Last year, Sunoco acquired fuel storage and pipeline operator . Dallas Shopping Center Redevelopment Paused The $200 million redevelopment of a Far North Dallas shopping center is on hold after the developer, the city, and residents opposed to the project have . Developer Henry S. Miller plans to convert the Pepper Square shopping center into a —including at least one 12-story building—and 35,000 square feet of retail space. The city approved rezoning for the development last month. Residents sued to stop the project last October, alleging the developer had not provided adequate notice of a rezoning proposal. Since then, they have accused the city of violating its comprehensive land use plan, arguing the development is an “ Taller buildings with more and denser housing options are suited for Downtown Dallas, while shorter buildings with less focus on residential and more focus on community retail, restaurant, and personal service options are better suited for suburban areas ,” . Battleship Texas Offering "Normandy Tour" The historic battleship USS Texas , which has been closed to the public since 2019 as it undergoes repairs, is once a week for the next two months. It is being prepared to reopen next year after securing a location at Galveston’s Pier 15 as its new home. The highlights the ship’s role in the D-Day invasion and showcases its half-deck, 45-caliber guns, and the captain’s cabin. Hard hats are required, as the ship is still being repaired. During the June 6, 1944, invasion of Normandy, the battleship supported Allied troops scaling the cliffs of Pointe du Hoc, firing 255 shells at the German defenses in just over half an hour. USS Texas is the last surviving battleship from D-Day. "We're the last battleship that can tell the story, and we want to make sure we get it right ," for the Battleship Texas Foundation during a recent media event. Tours cost $100 and are offered only on Sundays through the end of June. | Flying together with our sponsor 1 heart attack signal you should NEVER ignore A message from Dr. Fred Pescatore: Dear Flyover Reader, I check every single one of my patients ... | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: May Newsletter
body:
I'm still having fun talking about the Air Force's next-generation fighter aircraft - the F-47!
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - May 2025
Welcome to this month’s installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/URKz1AKyD33a)
---
This in-studio interview was several weeks ago, but I’m still having fun talking about the Air Force’s next-generation fighter aircraft – the F-47! The Navy’s next generation fighter is expected to be announced any day now, and is a competition between Northrup and Boeing. (March 24th)
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/TaIsyxZ4wKE4)
---
| | | I appreciated the chance to join NewsNation to talk about the feasibility and utility of the Golden Dome program (April 18th)
** _Thoughts by Teichert_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/0_FTAcAeIzUH)
---
I had done several TV interviews on the nuclear negotiations with Iran, and it prompted me to write up these thoughts for _The Daily Caller_.
| | | |
---
!!️ The Power of Paradigms!

🧠 Paradigms may be preventing you from seeing what is right in front of you: "What a man sees depends both upon what he looks at and also upon what his previous visual-conceptual experience has taught him to see." (Thomas Kuhn)

👀 The truth of your surroundings may only be visible after a crisis: "[Practitioners] often speak of ‘scales falling from their eyes’ or the ‘lightening flash’ that ‘inundates’ a previously obscure puzzle, enabling its components to be seen in a new way that for the first time permits its solution” (Kuhn)

!?️ What paradigms, assumptions, or worldviews are causing you to miss the obvious? Answering that question may prevent you from enduring your next personal or organizational crisis.

📷 I often have the solemn privilege of talking about a paradigm related to the crisis depicted by the hole in the desert shown above.
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/H7wyCa7-m5JW)
---
| [ "The Lunch with Jack Nicklaus That Won Rory McIlroy the Masters"](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/y_zLJ69VjTcc "Prayers for a Nation")
---
| | | 💥 🔥 Mentorship matters – at all levels! 🔥 💥

📣 ⛳ Though this article about Master’s Champion Rory McIlroy doesn’t linger on these important truths, we should take away some key mentorship golden nuggets from winning the green jacket. McIlroy knew he needed it and asked for it. Nicklaus generously provided it. And the results were success, but also:
\- Wisdom
\- Confidence
\- Resilience
\- Community

!?️ What do you need to do today to create mentoring relationships for yourself and others that can further your success and expand your ability to make a lasting impact? ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **_Behind the Scenes_**
---
| | | |
---
| | | As promised, I’ve been crowd sourcing my kid’s book title on social media and based on the inputs and voting, I’ve gone firm with the following: _The Dragon Who Earned His Wings_. As a reminder about the power of the listen, consider, and act cycle, my original thought for the book title got ZERO votes (_The Dragon Who Couldn’t Fly Who Flew_). Leaders aren’t expected to have all the ideas, and their best idea is often listening to the ideas of others.
---
| | | |
---
⚓ Anchor Down! ⚓

🎇 🎆 Team Teichert is very excited to announce that Noah is headed to Vanderbilt next year on a Navy ROTC scholarship as he prepares to serve our great nation as a nuclear engineer in the United States Navy! ** _My Bookshelf_**
| | | |
---
“The Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency, or DARPA as it is known, is the most powerful and most productive military science agency in the world. It is also one of the most secretive and, until this book, the least investigated. Its mission is to create revolutions in military science, and to maintain technological dominance over the rest of the world.”
|
---
“I have been many things in my life: a son, an immigrant, a soldier, a husband, a father, a police officer, a small business owner, and now, an author. And I am deeply proud of each and every one of them. It has been my great pleasure to write and share the stories you read in the previous pages. If you are, were, or want to be a member of the military or a first responder, I hope that this book will be of use to you, either now or in the future. I have no way of knowing what the future holds, but I do know that we will need men and women of courage, candor, and commitment to uphold our values and protect our way of life. A life of service to others is not easy, and is full of dangers. But you can do it if you set yourself on The Resolute Path.”

Confucius: “A man is great not because he hasn’t failed; a man is great because failure hasn’t stopped him.”
|
---
“Most days, working on policy at Facebook was way less like enacting a chapter from Machiavelli and way more like watching a bunch of fourteen-year-olds, who’ve been given superpowers and an ungodly amount of money, as they jet around the world to figure out what power has bought and brought them.”
|
---
“The same God who led you in will lead you out ... the same God who led you out will lead you on.” These booklets use Exodus 14 and Joshua 1-6 as their foundations for great truth. ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**
| | | |
---
| [ Pleasing Him
(April 5th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/tTtbMxu0JcP_ "Pronouns Matter")
---
| [ Pleasing the Lord Today
(April 12th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/icpNx0RgA1uA "Finding the Stars")
---
| [ Come-From-Behind Victories
(April 19th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/c4m15P32zGfA "We Must Listen")
---
| [ Never Cheapening It
(April 26th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5PXfhtiO5INJ3KFnk/umAUt56HZnYP "Transforming Common Days into Thanksgiving")
---
| | | **_Blasts from the Past_**
---
| | | | [ "Leader's Forum:
Our most precious resource"](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwrgUf4sXZOCbnIYO0/r4XYBKrCyOJv)
---
In this past month’s posting about leadership, I provided my definition of leadership with a few succinct, amplifying thoughts. At one point, I mentioned the following: "A leader ignites explosive engagement when they focus on doing a few things relentlessly and right: casting a bold vision, setting broad constraints in achieving that vision, properly resourcing to achieve that vision, breaking down barriers that impede that vision, and getting out of the way." That list of leadership activities originated from the 2011 publication linked above, and I hope you enjoy some of my earliest published thoughts on leadership that are contained therein. ** _Humble Request_**
| [ johnteichert.com](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDhYHcZvsAP4JMNKzgWGO/YXtmNMVtL6BR)
---
If you have someone in mind who you think would appreciate this content, please point them to my website to sign-up for future installments of Teichert in the Trenches. It's free; thank you!
** _Dad Joke of the Month_** Advice for the single guys out there: If you meet a young lady who wears a white suit, smells like honey, and is covered in bee stings ... You’ve found a keeper!
| | | |
---
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC

Teichert in the News | | | | This in-studio interview was several weeks ago, but I’m still having fun talking about the Air Force’s next-generation fighter aircraft – the F-47! # Rep. Shelley Luther Calls out House Leadership
---
| |
---
| Representative Shelley Luther has been a primary figure in the medical freedom movement **since she was jailed in 2020** for pushing back against tyrannical COVID-related business closures in Texas. Now that she is in the Texas House of Representatives, she is **doubling down to defend medical liberty**. Last Thursday, she stood shoulder-to-shoulder with nearly a dozen other legislators to make an **impassioned plea for House leadership** to move more quickly to get important bills across the finish line, including her novel piece of legislation - HB 3441 - which would finally **hold vaccine manufacturers accountable** for adverse events. We have less than a month left before the Legislature gavels out, meaning each day is precious and **swift action is crucial**. Be prepared to respond to our Action Alerts as they come through - **we need you now more than ever!**

We need you, Pittsburgh. The Mayoral election is in just two weeks so we’re recruiting leaders like you to step as **Precinct Captains!** | [I'm in](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107166370/543819623/1854311502?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250506_vol_precinctcpt_team_oc_act_xx_sbt1&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250506_vol_precinctcpt_team_oc_act_xx_sbt1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiYzY5NDI3LTc0MmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hoi17F2hGxHRbw8y6n2M8-KjcMVukI_paVwyPF_q1Ao=&emci=ddb909d5-7b27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=fbc69427-742a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1206669)
---
**Precinct Captains play an important role in getting the neighborhood to flex their political power, especially in local elections.**
We’re supporting Pittsburgh’s first black Mayor, Ed Gainey, for reelection because in Elon Musk and Donald Trump’s authoritarian takeover, local and state leaders are critical to protecting our people and fighting back. Mayor Gainey is recommitting to not collaborating with ICE and fighting the Trump admin on cuts to vital services like Medicaid and HUD offices.
[We’ll provide all the training you’ll need. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Dems are softer than cotton candy in the rain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
That’s why we can’t let them win again

Friend, I've never been one to hold my tongue, and I don't plan on starting today, so let me lay this out for you:

Four years is all it took for Joe Biden and Washington Democrats to:

**[🔴 Bring on record inflation
🔴 Push a radical Marxist agenda onto American citizens
🔴 Give away our cities, neighborhoods, and jobs to illegals](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z98qf681jcsbs3q8bqbv992uln2pg3esk9bgc0s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clgm9o32clh2bs)**

President Trump and Senate Republicans haven't been in charge long enough to warm up the seats, yet we've already reversed years of damage done by Biden and the left. That tells me one thing: _**[Democrats are softer than cotton candy in the rain.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4bhm4o8akqe4r8hkpf0d9fcs0p6k1jk0i5l4ncg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clgm9o32clh2bs)**_

Friend, we have a true opportunity to secure a generational change in America, but Schumer and his cronies are already fundraising harder than ever before to crush us in the midterms. _**[I need to know whether or not I can count on you to help make sure the Democrats' dreams of crushing us don't become a reality.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj9pre3r448gikgdmu5g719te9slhori64ecv0vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clgm9o32clh2bs)**_

**[CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24oospgscl58oc4farii686m0tce2gmv8ah14po_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clgm9o32clh2bs)**

You didn't hang us out to dry in 2024, Friend, so I have all the faith in the world that I can count on you to come through for us again.

Thank you and God Bless,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zthv3ornfb8gb2tovigvtj04f7cegaii3jfi73no_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clgm9o32clh2bs)

subject: Missouri's insane government bloat (Part 2)
body:
Our legislature gets paid to do nothing. We can do better than what we've got.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.pbQd8Iokp_h--0nSE66Vu31FUYoIevLvAjldSDC4qOY?) for more
