clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | | May 6, 2025 | ---|---|---|--- | | | Senate Update: Fighting to Protect Marylanders and Our Constitution It has been a busy couple of weeks as Americans continue to reel from the damage of Trump's chaos and his lawbreaking spree. This Senate update is lengthy, but there is much to report on. Over the last few weeks, I've spent time with Maryland farmers who are weathering Trump's tariffs, federal workers targeted by the Trump-Musk illegal firings, and patriots who are raising their voices in response to Trump's attacks on the rule of law, the courts, and our democracy. In just over 100 days, Donald Trump has torn up our Constitution, torn down our economy, and torn apart our government. Trump's assault on our Constitution and due process also led me to visit El Salvador to check on the well-being of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and urge his release, after the Administration illegally abducted him from Maryland. I am not vouching for one man; I am vouching for his rights--and the rights of everyone who lives in America. If Trump can deny the rights of one individual, the threat extends to all of us. In fact, it has now been reported that the Administration has . And over the weekend, Trump even questioned whether he was bound by the Constitution. I continue to fight this lawbreaking president in the courts, in the Congress, and in our communities. As we face a clear and present danger to our democracy, our Constitution, and our country, every American has a duty to stand up and speak out. Fight in the Courts In courtrooms across the country, Americans are fighting to protect the rule of law from Donald Trump. The Administration is illegally firing government workers, freezing funding for programs that benefit all Americans, abusing emergency powers to create tariff chaos, and attacking bedrock rights in America, like free speech and due process. Rather than fighting the legal battles fairly in court, Trump is bullying law firms and universities, threatening judges, and flouting court orders. , we cannot let Trump get away with breaking the law, and we cannot let him dismantle the legal system. Here's the latest: Defending Our Constitution and the Case of Kilmar Abrego Garcia On April 16, I traveled to El Salvador to check on the well-being of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a resident of Prince George's County, who the Trump Administration illegally abducted and deported to a notorious megaprison--all without any due process. When Kilmar's wife Jennifer sued the Administration, they admitted to the judge that Kilmar's abduction was an ""--but they still refused to bring him home. U.S. District Court Judge Paula Xinis ordered the government to return Mr. Abrego Garcia to the United States, saying that the risk of harm to Kilmar in El Salvador's notorious CECOT prison "shocked the conscience." The Supreme Court agreed, 9-0, that the government must "facilitate" his return. But despite this ruling from the highest court in the land, Trump and his Administration have yet to comply--even when he readily acknowledges that he could do so. I met with Kilmar's family and promised them I would do what I could to fight for his due process rights. Then, I . First, I , where I learned that the Trump Administration had given no instruction to follow court orders and facilitate Abrego Garcia's return. Then, I , who revealed the extent of Trump's lawbreaking. In court, the Trump Administration has suggested that they cannot follow the Supreme Court's order to facilitate Kilmar's return--they say El Salvador won't give him back. But in our conversation, VP Ulloa clearly stated that El Salvador was detaining Mr. Abrego Garcia solely because the United States is paying them to do so. This Contrary to what they say, the Administration has the clear ability to facilitate Abrego Garcia's return--they just aren't doing it. And, indeed, last week, President Trump conceded that he could by picking up the phone and asking El Salvador's President Bukele. In my meeting with Vice President Ulloa, he and the Salvadoran government refused my request to arrange a meeting with Kilmar. So, the following day, I headed out to CECOT myself, accompanied by Chris Newman, one of the lawyers representing Kilmar's wife and mother. A mile and a half from the prison, we were who told us they were under orders to block us from going any further. When I returned to my hotel, I where I pointed out that the Government of El Salvador was violating international law by denying anyone the opportunity to communicate with Abrego Garcia. Not long thereafter, as I was preparing to fly back to Maryland, the Salvadoran government relented. They called to say they would . They brought Kilmar to my hotel, giving me the opportunity to confirm that he was alive and giving him his first chance to communicate with the outside world. We spoke about the trauma of his captivity, and I told him for the first time that his family, his sheet metal workers union, and countless Americans are fighting for his due process rights, and that the federal courts, including the Supreme Court, had ordered President Trump to facilitate his return. From the moment I announced my trip, the Trump Administration wanted to spin it into something else--and distract from the threat to constitutional rights this case presents. They claim that illegally abducting Kilmar Abrego Garcia is about fighting gang violence, and they're flooding social media with their propaganda. But they have not submitted such information in court. Federal District Court Judge Xinis, put it bluntly when she said that the Administration offered "no evidence linking Abrego Garcia to MS-13 or any terrorist activity." A with the need for due process and adherence to the judicial rulings made in this case. So my message to the Trump Administration is simple: . I am not vouching for the man, but for his rights. It is also dangerous for Trump to suggest that we cannot fight gang violence without violating constitutional rights in America. The truth is that I have spent two decades working to end transnational gang violence. I've probably been fighting MS-13 since long before Donald Trump had ever even heard of them. Twenty years ago, I helped establish an anti-gang task force in the DC/Maryland/Virginia area, and while I believe El Salvador's government is wrong to collude with Trump's illegal abduction scheme, we agree that we must work together to fight gang violence. I care about every victim of crime and the heartache their families feel. That's why we need an independent court system--strong enough to bring every criminal to justice, and strong enough to ensure due process rights. The rule of law protects us from criminals and tyrants alike, and the rule of law is what's at stake in Kilmar's abduction. This is about much more than one man. If Trump can strip away the Constitutional rights of one person, everyone is at risk. We are experiencing one of the darkest chapters in American history. Donald Trump is beginning by picking on the most vulnerable, like all bullies do, but he openly talks about one day sending American citizens to El Salvador's prisons too. We need to end it here. On Tuesday, April 22, Judge Xinis wrote that the Administration has continued to "obstruct discovery and evade compliance with this Court's orders." And on April 30, Judge Xinis denied the Trump Administration another extension to provide information on Kilmar Abrego Garcia and gave them a May 9 deadline. If Trump can ignore the courts, it's a short road to tyranny. We can't give an inch. It has been clear from the start that President Bukele and the Government of El Salvador have been conspiring in Trump's illegal scheme to trample on due process rights here in America. In fact, when I met with Kilmar, Bukele's henchmen sought to fool the world about his plight by attempting to stage our meeting right in front of the hotel pool. When we refused that, they placed prop drinks on our table--drinks we did not touch--to make it look like we were sipping margaritas. This demonstrates the lengths to which President Bukele will go to deceive people about his cash-for-collusion deal with Trump. As we demand that Trump comply with court orders, we should also make clear that El Salvador will pay a price so long as it is complicit in denying due process rights in America. That's why I so long as Bukele participates in this unconstitutional scheme. We are also looking for other ways to hold Trump and Bukele accountable. On Thursday, Senator Kaine and I teamed up to under a special Senate procedure to require the Trump Administration to answer for its violations of the Constitution and reveal the truth about the role that the Government of El Salvador is playing in this conspiracy to deprive people of their rights. Other Cases of Illegal Deportations Of course, there are many more legal battles underway right now. There are too many to note all of them, but here are a few recent rulings: On April 20, the Supreme Court temporarily blocked certain new mass deportations under the Alien Enemies Act, and for good reason: with every passing day, we learn of new, disturbing ways that Trump has broken the law while trying to deport people without a trial. In some cases, people were deported on the basis of having tattoos. On Thursday, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas ruled that Trump's use of the Alien Enemies Act to deport Venezuelans was "unlawful." In another case, on April 23, Judge Stephanie Gallagher--a Trump appointee--ordered the Trump Administration to return a 20-year-old Venezuelan man living in Maryland who was illegally deported to El Salvador. This man came to the United States as an unaccompanied child, and last year, the government entered a settlement in which they specifically agreed not to deport him and certain other individuals who arrived as children while their asylum applications were being considered. Then, on April 25, Judge Terry Doughty in Louisiana sounded the alarm that the Administration may have deported a 2-year-old U.S. citizen with "no meaningful process." It has been reported that two other U.S. citizen children, ages 4 and 7, were also deported the same day. A hearing has been scheduled, and I will monitor the situation closely and continue to defend the Constitution and due process. Trump's Attacks on the First Amendment at our Colleges and Universities Trump has launched a full-scale attack on the First Amendment at our colleges and universities. His Administration is freezing federal funds and abducting people off the street--to shut up those who disagree with the President on certain issues. Their goal is to silence those who challenge the Administration and end academic freedom. Secretary of State Marco Rubio hasn't been conducting a lot of foreign policy lately; instead, he's busy like Mahmoud Khalil, Rumesya Özturk, and Moshen Madhawi. The whole point of the First Amendment is that the government can't punish speech it dislikes. But that is what is happening in these cases. Last week, I called for the release of these and other students at a I also spoke about the Trump Administration's assault on the First Amendment this past week . In some of these cases, Rubio used a McCarthy-era law to claim that he could order the deportation of students because they threaten the foreign policy of the United States. The claim that these students are endangering the foreign policy of the most powerful country on earth is laughable, and it will be important that judges see it for what it is: a ruse to cover up the real reason for illegal detentions--their speech. In a positive step, Mohsen Madhawi was released from custody on bail, with the federal judge likening Trump's actions to the shameful era of the Red Scare and McCarthyism. As the judge said, "this is not the first time that the nation has seen chilling action by the government intended to shut down debate." As a senator, Marco Rubio used to call for the promotion of democracy, the rule of law, and freedom of speech around the world. Recently, Rubio and Vice President Vance even criticized some of our European allies for their restrictions on speech and political expression. Yet here at home, the Trump Administration has shamefully locked up students in detention centers because of their political expression. Trump isn't just going after individual students--he's going after universities themselves. The Administration is threatening colleges and universities across the country, including by freezing federal funds for lifesaving medical research, in order to take control of their hiring, research, and teaching practices. It is imperative that institutions do not cave in to the illegal political blackmail of the Trump Administration by cutting separate deals. Fortunately, we're seeing some momentum in the right direction. I salute all those standing up to Trump's attacks, and I especially commend the 150 institutions around the country--including The University of Maryland, College Park, University of Maryland, Baltimore, and UMBC--that signed onto a letter condemning Trump's interference. I hope every Maryland college and university joins the fight: the future of research, education, free speech, and democracy itself are on the line. This counter-offensive to protect the rule of law can work. Last Friday, under pressure from many different courts and restraining orders, the Trump Administration restored thousands of visas for international students that they had tried, illegally and arbitrarily, to terminate. But these restorations did not impact the illegal detention of students and denying them of their First Amendment rights. That fight continues. Other Court Fights These are just a few fronts in the battle against Trump's lawbreaking spree. There are many other cases underway; here's an update on some: On May 2, a judge blocked Trump's executive order to punish Perkins Coie, a law firm that represented clients Trump doesn't like. As the judge wrote, Trump's attempt to go after lawyers is blatant "unconstitutional retaliation and viewpoint discrimination," and I applaud every law firm that is standing up for their profession. History will remember who met this crisis with integrity--and who tried to . On April 29, a coalition of unions, nonprofits, and local governments filed a lawsuit alleging that DOGE's entire takeover of the government is unconstitutional. On April 25, a judge temporarily blocked the Administration from canceling the collective bargaining rights of unionized federal employees. On April 24, three different federal judges blocked Trump's Department of Education from withholding federal funding from schools that run diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives. Also on April 24, a court temporarily stopped Trump from defunding cities that don't assist his mass deportation campaign. On April 22, a judge ordered the Administration not to shut down Voice of America, a media outlet that provides fact-based news to people living under authoritarian regimes. On April 18, a court issued a preliminary injunction blocking DOGE from further accessing personal data at the Social Security Administration. And on April 30, an appeals court denied DOGE access to sensitive records at the Social Security Administration. In response, on Friday, the Trump Administration asked the Supreme Court to give DOGE access to this personal data. This appeal is just the latest example of the Trump Administration's desire to allow the unauthorized DOGE cronies to compromise your personal, confidential information. I continue to monitor, and, wherever and whenever possible, support these and many other cases. Fight in the Congress Trump's first 100 days have been a lawless disaster, and I'm ready to confront the reckless plans they have unveiled for the next 100 days. Fighting Trump's Illegal Tariff Chaos Donald Trump has flagrantly abused his so-called "emergency economic powers" to inflict tariff chaos on America. . These lawless actions have imposed a Trump-inflicted wound on our economy, which recently contracted for the first time in years as consumer confidence has plummeted. I have heard from small businesses across Maryland who are suffering from this tariff assault. Businesses of all sizes say they have had to ; some will be forced to close their doors. This past week, Senate Democrats forced a vote on a measure to end President Trump's abuse of the authority he is claiming to levy these across-the-board tariffs. The White House showed how determined they are to keep their failed policies in place when they dispatched Vice President Vance to , thereby leaving in place, for now, what amounts to a national sales tax. You can't make this stuff up: when Amazon Haul was reportedly planning to display the increased cost of the tariffs on the goods it sells, Trump . Trump obviously wants to hide the Trump Tax. We must not let him. Fighting Trump's Billionaire Tax Giveaway Front and center in the coming weeks is the Republicans' scheme to pass giant tax cuts for billionaires and mega corporations at the expense of everyone else. To help their rich friends, Trump and the Republicans want to blow up the national debt and slash Medicaid. It's reprehensible that some of the richest men in the world want to snatch health care away from families in order to further line their own pockets. We must stop them. The pieces of their terrible bill are snaking their way through the House, one committee at a time, and slithering toward passage. If this emerging monstrosity makes it out of the House of Representatives, I will do everything in my power to stop it in the Senate. This bill is the centerpiece of Trump's Great Betrayal. Trump promised he'd take care of the working class and forgotten Americans; instead, he's selling them out. For a while, Trump even pretended that he was going to raise taxes on the wealthy, but it didn't take long for his very rich buddies to . Now, the Republicans are full-steam ahead on their billionaire tax giveaway, and they're even talking about using a dishonest ploy to hide how much it will explode the national debt. We must blow the whistle on this fraud. . Eight years ago, Trump and Congressional Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, but we stopped them in the Senate--by just one vote. That victory happened because millions of Americans rose up. And the razor-thin margin of that vote is a reminder that we cannot rest; we must keep fighting back. The Upcoming Budget Battle Last week, the Trump Administration released their "skinny budget" for FY2026--a broad outline of their priorities for the coming fiscal year. I've long said that our budget is a statement of our values. And this budget makes clear what the Trump Administration values: not working Americans, not lowering costs for families struggling to get by, but instead giving more to big corporations and billionaires. With this budget proposal, the Trump Administration is doubling down on Elon Musk's DOGE cuts to services for the American people, taking a chainsaw to everything from access to health care, our children's education, scientific research for life-saving cures, and so much more. Their proposed budget will not only hurt Americans here at home, it will also make our nation less secure and diminish our standing abroad. I am ready to fight with everything I've got against the damage this budget would deal to the American people. Fight in Our Communities In recent weeks, we have continued to see Marylanders stand up and speak out from Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore. Marylanders have deep concerns with Trump's attacks on the rule of law, his illegal firings of federal workers, his slashing of vital services and programs, and the damage inflicted by his tariff sales tax. A few weeks ago, I and heard about their many pressing concerns. Maryland farmers often tell me that the government needs to get out of their way, but the Trump Administration is doing the opposite: disrupting Department of Agriculture programs that are used by many farmers and endangering their livelihoods with tariff chaos. I will work with our farmers to confront these harmful actions. Later that same day, I joined Representative McClain Delaney . We heard loud and clear from residents that they do not support what they see as Trump's Great Betrayal. They want to see him keep his promise to end wars and lower prices for families, which he said he would achieve on Day One. Instead, Trump and Elon Musk are focused on illegally firing federal workers and wreaking havoc throughout the government. Their actions have NOTHING to do with efficiency and EVERYTHING to do with hampering federal services that benefit all Americans--from the reliable delivery of earned Social Security benefits to cancer research to weather reports--to help finance tax cuts for billionaires. Last week, to say the same: we must protect our patriotic federal employees because they provide vital public services to all Americans. If you're a federal worker who has lost your job, or if you've otherwise been impacted by Trump's policies, we have Another one of Trump's targets is the NASA Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, which serves as the hub of NASA's science mission to explore the universe and better understand our own world. I recently toured Goddard with other members of federal Team Maryland and learned more about the consequences of Trump's attacks on NASA's science budget. Just one example: Trump wants to even though this project is on time, under budget, and nearly complete. Once deployed, the Roman telescope will dramatically expand our understanding of the universe by delivering incredible new images that will augment the vital information we have obtained from projects like the James Webb Space Telescope and Hubble. We can't let Trump flush those important public investments down the drain. The Trump/Musk chainsaw cuts will have a harmful impact on all of us, and on our communities. As just one more example, consider Trump's attacks on AmeriCorps, our country's leading organization for national service. By slashing $400 million in AmeriCorps grants and illegally firing their workforce, they will destroy 1,031 organizations and terminate 32,465 AmeriCorps members and senior volunteers around the country--and hurt everyone who receives their services, which range from responding to storms to coordinating afterschool programs. Communities are rallying to stop these cuts and their . We're In This Together As I said at the top, in just over 100 days, Donald Trump has torn up our Constitution, torn down our economy, and torn apart our government. But, with the help of tens of millions of Americans across our state and country, we are fighting back--in the courts, in the Congress, and in our communities. Courage is contagious; every day, we're seeing more and more patriots stand up for our Constitution and the country we love. We know our mission; we know our duty. I am honored to be joined by so many partners in this noble cause. Onwards, Chris Van Hollen |

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Habba’s cracking down
body:
Peter, In March, President Trump signed an Executive Order 1) enforcing citizenship requirements for federal elections, 2) supporting states who verify the eligibility of their voters, 3) improving the Election Assist
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, In March, President Trump [signed](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/1f1d538f7221119ef091f3603f8b8839/eJyNkEFvgzAMhf9LzqS0AbSJW1VVFaLrYdrOUwQeWKNOlBgYq_jvC13V0ybtaPv583u-CAbSxEUtcvHJX0olIhIOKrQIxDtDrKvrVGXpJtlEokP6ODjTW5Fffl2-C5Z2lj6qSPBkIUhenre7sjgd3o7FqQxKq1248T9O8pDeOfunbXEU8_wnGM7I-yGwvcjZ9bAkqjGk4lfXBX3LbH0ex-M4rsYWGVrTe1g1ZoitA491WEXdyRAdDflYrVUWr5PrENyA1EhNtbTOcGAuJbcgkRgahzxJ8y71GRxWmiR0cKMEY9paoPr21RKmH3vzN8uag5c=) an Executive Order 1) enforcing citizenship requirements for federal elections, 2) supporting states who verify the eligibility of their voters, 3) improving the Election Assistance Commission, 4) cracking down on election crimes, and 5) preventing other countries from interfering in our elections. It was a strong order. With teeth. What will New Jersey do? This time – shockingly – we aren’t fighting it, dodging it, or trying to get around it. Why? Two words – Alina Habba. The new, Trump-appointed U.S. Attorney for New Jersey is making _sure_ New Jersey does its part to support the order and crack down on election fraud at the state level. A week ago, she announced the establishment of an **Election Integrity Task Force.** Here are the two BIGGEST things it will do: ✅ Increased sharing of information between federal, state, and local governments to aid in the identification and removal of ineligible voters from New Jersey’s voter rolls
✅ A new priority on investigating and prosecuting election crimes A new era of toughness and transparency is here. Election manipulators and fraudsters, you’re on notice. BUT, cracking down on fraudsters takes time. And we have a primary election in **36 days.** So what can you do to make SURE your vote is heard and avoid election day shenanigans? Two more words. VOTE EARLY. Yep. Voting early lets us beat the Left at their own game and ensures last minute issues – or fraudulent shenanigans on Election Day – won’t be able to silence our votes. There are two ways to vote early.
1. **Early In-Person:** Tuesday, June 3, 2025 – Sunday, June 8, 2025; Tuesday-Saturday, 10:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m. and Sunday, 10:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m. No appointment is necessary. Details and locations [here](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/27f630fb700d7e4012e8d3c34c1bb980/eJyNkMGKwkAMht8l5-pgW1F6ExEpVQ_inmWwQUfHzDATi1X67ht1WS8u7C0kX77w5w6MpInLGgq48i1NM0gg4M54g8RTR6x3z2k6zAfZIAFr6DQP7uKhuH9c_gUe7WE-zhPg1qMgm_VkWpWr-XZRriohvQ5y43-ebPT2zJaTcgFd96cYz4ZnjbgjFBwu-EhUG0nFX8EKf2D2sVCKjv29a1RkzajQytw4iqpxjD3UwbY9KQ3t-_HAZyti7T1S_fOVCtuXvvsG2K9sCQ==).
2. **By Mail:** Mail your application by June 3 or drop it off in-person by June 9 at 3 p.m.; Get your application [here](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/b96fcbd01f04da10274015ca96038978/eJyNkEFvwjAMhf-LuZZGtIVNvSGEUFXggLbzFFprZKRJlJiWDvW_zzDEaZM42u_ze3q-AKGRhooacjjTd5KkEIHHSjmFhhbWkKxuajLNJukkAq3MceXtyUF--fP4AVzX0-x1FgH1Dhl5280XZbFdfayLbcmkk54znvNJX7KHz3IzL9YwDP8aY6No2bJ3gJz8Ca-NasWt6N1r5g9ELuRCdF0Xm6_407YikCQUqJlR1gTRWsLxvh83Uuk4HKjRI-mcVpW86RzCI5r6_qES-9-o4QcIenCS).

---
[ **I pledge to vote in the June 10th Primary!** ](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/be38c0eced94f0efb47f9872904659d1/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXxi8SbiIhoHqLOITrQku4u65iZ-N9bKzwVdJ153md4ZwZCXnHKGgjhTg_HccEAhTWTDDnFglNVv7aO79mubUDL-DVVYpAQzl_DG7COfS8IDKBJokaOhyjOszI9F1mZa1JWSt_4z-PuvM2T7KOsgGX5KcaOUXLT7h5CUgOujRqmW9FJtZq_EMk-tKxxHE3BscW-b7ET3KxFZ-m-lnZUUiJvPg_IcXqblidKVWPP)
---
If you want to see more Common Sense policies enacted across New Jersey instead of the disastrous nonsense we’re being subjected to, we have to kick the lemons out. And that starts in the Primary. If you miss the primary, you’ve missed most of the ballgame. So pledge to vote. And make a plan to vote EARLY. Let’s go! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/964957186d963da53a23d09111c52aee/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62q1rYjdiUgpVReia5lOgw5tM8M09Un_3fGBKwUhq-TkhJsbMJIgTguI4czXIAjBA4tSGYXEM00s5HMajKJhOPSgUlQmVrcG4tvX5Q_waI-iycADvhh0yGY9nWXpKtkt0lXmSCOsu_GfJxxHH898OU0X0HU_xVgrnh-du4GYbYuPRIVyqXhrK8cfmE0T-77Uda2pQVeyavO-tnv_IPJcND1phSwV7XuFPpHvnMIYpOL9kAwvL3N3B8K2afQ=)

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

MEHMED the Conqueror (1444-1481) the Ottoman ruler who toppled Byzantium, Suleiman the Magnificent (1520-1566) the Sultan of Turkey’s golden age, Selim the Grim (1512-1520) who captured the caliphate from the Egyptian Mamluks in 1517, and Mustafa Kemal Atatürk (1923-1938) who won Turkey’s War of Independence in 1921 and went on to secularise the country, are [...] |

subject: Who’s Running to Be Judge in Allegheny County?

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
In our previous edition we warned about the slippery slope we were in when it came to deportations.
Since, the Trump regime has wrongly detained dozens of U.S. citizens — including a ten-year-old Texas girl [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-citizen-child-recovering-brain-cancer-deported-mexico-undocumented-rcna196049] recovering from brain cancer, a 19-year-old U.S. citizen with learning disabilities who was [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/?fbclid=IwY2xjawJ2Qi9leHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFPbU5wOTFVREhWYktoNnc5AR7Fe9oVKjamHuG3WmhfyvfnCRNedF3MORvKe81-https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/] wrongfully incarcerated [https://popular.info/p/federal-immigration-authorities-wrongfully] for 10 days in a privately run immigration detention facility in Arizona or a 20-year-old born in Georgia [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-born-citizen-detained-ice-immigration-florida-rcna201800] , and arrested in Florida.
All mistakes, that cause fear in the American population. The deportation of Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, who, due to an “administrative error,” was sent to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador, does not help ease the fear.
The Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution [https://www.law.cornell.edu/wex/due_process] establish the right to due process — the Fifth Amendment says that “[n]o person shall ... be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.” The Fourteenth Amendment extends this obligation to the states.
No PERSON. This is true even for the undocumented, even if someone is here without authorization.
Due process for Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, should have included notice of deportation and the opportunity to contest it before it happened. Now even as the Supreme Court has ruled for his return, he has yet to be returned home
We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
Social Media of the Week
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202025-04-24%20110558.png] "I'll tell you what freedom is to me: no fear." – Nina Simone
Nina Simone was a classically trained pianist (not common for a young Black woman in the 1950s) who fused her foundation with jazz, gospel, blues, and folk to create a sound entirely her own, defying all genres.
She didn’t fit into a box or label, nor did she try to.
Simone was denied entry to a prestigious music school, the Curtis Institute of Music in Philadelphia, because of her race. This moment fueled her lifelong work in civil rights.
Her songs like “Mississippi Goddam” became an anthem for civil rights and Black empowerment nationally.
"An artist's duty is to reflect the times." – Nina Simone
#NinaSimone [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/ninasimone?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #BlackHistory [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/blackhistory?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #CivilRights [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/civilrights?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R]
SHARE ON FACEBOOK [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
Let's save our planet by saving our democracy.

Happy #EarthDay [https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/earthday/] from NPPEF - remember you have the choice to voice your vote for leaders and legislations that protect our only home, planet Earth.
SHARE ON INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7237344C447445787878394747342B75584E47375A57552F745265427662334B544A4A36505A58657A5871474B7A5A6E53705571424758325657365969365747/editor_images/WCM%20logo.JPG] #CourtsMatter
The U.S. Justice Department withdrew its lawsuit [https://triblive.com/news/pennsylvania/justice-department-drops-lawsuit-accusing-pennsylvania-city-of-diluting-power-of-hispanic-voters/] that accused the heavily Hispanic city of Hazleton in Pennsylvania of illegally diluting the political power of its growing Hispanic population. The department’s initial lawsuit, filed in January, said the “at-large” system of electing city council members, as opposed to electing them by district, was unfair to Hispanic voters and prevented them from getting elected to city council. Hazleton’s 30,000 residents are about two-thirds Hispanic, according to U.S. Census figures. One-third is non-Hispanic white.
Closer to Philadelphia, the largest health system in Delaware County began closing two hospitals [https://6abc.com/post/crozer-health-hospital-emergency-rooms-stop-accepting-patients/16228691/] Wednesday after a federal judge in Texas approved their bankruptcy proceedings. The emergency rooms of Taylor Hospital in Ridley Park and Crozer-Chester Medical Center in Upland are expected to close today, Friday, April 25th. Emergency medical services will end next Friday, on May 2. Crozer's ambulatory centers at Brinton Lakes, Broomall, Haverford, and Media are expected to remain open.
This November, voters will have the power to retain or vacate three seats of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
The votes cast by powerful Pennsylvania voters in November will impact our lives for years to come, as Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court will make decisions about our election administration, immigrant rights. access to abortion, the safety of our workplaces, how bankruptcies are handled, and the right to unionize. Make sure you can voice your vote!
CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/DelCo_2.png] We are hiring!
Let's provide civic education together!
We're looking for people passionate about voting rights in Erie, Lawrence, Lehigh Valley, Bucks, Montgomery, Chester, and Delaware County to help us shape the future of Pennsylvania.
Join our team and help us provide civic education in our communities and register folks to vote!
Positions start at $20 an hour.
Interested? Contact jobs@nppef.org
EMAIL US [jobs@nppef.org]
News You Can Use
State Rep. David Rowe (R-Union) wants to introduce a bill to make it easier for hunters and fishermen to get registered to vote [https://www.palegis.us/house/co-sponsorship/memo?memoID=46210] . He represents a lot of sportsmen in the rural 85th state House District, which includes parts of Union, Juniata, and Mifflin counties and all of Snyder County.
“The bill will not complicate the process of getting a license. The bill will not add another step to the hunting license process,” Rowe told Capital-Star [https://penncapital-star.com/government-politics/general-assembly/state-rep-david-rowe-wants-to-make-it-easier-for-sportsmen-to-register-to-vote/] . “Rather, it will simply make it more accessible. So, for sportsmen that are going to a state office, there will be paper registration forms available for them to simply grab.”
As a voting rights organization, we applaud all legislation that would make it easier for people to register to vote, and make our voices to be heard at the ballot box.
Meanwhile, Pennsylvania’s first two openly autistic legislators, State Reps. Jessica Behnam (D-Allegheny) and Abigail Sailsbury (D-Allegheny), condemned the comments made by the Department of Health Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., attacking autistic people [https://www.witf.org/2025/04/23/pa-lawmakers-some-on-the-autism-spectrum-denounce-rfk-jr-comments/] . They are also opposed to his plan to collect private medical records from US citizens to research autism. Remember that slippery slope regarding immigrant deportations?
And if you are waiting for a tax return but have defaulted student loans, there is a chance the government will garnish your return and even your wages. The Department of Education announced Monday it will restart collections on defaulted federal student loans on May 5 [https://thehill.com/homenews/education/5259465-education-department-defaulted-federal-student-loans-debt-collection-trump-mcmahon] , including potentially garnishing wages for millions of workers. The Treasury Offset Program allows the government to withhold federal payments such as tax returns for individuals in default. After a 30-day notice, the federal government could also begin garnishing a borrower’s wages. So make sure to check your statement.
NPPEF on the Ground
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/IMG_2941.jpg] Engaging the young
Regional Organizing Director, Daniel Levin providing civil education to students. Did you know that as long as a student is 18 years of age on or before the day of the next election - they can register to vote?
Many 17 year old students don't know this and might pass up the opportunity to register to vote, thinking they have to be 18 at time of registering.
It's our passion to bridge the gap here on civic education.
#YourVoiceYourPowerYourVote [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/yourvoiceyourpoweryourvote?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZUMQygtkxZAWe_o90AJM0cC0VjAXlJ-rbT6fE9ucNTrpJHemgLlRVUCqPnNZAw6Kfz8RmcfeGFf5svJw2gqUbbT7VJWgQU3OwY1FZk2y-Udf7JUM8Ji_X-C9F-QEt0Jlz0QoYYalvTffMiEWuDrtouxd1lju8yUMjOJKfBCjAqUIA&__tn__=*NK-R] #GoVotePA [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/govotepa?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZUMQygtkxZAWe_o90AJM0cC0VjAXlJ-rbT6fE9ucNTrpJHemgLlRVUCqPnNZAw6Kfz8RmcfeGFf5svJw2gqUbbT7VJWgQU3OwY1FZk2y-Udf7JUM8Ji_X-C9F-QEt0Jlz0QoYYalvTffMiEWuDrtouxd1lju8yUMjOJKfBCjAqUIA&__tn__=*NK-R] #StudentVoters [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/studentvoters?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZUMQygtkxZAWe_o90AJM0cC0VjAXlJ-rbT6fE9ucNTrpJHemgLlRVUCqPnNZAw6Kfz8RmcfeGFf5svJw2gqUbbT7VJWgQU3OwY1FZk2y-Udf7JUM8Ji_X-C9F-QEt0Jlz0QoYYalvTffMiEWuDrtouxd1lju8yUMjOJKfBCjAqUIA&__tn__=*NK-R]
GET REGISTERED ! [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
Chester County

Several students register to vote at a high school in Coatesville.
York County

subject: I just got off the phone with Trump
body:
The future of the MAGA Movement will hinge on one thing

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6qgqlmpoh049f5l5k3pc63p4ijua9opj333p3bo_)
---
|
---
_I just got off the phone with President Trump._
We discussed the greatest dangers that lie ahead for the MAGA Movement, and we’re BOTH in agreement:
The only way MAGA can emerge victorious is with _**[YOUR support](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znd7esr7vr65at8i2hrqgsmvceaseregianksu48_)**_ , right here, right now:

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlcea4ertdpntpvqvdh9k4qagc6b63krurnt05jo_)
|
---
Ever since President Trump retook the White House, Democrats have mustered a ferocious counterattack.
**>** AOC and Bernie Sanders are on a National MARCH, rallying MILLIONS of radical-leftists to their socialist cause.
**>** Trump-deranged judges are bogging down Trump at EVERY chance they can get.
**>** And worst of all - radical-left billionaires are shelling out MILLIONS to flip key MAGA races - and my name is at the TOP of their list.
**President Trump gave me clear orders - hold MAGA Country at ALL COSTS.**
Top Grassroots Supporters like yourself will make or break my campaign so I have to humbly ask, will you join President Trump and _**[support my race?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlsme728t0iiph6l55pi1g0kve4te05rbhenti8g_)**_

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgerc07hq83kq3u8mpokq3an372f94plkl7f1d18_)
|
---
I’m **ecstatic **to be President Trump’s pick for Florida’s next Governor. But the fight ahead will be the biggest challenge of my life, and I can’t do this alone.
_**[PLEASE. Can I count on you to chip in $20.25, $50, or $100 today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrpa98dc6ms7820v0vl1af3hptjph5lrkspo48m8_)**_

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zghom0e9nhrhttpch8seokc27lt1s7mflkqmo1l8_)
|
---
God bless you,
Byron Donalds

| **MARCELL STRBICH STEPS UP TO RUN FOR OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE IN THE GOP 2026 PRIMARY ON MAY 5, 2026!**

We have a grassroots, patriot, combat veteran who has stepped up to selflessly run for Ohio Secretary of State in 2026, Marcell Strbich. Many of you know Marcell. You've heard him on the radio with Bob Frantz, Jack Windsor, and Brian Thomas. You've seen him on video with Emerald Robinson and Steve Stern. You've seen him testify at the State Capital on election integrity legislation. He can and will do the job to secure Ohio's elections and clean up Ohio's registered voter rolls, which contrary to what you hear from our current Secretary of State, are a MESS. Many of you know Marcell and personally endorse him. For those of you who don't, once you get to know him we're confident he'll have your endorsement too!

**To learn more about Marcell Strbich, go[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=94e375181e&e=5c740fa3e2) or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fe926efe60&e=5c740fa3e2)**

**Here's a video of what we all need to do. HINT: It's titled "DONATE • DONATE • DONATE!" and you can do it[ HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=525dd05221&e=5c740fa3e2).**

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bb8a4129ff&e=5c740fa3e2 "Donate • Donate • Donate! Marcell Strbich for Ohio Secretary of State!")
---
DONATE • DONATE • DONATE! MARCELL STRBICH FOR OHIO SoS
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ** **

** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**

* * *

**A CONTINUING

CALL TO ACTION!**

* * *
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4b8e8698d5&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=87dfbd54b0&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7639932989&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!

Hi Peter,

As Her Bold Move gears up for what is proving to be a truly critical election year in states like Virginia, we are thrilled to announce our latest endorsement: **Kimberly Pope Adams who is running for Virginia's House of Delegates, District 82!**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107183284/543857781/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250506winner_N_CD_NO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyM2NlNjY3LTgyMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QkqBuNranvRdfO3SVwqte5STzu5eYNvYO9ca3p0KNnM=)

**_Virginia is the last and only safe haven for abortion access in the South_** , and **Kimberly is on track to unseat the strictly anti-choice incumbent Republican in her district.** As the current presidential administration has openly expressed its desire to roll back women’s rights, we will be looking to state governments to defend us – we need more pro-choice, pro-_women_ women in the rooms where those decisions are being made.

**In June of 2023, Kimberly won her competitive Primary election. In the General that fall, she fell 53 votes short of winning the seat. Now, she is set to have a rematch against the same ineffective and out-of-touch opponent she ran against last cycle.**

[**You can help make sure Kimberly Pope Adams has the support she needs to finally flip this seat and oust an anti-choice politician from Virginia’s legislature by rushing a split $20.25 or more contribution today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107183288/543857789/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250506winner_N_CD_NO_8_G_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyM2NlNjY3LTgyMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QkqBuNranvRdfO3SVwqte5STzu5eYNvYO9ca3p0KNnM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Kimberly Pope Adams:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107183290/543857802/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250506winner_N_CD_NO_8_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyM2NlNjY3LTgyMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QkqBuNranvRdfO3SVwqte5STzu5eYNvYO9ca3p0KNnM=)

**Here is what Kimberly had to say about choice:** _“As Delegate, I will vote for the constitutional amendment to protect a woman’s access to reproductive healthcare. Additionally, I will support paid time off, affordable childcare, and any additional relevant legislation presented in the General Assembly.”_

**Her opponent, Del. Kim Taylor, on the other hand, is vocally anti-choice.** Her family is affiliated with Crisis Pregnancy Centers, which are fake clinics aimed at misleading pregnant women about their healthcare options. She has also sponsored a bill that would apply **_criminal penalties_** to abortion services.

**This is critical because reproductive healthcare is on the ballot in Virginia this year.** A constitutional amendment to enshrine abortion access __for the only remaining access point in the South__ means we have to hold onto the *extremely slim* pro-choice majority in Virginia’s state government this fall. And here’s the thing, **Kimberly’s opponent has already voted NO on the amendment.** We need your help to unseat her.

[**After an incredibly narrow loss as a first-time candidate in 2023, this is our chance to finally get Kimberly Pope Adams over the finish line. You can make a real difference for the millions of women who depend on Virginia for full reproductive healthcare access by making a split contribution of $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107183300/543857828/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250506winner_N_CD_NO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyM2NlNjY3LTgyMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QkqBuNranvRdfO3SVwqte5STzu5eYNvYO9ca3p0KNnM=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

name: Secretary Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Mental Health in America: We Can’t Afford to Ignore It Anymore
body:
We say "mental health matters" -- but does it really? For the 1 in 5 Americans living with a mental health condition, slogans aren't enough.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..1zTRpC_rawFXVH_GU0VU8kE-coDfwgapBv_Tpk12loY?) for more
---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaWNrbXVycGh5cGEuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvbWVudGFsLWhlYWx0aC1pbi1hbWVyaWNhLXdlLWNhbnQ_.xSwdM71qckaM9EYivzC7aK3_WNTSyx2vR0PdH7MIBiI?)
---
# [Mental Health in America: We Can't Afford to Ignore It Anymore](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=162940942&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyOTQwOTQyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY1NDA0OTAsImV4cCI6MTc0OTEzMjQ5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ERCWQkoLTh6wVC5oJ4sysozO0RtsKSvi3agH8SCiix8)
### We say "mental health matters" -- but does it really? For the 1 in 5 Americans living with a mental health condition, slogans aren't enough.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| May 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/mental-health-in-america-we-cant?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As we recognize Mental Health Awareness Month, it's time to look beyond awareness and face a sobering reality: our mental health system is overwhelmed, underfunded, and failing the very people it claims to serve.
**The State of Mental Health in 2024**
* **1 in 5 adults** in the U.S. live with a mental illness.
* **More than 50%** of adults with a mental illness receive no treatment at all.
* Youth mental health is in crisis: **over 60% of young people with depression receive no care.**
* Suicide remains the **second-leading cause of death** for Americans aged 10-34.

And yet, despite growing demand, mental health care remains fragmented, confusing, and wildly inconsistent. Access often depends on your zip code, your insurance plan, or your ability to pay out of pocket. We'd never accept this for cancer or heart disease. Why do we accept it for depression, trauma, and anxiety?
**What 's Behind the Breakdown?** Our current system wasn't built to meet the moment. Here are just a few ways it's falling short:
* **Workforce shortage:** There aren't enough qualified mental health providers to meet demand. Rural areas are hit hardest.
* **Outdated reimbursement models:** Providers aren't consistently paid for evidence-based care, making it harder to prioritize quality over quantity.
* **Inequity:** Marginalized communities continue to face the steepest barriers to access and the greatest stigma.
* **Fragmentation:** There is no national framework for what high-quality mental health care should look like. It varies wildly across settings.

* * *
**Why This Should Matter to YOU:** Mental health is a social justice issue. It intersects with every major policy arena:
* **Education:** Kids can't learn if they're not well. Yet school counselors are stretched impossibly thin.
* **Criminal justice:** Nearly half of those in jails and prisons live with a mental health condition.
* **Workforce development:** Untreated mental illness is a leading driver of unemployment and underemployment.
* **Economic policy:** The U.S. loses over **$280 billion** in productivity each year due to untreated mental health conditions.

If we care about building an equitable, thriving society, we have to start treating mental health as core part of healthcare--not an add-on.
**The Power --and Gap--of Evidence-Based Treatment:** Before diving in, it's important to acknowledge the foundational work of Patrick J. Kennedy, lead sponsor of the Mental Health Parity and Addiction Equity Act (which I was an original co-sponsor). Patrick helped pave the way to ensure that mental health is treated on equal footing with physical health. His leadership laid the groundwork for today's continued push toward quality and accountability.
We know what works. Decades of research show that evidence-based treatments--like Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT), and certain medications--can dramatically improve outcomes for people with mental health conditions.
**But here 's the problem:** most patients don't receive them.
* Studies show that fewer than 20% of people in therapy receive a treatment that is considered evidence-based.
* In "usual care" settings, only 1 in 3 patients experience meaningful symptom reduction.
* When patients _do_ receive evidence-based treatment, remission rates improve significantly--sometimes up to double the usual care outcomes.

This gap isn't about science. It's about access, training, and accountability. Without standardized expectations or incentives, even well-meaning providers may fall back on outdated or unproven approaches.
If we want real results, we need to fund, prioritize, and scale the treatments we already know work.
I had the privilege of serving as an original board member of Psych Hub, a mental health education and connection platform co-founded by Patrick J. Kennedy and Marjorie Morrison. When I interviewed Marjorie for this article, she said:
> "We've built an entire mental health system around access--but not around quality. Until we hold ourselves accountable for outcomes, we'll keep spending more to achieve less. **Evidence-based care isn 't a luxury--it's the minimum standard people deserve**."
* * *
**So What Can Be Done?** This Mental Health Awareness Month, let's move beyond slogans. Here's where we can start:
* **Expand access** to care through telehealth and community-based models.
* **Invest in the workforce** : Loan forgiveness, better pay, and career pipelines for providers.
* **Prioritize prevention** : Mental health starts in schools, families, workplaces, and communities.
* **Hold systems accountable** : Demand quality and transparency in care delivery, just like we do in physical health.

Thanks for reading The Secretary's SitRep. This post is public, so feel free to share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=162940942&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyOTQwOTQyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY1NDA0OTAsImV4cCI6MTc0OTEzMjQ5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ERCWQkoLTh6wVC5oJ4sysozO0RtsKSvi3agH8SCiix8)
**My brother and sister veterans are disproportionately dying by suicide**
I'm chair of the Face the Fight Initiative, a $80+million private sector led initiative because 120K veterans have died by suicide since 9/11/01 - 10X of those who died by combat. Every day there are 17 veterans dying by suicide:
* **7 per day** were receiving VA care
* **10.6 per day** were not

Yet even inside the VA--an institution that calls suicide prevention its "[top clinical priority](https://substack.com/redirect/9314af78-9d6e-4e6e-b2b6-48c84e0db0dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"--only **55% of veterans received required suicide risk screenings in 2023**. That's not a policy failure. That's a moral one.
There are glimmers of hope buried in the[ 2024 ](https://substack.com/redirect/db14a938-a662-4312-b1cb-f490d58631e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Veteran Suicide Prevention Annual Report](https://substack.com/redirect/db14a938-a662-4312-b1cb-f490d58631e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[:](https://substack.com/redirect/db14a938-a662-4312-b1cb-f490d58631e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Female Veterans saw a **24.1% decrease** in suicide rates from 2021 to 2022
* Suicide rates dropped **3.8% among Veterans ages 18 -34**
* Veterans with VA care and a PTSD diagnosis had a **31.6% reduction** in suicide over two decades
* Veterans who contacted the **Veterans Crisis Line** had a **22.5% lower suicide rate** in the following month compared to 2019

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c295c7c5-902d-4f24-aec2-f8f9afee76ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
via Face The Fight
The lesson is clear: when veterans receive **proactive, compassionate, consistent care** , lives are saved. I served with people whose strength could silence a room. I'd run through a wall for them - but I've seen too many of them come home and fight a quieter, deadlier battle: the one inside themselves.
* * *
**It 's not just veterans or someone "over there."** It's your coworker. Your cousin. Your legislator.
When Senator John Fetterman checked into Walter Reed in early 2023 for depression, he did something a lot of public figures are too scared to do--he said: _I need help._ That moment mattered. But what's followed has been harder to watch.
A _[New York Magazine](https://substack.com/redirect/9c5a14a0-b1c9-4c9d-a9d3-6b395f9cba85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _piece last week featured staff members express concerns. Behind the scenes, his staffers worried aloud about erratic behavior, isolation, and whether he was taking the medications he needed. One aide even wrote a desperate 1,600-word email to his doctors: "I think John is on a bad trajectory... if things don't change, he won't be with us much longer."
**The average American child is more likely to experience a mental health disorder than make it through high school without one**. And still, we treat therapy like a luxury instead of as a priority.
If you're wondering how we got here, read _[The Anxious Generation](https://substack.com/redirect/cc45e622-3257-465d-b447-9a5695a4a16c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/cc45e622-3257-465d-b447-9a5695a4a16c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)by Jonathan Haidt. He lays out how the rise of smartphones and social media is directly correlated with spikes in anxiety, self-harm, and depression in teens--especially girls. As a #GirlDad, this is chilling.
### **Mental Health at the Movies**
Even Hollywood is catching on. The #1 movie at the box office this past weekend, Marvel's _Thunderbolts*_ , slipped in a powerful message like a Trojan Horse--superheroes aren't immune to the void within themselves.
**Political Call to Action:** We need lawmakers who treat mental health care as essential--not optional. When you vote, ask your candidates:
* Do they support expanding mental health parity enforcement?
* Will they fight for increased federal funding for school- and community-based services?
* Are they willing to **modernize Medicaid and Medicare to reimburse evidence-based care?**

Call your representatives. Support candidates who understand that mental health policy _is_ health policy. Silence is no longer an option.
**Final Word:** Mental health isn't one thing. It's everything. It's our capacity to work, love, create, grieve, adapt, and care. The stakes are life and death. The time is now.
Let's stop whispering about mental health in America--and start building the systems people deserve. Let's see if HHS Secretary Robery Kennedy Jr. and CMS Administrator Dr. Oz will meet the moment to modernize Medicare and Medicaid - that would truly 'Make America Healthy Again.'
-Patrick
* * *
_If this resonates with you, share it. Forward it. Talk about it. And most of all, act on it. Because a just society starts with caring for the minds and hearts of the people in it._
If you or someone you know is struggling, don't wait for it to get worse.
* * *
#### **📞 National Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (24/7):**
Anyone. Anywhere. Any time. No matter what you're facing.
📞 Dial **988
** 💻[ 988lifeline.org](https://substack.com/redirect/f00186b6-3903-42ac-9f54-d90c897675c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you or someone you know is in crisis, **help is available right now**.
#### **🇺 🇸 Veterans Crisis Line (24/7):**
You **do not** have to be enrolled in VA benefits to receive support.
📞 Dial **988** , then **Press 1
** 💬 Text **838255
** 💻[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/a0027384-92fd-41c2-b2f3-62cbb371c150?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[VeteransCrisisLine.net](https://substack.com/redirect/3ce61f82-7199-4781-ac2a-aba11c0e8aa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
#### **🏳 ️🌈 The Trevor Project - For LGBTQ+ Youth (24/7):**
Confidential, free crisis support from counselors trained to understand LGBTQ+ experiences.
📞 Call **1-866-488-7386
** 💬 Text **START** to **678-678
** 💻[ thetrevorproject.org](https://substack.com/redirect/65556dd9-3dfe-4423-b2af-fc3ddc508b5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary?!

I really need you to see this.

Friend,
---
Something deeply troubling is happening in our country.
---
Judges are inciting legal warfare against our Republic...
---
...A rogue judge issued a restraining order against Elon Musk to shut down the Department of Government Efficiency.
---
...A rogue judge wants the Trump Administration to get individual warrants for EACH illegal alien that the Administration deports!
---
**_And now, the fate of my freedom – and frankly, my _life_ – is in the hands of a judge appointed by Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary, Janet Napolitano._**
---
_This is the same Homeland Security Secretary who issued a report to crack down on “rightwing extremists” in America._
---
Those so-called rightwing “extremists” are you and me: _people who believe in freedom, individual rights, true justice, and limited government._
---
**And now I’m being put on trial in a sham state case where President Trump has NO AUTHORITY to pardon me.**
---
_When I hear the Left call us “rightwing extremists,” I’m reminded of the time Democrats arrested me in one of the most violent jails in America and called me_ **_P01135780_**.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9c0c62cb9a2f4457bf21327d0abb95cf&_e=sPqXh1oq5nk0VC01v8Fn-I9cG7zdh8YwP1S7eXBma9K6uyelLkpFXA6SayxRYc4vObsngFokB8AmZdzpA3ek6YX-N0h2Kt0TwzO4KdKwdA2XUNqiYw3DRKmh_vSTkSAXX3rt5wyq7-CcI_ikBoz4bveqcd_q2mrBrvS05SQu_BvPRKrCjdBD01rnuIFUTquQ_xlyancmx8Pd-xcjn0cwg2KVLjTjY8GiyjYsMeEnjuVChaGrn3qTMrVa0psRTbR2NqdQeVPWCV9U1obQsyxrZKcVh0lhXK61i0SUi26b5izqU4ppT63gG8VY29i2t3IzZFCU9vjegv2i7C8OqrQ-s_3JGRyl0b_ORkoirWiZfChmmhBr5OZ12LH3xVpB7o-u)
__
---
_The “P” in my mugshot number is supposed to stand for “prisoner.” But to me, it stands for**PATRIOT!**_
---
_The Left sees all of us freedom-minded individuals as prisoners, deplorables, and extremists. But we’re one thing and one thing alone – _PATRIOTS_._
---
**And as a red-blooded patriot, I will fight for my rights, I will fight for my justice, and I will fight for my LIFE so that I do not spend my 100th birthday in a prison cell as an innocent man.**
---
But to WIN against the cabal of rogue judges that want to treat us like political prisoners for simply believing that we have a God-given right to life and liberty, I’m going to need your support funding my Legal Defense Trust – which truly stands as my last remaining hope.
---
**_But if you cannot afford to, please just stop reading here and go about your day. I mean it!_**
---

name: MTG
subject: I’m sick and tired of this
body:
at do-nothing Republicans
| | | | Friend,
_If you’re sick and tired of_** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws..._**
_If you’re sick and tired of_** _RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins..._**
_If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help_** _politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC..._**
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
---
[STAND WITH MTG](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxUks-umzwUxJ_G7IjMMf--BYvvhiZSK1V32XRjOfYxcS821DZB5OkrCE3b7ZnRzM8jCzv2Ri8Nqd4IwM2oQAAI-58AnOvLUmr18_yWXr6xFNuv9LGKcNydd3h5nRT-43JkX44fYcDH6Z2Nn-7Zyx2XEV_evfKAVph-vVZtopq60kLpBJusyssip4xlya1RmsGVCl2pupQlKxRkWtNCw_W_khZaJKYBCgUtaJnllBVwEHUtFNPqikwoXdUkp1vRofOIDnM5uM5jCAc52KRvbjGOYeM6ETgFlJPHw2ycR7U6CJys8D8GbzB9BqR68OnvkFWOHVeD41bMcuBuktx2aZg5Wr6TFYSd_BrsjesIa6OfkEA5RcstKjNZwtp9i-0YhslLJKx1suf7WLskhR2F6Rxh7fPR6V4vovmboccp8FUKUTg1m3jjW8MfpD1vcBFdfHalMX-w5fwOy3cCJXe9USvtv8fth7B26fLp_DlrE9-ocTZ9b0JZkZx229TrtPcGfgUAAP__IqDDRg)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans.... and punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC:**
**_When MTG is upset, the base is upset._**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country, and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this, but let me be clear: I don’t care.
I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, or $50 at a time from patriots across this country who are sick and tired of the status quo](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckk-P2yAUxD8NvjmyH_5DDz50QxOplapKPbQ5IRYeDl2DvYATJZ--suOmVa9vRvMbRkg3DdbcOtK-EICz1ZEAEPqRABzZ6dYY_X58yU8_aY78a3FfRNhvzgs8vV7J8Hba0y_7tzji_fCNTp8u5dOdbhM-vRtyh07aYbm2PNMda43UJsOubKumrgpKy-zctUya8kPZNK1hAEyrmr6aumISoGKmkJntoIC6qIumrApaw04yJjU1-hWp1KZlpCpW0K4PiB4rNfo-YIw7Nbps6M4pTXHtdSBwiKjmgLur9QH14iBwcDL8GoPF_BGQmzHkf0IWOfVCj144eVWj8LMSrs_jVaATW7Oa0ENYgoP1PaE8hRkJNHNywqG2syOUb1usxzjOQSGh3KtBbGNtkpJukrb3hPLHo_MNL5P9t8OAcxSLFJP0-mrTWayEv5W2vNEn9OnByk_v96n5wb8zINAIP1hNKP_vuP4Qym99NR8_lzwLnZ6udhhsbFpSFf069TLtpYPfAQAA___kr8JF)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here. I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckk-PmzAUxD-NuYHAjz_eA4fuskTqqqve2pwsBz-IG2xT24RmP30FoWnV65vR_MYjCz2Nqr_VpHomlJ6V9IRSAp8IpQd2vJW9_Hl4jo_fIcbmPf1YRfqyO6_04TWdcJfjC7y9XLzFj_YrTK_X7OEOtwkf3h2ZoBZqXK9VE8maVb2QfYR1VuVlkacAWXSuC4A-z5hg7JSJFGVeZU8Me_Z0KmlRslOkaprSIi3SMstTKGgiGBMSenlCELKvGMnTDZQMDtFg3lkzOPQ-6ayOxvocwuS3Xi2hrcdudpgsyjiUq4PQVgv3wzqF8T0g7q2L_4Sschi4tIZrsXSWm7njeoj9wlHzvVlBoHVrsFNmINAENyOh5Rw01yjVrAk0-xbb0dvZdUigMd3I97F2qRN6EmowBJr7o-MdL4L6t8OIs-er5IMwclHhzDfC30p7njUBTbiz4rdfl0G_f9NfXgktuRmVJND8d9x-CDS3IZ8Pn7MmcrWcFjWOypcVydNhm3qd9lrT3wEAAP__H2bDEw)_.**
With urgency,

**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckk-PmzAUxD-NuYHMM__2wGETSqpWqnrb5mS59oO4wYbaJij76SsITau9vhnNbzyyMNOgu3tNygMBuGjlCQBhrwTgVJ3vRad-nw7x-QeLsflG31cRjrvzBk-vlcJdz0f29Xj1I76339n06ZY-3eE-4dO7IxM0Qg_rtWwiVVdlJ1QXYZ2WWZFnlLE0utS5pKIsUvVCMwAGmGdQFlChyPGF0QIiXQOFnOa0SDPKckhEVQnFOvUTmVBdWZGMbqCkd4gWMzna3qH3iRxNNNSXECa_9WoJtB7l7DBZtHWoVgeB1gj3a3Qa40dA3I0u_huyyqHnarTciEWO3M6Smz72C0fD92Y5Ya1bg522PWFNcDMSKOZguEGlZ0NYs2-xHf04O4mENVYOfB9rl6Qwk9C9Jax5PDre8SLo_zsMOHu-Sj4IqxYdLnwj_Ku05402oA0PVvz5zbwd1OtJXgkU3A5aEdZ8OG4_hDX3PptPX9ImcrWaFj0M2hclyWi_Tb1Oe6vhTwAAAP__4gLB3Q)
****

name: Mark Kelly
subject: People who deserved parades
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Trump wants to co-opt the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States Army so he can have a big military parade for his birthday.
#

Trump wants to co-opt the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States Army so he can have a big military parade for his birthday.
Yes, I know. It’s as ridiculous as it sounds.
But a big parade isn’t a bad thing. A lot of Americans really deserved them.
People like the Apollo 11 astronauts, after they landed on the moon:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250506-1-500&t=1&akid=6061%2E6688874%2EKN5PpR)
Or the heroes who liberated Paris from the Nazis in 1944:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250506-1-500&t=2&akid=6061%2E6688874%2EKN5PpR)
Or the victorious Americans coming home after Operation Desert Storm:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250506-1-500&t=3&akid=6061%2E6688874%2EKN5PpR)
Look, I’m not opposed to a parade. What I am absolutely, completely opposed to is somebody like Donald Trump making the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army about him. I do not support giving that guy a birthday parade while he destroys the democratic institutions that generations of Americans fought and died for, and works to slash the care and benefits veterans receive through the VA.
**You’ve got to earn that kind of honor, and Trump has not.**
I served our country for 25 years. I deployed all over the world, flew 39 combat missions, and made more than 375 successful carrier landings. And I mean this: If there is anything I can do to prevent Donald Trump from making a mockery of the finest fighting men and women on the face of the earth, I’m going to do it.
If you’re with me, please: [**Chip in and help me continue fighting back against Trump as he attacks our democracy. I need a big team with me, and I wouldn’t ask if this was not important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250506-1-500&t=4&akid=6061%2E6688874%2EKN5PpR)
