Vice President JD Vance put the media on blast during a jaw-dropping, surprise monologue in the middle of a White House cabinet meeting.
**[This needed to be said...](https://substack.com/redirect/36a7e6d3-eb3d-4443-84f0-d3490a7a7ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/36a7e6d3-eb3d-4443-84f0-d3490a7a7ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/36a7e6d3-eb3d-4443-84f0-d3490a7a7ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The most underreported fact of the first 100 days is we came in with a massive recruitment shortfall, and in 100 days of President Trump and Sec. Hegseth's leadership we now have people breaking down the doors to join our military," Vance stated. "To the media assembled here, it's a really interesting question; why is that happening?!"
"Why did we go from as military where people didn't want to serve to now they do want to serve?!" Vance continued to scold the reporters in the room. "That's a story you guys should cover, but compared to that, how much time have you instead focussed on the fact that we deported an MS-13 gang member with a valid deportation order?!!"
Watch Vance explode at the woke media and tell them what they needed to hear:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/36a7e6d3-eb3d-4443-84f0-d3490a7a7ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Antifa thugs take over building at University of Washington
The University of Washington (UW) Jewish Alumni organization reported that masked, black-clad Antifa personnel took over the university's new engineering building, Monday.
The group vandalized property and **[ignited a dumpster fire](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6a2591-e35c-467f-ac56-2fa41237e467?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , according to independent journalist who posted video of the incident on X.
Seattle Police along with campus police ordered the agitators to disperse but were met with physical resistance. One **[video posted by Cam Higby](https://substack.com/redirect/971eee2c-cfcc-44ed-b2ee-f1d1bbbdc15f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** showed police being pushed back by the Antifa thugs on campus.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4f3f2c86-ccdf-4fac-9a8e-ff8821f1b97e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Further video shared on X shows the Antifa activists **[stacking furniture to block the building's entrance](https://substack.com/redirect/be64f460-14c8-4c10-843c-7914473f96dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. The group also hung a banner attempting to rename the building after a man killed in an airstrike last year. At least one person was seen holding a Palestinian flag.

## _PolitiBrawl Protest Coverage_
# DOGE confronts "Hands Off" protesters in Washington D.C.
**By Matt Miller**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3a85c763-5cfc-46e4-b4f4-46c68c7b31b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/21569fa3-3ffd-441e-b794-7b8fbc30bbe4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I went to the Hands Off protests this past weekend to question protesters and engage in debate on whether DOGE is a force for good and does our federal government desperately need to be trimmed of waste, fraud and abuse (yes it absolutely does).
A large number of those I found proactively and proudly offer up the fact that they currently or at one time worked for the government in departments including USAID and the Department of Education.
They are blindly furious that a businessman, someone not of their world, from the "private sector" would dare lay his hands on their precious bureaucratic monstrosity. I'm not calling them "blindly furious" for hyperbole, watch the video and see for yourself.
And yes, I did go dressed in **[my signature DOGE Officer uniform](https://substack.com/redirect/163424c1-1eba-40bc-b323-b6244da9e640?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and that may have had something to do with the venom I received...
[Read Full Piece](https://substack.com/redirect/e10bbc31-4ed1-47b6-8acd-dab6ad3cfc14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

May 6 | | | | | | | | | | | Vice President JD Vance put the media on blast during a jaw-dropping, surprise monologue in the middle of a White House cabinet meeting. "The most underreported fact of the first 100 days is we came in with a massive recruitment shortfall, and in 100 days of President Trump and Sec. Hegseth's leadership we now have people breaking down the doors to join our military," Vance stated. "To the media assembled here, it's a really interesting question; why is that happening?!" "Why did we go from as military where people didn't want to serve to now they do want to serve?!" Vance continued to scold the reporters in the room. "That's a story you guys should cover, but compared to that, how much time have you instead focussed on the fact that we deported an MS-13 gang member with a valid deportation order?!!" Watch Vance explode at the woke media and tell them what they needed to hear: Apple 's Starlink Update Sparks Huge Earning Opportunity | | ---|---|--- Apple just secretly added Starlink satellite support to iPhones through iOS 18.3. One of the biggest potential winners? Mode's EarnPhone already reaches +45M users that have earned over $325M, and that's before global satellite coverage. With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can now reach billions more in unbanked and rural populations worldwide. Their global expansion is perfectly timed, and you still have a chance to Mode's recent 32,481% revenue growth and their newly reserved Nasdaq ticker $MODE puts them one step closer to a potential IPO. Antifa thugs take over building at University of Washington The University of Washington (UW) Jewish Alumni organization reported that masked, black-clad Antifa personnel took over the university's new engineering building, Monday. The group vandalized property and , according to independent journalist who posted video of the incident on X. Seattle Police along with campus police ordered the agitators to disperse but were met with physical resistance. One showed police being pushed back by the Antifa thugs on campus. Further video shared on X shows the Antifa activists . The group also hung a banner attempting to rename the building after a man killed in an airstrike last year. At least one person was seen holding a Palestinian flag. | | POLL How is JD Vance doing as Vice President? | ? ? ? ? ? PolitiBrawl Protest Coverage DOGE confronts "Hands Off" protesters in Washington D.C. By Matt Miller I went to the Hands Off protests this past weekend to question protesters and engage in debate on whether DOGE is a force for good and does our federal government desperately need to be trimmed of waste, fraud and abuse (yes it absolutely does). A large number of those I found proactively and proudly offer up the fact that they currently or at one time worked for the government in departments including USAID and the Department of Education. They are blindly furious that a businessman, someone not of their world, from the "private sector" would dare lay his hands on their precious bureaucratic monstrosity. I'm not calling them "blindly furious" for hyperbole, watch the video and see for yourself. And yes, I did go dressed in and that may have had something to do with the venom I received... name: Tim
subject: Trump: "I don't know" if I have to follow the Constitution
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
This weekend, Donald Trump was asked whether every American is entitled to due process—the basic constitutional right to a fair trial.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107186530/543867938/-112354301?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGE4YTJlNy04NjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h6wK_JxFUES8OQUf_c6x8z4qPu7iXzEjTq5sYtoptaI=)
---
**“Trump is acting like its his choice whether he obeys the Constitution”** \- _CNN_
Peter,
This weekend, Donald Trump was asked whether every American is entitled to due process—the basic constitutional right to a fair trial. His answer?
“I don’t know.”
Then he was asked if, as president, he’s required to uphold the Constitution. Once again, he responded:
“I don’t know.”
Let me be clear: This is not how our democracy works. As a 24-year veteran of our military and the Governor of Minnesota, I took an oath to defend the Constitution—and I meant it. I believe in the rule of law, checks and balances, and serving the people instead of trampling their rights.
[**Peter, we need your help to fight back. clean_body: This weekend, Donald Trump was asked whether every American is entitled to due process—the basic constitutional right to a fair trial. | = “Trump is acting like its his choice whether he obeys the Constitution” \- CNN Peter, This weekend, Donald Trump was asked whether every American is entitled to due process—the basic constitutional right to a fair trial. His answer? “I don’t know.” Then he was asked if, as president, he’s required to uphold the Constitution. Once again, he responded: “I don’t know.” Let me be clear: This is not how our democracy works. As a 24-year veteran of our military and the Governor of Minnesota, I took an oath to defend the Constitution—and I meant it. If every supporter reading this donated $3 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪 But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC. name: Frank Wojtash: Political Director - Rob for PA
subject: Rob's NEPA Rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
TRUST Act, Parades & More! 🚦

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b95a436fe5c5/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Rob had a busy week in Washington but was able to come back to the district this weekend. He made several votes and introduced legislation like the TRUST Act, which would ban members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks. Rob believes in service to the public, not politicians’ portfolios. Rob will be back this weekend, and we hope to see you!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob loves coming back to PA-08 on the weekend. We were able to make it to several community events and were happy to see everybody! The rain held off (for the most part) during the West Pittston Cherry Blossom Parade, a staple of NEPA which began 54 years ago. We’re excited to attend as many community events that bring us all closer together.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=35e2ae179e&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Shawnee Guns & Ammo, in Plymouth. Be sure to support your local gun shops!
---
|
---
|
The Democrats are already coming after our Congressman for 2026! They’re gearing up to lie and slander Rob, and we need your help to put our side of the story out there. If you are able, please donate to our campaign to keep NEPA out of the grasp of the far-left.
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!
---
| [Click Here to Donate ](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=084fc326c6&e=131e83a3c2)
---
| Best Regards,Frank WojtashPolitical Director
---

name: Andie Levien (via Democrats.org)
subject: We took Trump to court.
body:
---
Derek, You might remember that Democrats recently sued Trump over his illegal executive order, which had attempted to suppress voters, upend voter registration systems, hand over sensitive information to DOGE, stop states from counting eligible mail ballots, and withhold federal election funding from dozens of states in the process. **Well, we recently had an important update in this case. A U.S. District Court judge blocked key parts of Trump’s order, an important step forward in the fight to protect our democracy.** Without this decision, Americans across the country — including married women who changed their last name — could have faced significant roadblocks in registering to vote. But Democrats fought back, and with your support, we’ll do it again. We’ll keep using every tool at our disposal — including taking Trump to court — to defend the right to vote. [**Going up against Trump and the richest man in the world is not easy — but Democrats are committed to keeping up the fight. If work like this is important to you, I hope you’ll consider chipping in a few dollars to help fund it.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250506_3344_fr&refcode2=3357_22930333_HHSrRy&akid=3357%2E22930333%2EHHSrRy) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250506_3344_fr&refcode2=3357_22930333_HHSrRy&akid=3357%2E22930333%2EHHSrRy)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250506_3344_fr&refcode2=3357_22930333_HHSrRy&akid=3357%2E22930333%2EHHSrRy)**
---
****
Thank you for everything you’re doing,
Andie
Andrea Levien
General Counsel
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Jordan Wood
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T987f22c5-3b6b-4733-a137-b7ab80d00455/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2425c1c-f3c6-4d6d-86fc-35421207de9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m Jordan Wood, the Democrat running for U.S. Senate to defeat Republican Susan Collins. If we flip this seat, we will stop MAGA-enabler Susan Collins from handing Trump the reins of our Democracy. [I KNOW we can get this done, but it’s going to take a huge surge of grassroots support in my early days to show extremist Republicans that we have what it takes to finally defeat Susan Collins. I’m humbly asking, will you split a $50, $25, or even $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action before midnight to become one of my campaign’s supporters? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta905906f-a7cc-4411-be0f-808fb9fc385f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, let me introduce myself. I was born and raised in Lewiston, Maine. My dad was a pastor and my mom was a teacher – those values of faith and service are why I dedicated my career to defending our Democracy: I’ve fought to get corporate money out of politics, hold CEOs accountable, and defeat election deniers. But after my husband and I moved back to my home state to build our family, I realized that was not enough. It’s not enough to worry that my daughter would grow up in an America that’s no longer a free and fair Democracy. It’s not enough to panic about my parents and husband losing their Social Security, healthcare, and fundamental rights. It’s not enough to be outraged that my own U.S. Senator, Susan Collins, voted to ACQUIT Donald Trump the first time he was impeached – claiming he’d “learned his lesson.” So, I decided to do something with my anger and outrage – and I’m running for office to defeat her. [But I can’t do it alone. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to defeat Susan Collins and fight for an America that future generations can be proud of. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to chip in right now and become a supporter of my campaign. Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to take back our government from Susan Collins, Donald Trump, and Elon Musk. If you’re ready to get off the sidelines and join this fight with me, can I count on you to split a $50, $25, or even $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action before midnight to boost my campaign? I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m relying on grassroots donors (like you) to keep my campaign running. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T390194c0-8d5c-47df-abff-0d6604ffe788/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $3](https://default.salsalabs.org/T507b388c-a7ec-44d1-81e0-0581e3ca6f11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11fe523e-7357-48e9-84d5-3a6ea312eae5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://default.salsalabs.org/T039bc30a-7ab0-4859-86d4-bb03913e8c04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Your support means everything to me, Peter. Let’s fight for a better future,
Jordan Wood

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21905f4a-f77b-45eb-baae-f19e6c3bec7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Krisdee Clark was shocked when she was diagnosed with breast cancer at a young age. She did not let that diagnosis define her and
went on to be crowned Mrs. American in 2023.

Krisdee has used her story to inspire others and advocate for breast cancer survivors. This disease is becoming more common in
younger women, and Krisdee is one of the leading champions for improved healthcare policies and treatment. A wife, mother, and
author, Krisdee has an insightful perspective to share. Like, subscribe and share.

Honoring America's Fallen Heroes This Memorial Day

This Memorial Day, how will you honor America's fallen heroes? We are sharing 10 ideas for celebrating those who paid the ultimate
price for our freedom. From honoring a Gold Star family to wearing a red poppy, there are many ways to teach your children the
importance of this day and to acknowledge the sacrifices of our military.

clean_body: Krisdee Clark was crowned Mrs. American and has used her platform to raise awareness about breast cancer. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] May 6, 2025 • Newsletter Beauty Queen's Breast Cancer Journey Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Krisdee Clark was shocked when she was diagnosed with breast cancer at a young age. She did not let that diagnosis define her and went on to be crowned Mrs. American in 2023. Krisdee has used her story to inspire others and advocate for breast cancer survivors. This disease is becoming more common in younger women, and Krisdee is one of the leading champions for improved healthcare policies and treatment. A wife, mother, and author, Krisdee has an insightful perspective to share. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Honoring America's Fallen Heroes This Memorial Day This Memorial Day, how will you honor America's fallen heroes? We are sharing 10 ideas for celebrating those who paid the ultimate price for our freedom. From honoring a Gold Star family to wearing a red poppy, there are many ways to teach your children the importance of this day and to acknowledge the sacrifices of our military. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: the EMILYs List Campaigns Team
subject: Why we need Democratic pro-choice governors
body:
Protecting choice state by state |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107189365/543877324/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE514_20250506_GovBansRS_ALL&sourceid=1056050&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThiODdjOS04YTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etUxixBwoR6CfjqPNckwM7DcU8pZbA7ZUVc-115lJ70=) Peter, overturning _Roe v. Wade_ was just the beginning for anti-choice Republicans. Nearly three years later, abortion is now banned or severely restricted in 19 states. But that number could have been a lot higher had it not been for Democratic pro-choice women governors vetoing anti-choice legislation and protecting the right to choose in their states. Take a look: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107189377/543877342/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE514_20250506_GovBansRS_ALL&sourceid=1056050&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThiODdjOS04YTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etUxixBwoR6CfjqPNckwM7DcU8pZbA7ZUVc-115lJ70=) We know extremist Republicans are determined to ban abortion nationwide — especially while they have an anti-choice ally in the White House. **That's why the work of Democratic pro-choice governors is (and always has been) so important:**
* **Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs** repealed the state's near-total abortion ban, which had been passed in the Civil War era.
* **New Mexico Gov. Michelle Lujan Grisham** allocated funds to establish a reproductive health and abortion clinic serving both local residents and those traveling from neighboring states.
* **Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer** repealed the state's 1931 abortion ban that criminalized nurses and doctors for doing their jobs.

We know the best way to fight anti-choice extremism is to elect Democratic pro-choice women at every level of government — especially Democratic pro-choice women governors. This year alone, we've already endorsed **Deb Haaland** for governor of New Mexico, **Jocelyn Benson** for governor of Michigan, **Abigail Spanberger** for Virginia governor, and **Rep. Mikie Sherrill** for New Jersey governor!

Just like our eight other superstar governors, these EMILYs List women will protect the right to abortion for their constituents, as well as access to FDA-approved abortion medication, in vitro fertilization (IVF), and even birth control — which the GOP may come after next. [**Donate today to help elect FOUR MORE Democratic pro-choice women governors in 2025: **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107189380/543877351/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE514_20250506_GovBansRS_ALL&sourceid=1056050&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThiODdjOS04YTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etUxixBwoR6CfjqPNckwM7DcU8pZbA7ZUVc-115lJ70=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107189384/543877355/-1686146655?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE514_20250506_GovBansRS_ALL&sourceid=1056050&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThiODdjOS04YTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etUxixBwoR6CfjqPNckwM7DcU8pZbA7ZUVc-115lJ70=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107189386/543877360/-1686146655?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFE514_20250506_GovBansRS_ALL&sourceid=1056050&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThiODdjOS04YTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etUxixBwoR6CfjqPNckwM7DcU8pZbA7ZUVc-115lJ70=)

clean_body: Protecting choice state by state | = Peter, overturning Roe v. Wade was just the beginning for anti-choice Republicans. Nearly three years later, abortion is now banned or severely restricted in 19 states. But that number could have been a lot higher had it not been for Democratic pro-choice women governors vetoing anti-choice legislation and protecting the right to choose in their states. Take a look: = We know extremist Republicans are determined to ban abortion nationwide — especially while they have an anti-choice ally in the White House. That's why the work of Democratic pro-choice governors is (and always has been) so important: Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs repealed the state's near-total abortion ban, which had been passed in the Civil War era. New Mexico Gov. Michelle Lujan Grisham allocated funds to establish a reproductive health and abortion clinic serving both local residents and those traveling from neighboring states. Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer repealed the state's 1931 abortion ban that criminalized nurses and doctors for doing their jobs. We know the best way to fight anti-choice extremism is to elect Democratic pro-choice women at every level of government — especially Democratic pro-choice women governors. This year alone, we've already endorsed Deb Haaland for governor of New Mexico, Jocelyn Benson for governor of Michigan, Abigail Spanberger for Virginia governor, and Rep. Mikie Sherrill** for New Jersey governor! Just like our eight other superstar governors, these EMILYs List women will protect the right to abortion for their constituents, as well as access to FDA-approved abortion medication, in vitro fertilization (IVF), and even birth control — which the GOP may come after next. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=FtN3jBrX4DzfCwteGT0333ZuXTftTJo4fJeuxKsFclpOhd7glHelgzKTaE+O3LG2lqSbxTOt56bjyKLevKBoWUTNoZDSimJP1lIc1URUpzU=]
AP: Trump orders Justice Department to investigate Democrats’ top fundraising platform [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/AP_TrumpDoJActBlue2.png]
President Donald Trump has ordered the Justice Department to investigate the progressive movement’s top fundraising platform, ActBlue.
ActBlue said it would pursue “all legal avenues to protect and defend itself.” They continued, “ActBlue will continue its mission and work undeterred and uninterrupted, providing a safe, secure fundraising platform for the millions of grassroots donors who rely on us.”
This comes after Donald Trump spent years complaining that investigations into his criminal wrongdoing and conviction on 34 counts of business fraud were politically motivated when they were not.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this news. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you think the Trump administration is weaponizing the Justice Department against his political opponents?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=FtN3jBrX4DzfCwteGT0333ZuXTftTJo4fJeuxKsFclpOhd7glHelgzKTaE+O3LG2lqSbxTOt56bjyKLevKBoWUTNoZDSimJP1lIc1URUpzU=]

We want to hear from supporters in your area about this news. Will you take our one-click poll right away? Team: Do you think the Trump administration is weaponizing the Justice Department against his political opponents? By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [=] NO [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.Cdb05M&refcode=em250506-1&refcode2=2279.135344.Oev7nF&t=2&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)
---
Hey Folks, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
[**Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin to help build this campaign from the ground up?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.Cdb05M&refcode=em250506-1&t=3&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)**
**[DONATE NOW→](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.Cdb05M&refcode=em250506-1&t=4&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)**
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.Cdb05M&refcode=em250506-1&t=5&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.Cdb05M&refcode=em250506-1&t=6&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
[**That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5—about the cost of two Wynkoop pints—to help us build a winning campaign?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.Cdb05M&refcode=em250506-1&t=7&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to John Hickenlooper and Elissa Slotkin instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5 →](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2762?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.mMEmZO&refcode=em250506-1&t=8&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE →](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-Hickenlooper-split.6ivDHP&refcode=em250506-1&t=9&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)**
---
****
I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=10&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=11&akid=2279%2E135344%2EOev7nF)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidates and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labororganizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Tell Congress: No Military parade for Trump’s birthday...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
During Trump's first-term, we organized and helped stop his repeated efforts to hold a military parade.
#
During Trump's first-term, we organized and helped stop his repeated efforts to hold a Military parade.
One time, we requested and were awarded a permit to host a 5-K road race on the parade route. One K for each of his deferments.
Now Trump is trying again - he wants a parade on his birthday that, according to the Associated Press, would include "more than 6,600 soldiers, at least 150 vehicles, 50 helicopters, seven bands and possibly a couple thousand civilians."
This parade would be far from the national celebration that Trump claims, it would be an international embarrassment. His wishes for this event are not about celebrating the military, they are about his fragile self-image needing a public display of the military honoring him.
And he's doing it at a time his administration is looking at cutting veterans health care and housing cuts to fund tax cuts for the rich.
No.
If this parade is going to be stopped, it'll be the voices of Veterans who make it possible. But we can't do it alone.
[**Sign VoteVets petition: Tell Congress the American people believe a military parade would be a huge mistake, and that the military is not there to be used and abused to prop up the president's fragile self-image.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250503_vv_em_no_parade/?source=em250506-1-30&akid=34397%2E3013755%2E9m_cvv)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250503_vv_em_no_parade/?source=em250506-1-30&akid=34397%2E3013755%2E9m_cvv)
---
This is a president who has continually shown himself to have authoritarian tendencies and this is just another worrying example.
Thanks for making your voice heard.
The team at VoteVets
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250503_vv_em_no_parade/?source=em250506-1-30&akid=34397%2E3013755%2E9m_cvv)
---

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34397%2E3013755%2E9m_cvv).

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Stephen Miller just attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.
Recently, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer.
That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care.
**Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88379?refcode=em20250506-8920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8920%2E614464%2EE_-cuJ)
**Notice what Stephen is doing here.** He doesn’t _actually_ care about women — men, or anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans.
The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it.
**I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry, Peter. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers.**
**[Peter, will you stand with me by splitting an urgent donation of $10 between me and Heartland Patriots right now? Every dollar helps us fight back — and stay laser-focused on what matters.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88379?refcode=em20250506-8920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8920%2E614464%2EE_-cuJ)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88379?refcode=em20250506-8920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8920%2E614464%2EE_-cuJ)**
Thank you. Your support means so much to me.
Sarah

body:
I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191723/543884541/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=&emci=123d61c1-7c2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c0c7d7fe-8e2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=252045)
---
Hey folks, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington. **[Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Martin Heinrich to help build this campaign from the ground up?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191729/543884545/1034148403?amount=&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=)** | [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191734/543884552/1034148403?amount=&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=)
---
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191737/543884555/1034148403?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191742/543884559/1034148403?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service — first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
**[That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5 — about the cost of two Wynkoop pints — to help us build a winning campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191745/543884563/1034148403?amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=)**
[DONATE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191748/543884567/1034148403?amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107191750/543884570/1034148403?amount=&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3ZDdmZS04ZTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNbfqfN4Iz0_-QWV4Z7nm7ke9ivbtCxHSgOUqXOlBlQ=)
---
I know we can win this the Colorado way — by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. It’s going to take every last one of us joining together to compete with the billionaire donors trying to buy this election. Can I count on you to become a 2025 Democratic Member with $15 before midnight? _**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: re: the Department of Education –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Gillibrand. I'll keep this quick: **I need you to sign my urgent petition telling Trump he CANNOT shut down the Department of Education.**

Trump signed an order to do exactly that -- putting countless schools, educators, and young people's educations at risk -- and it is **_completely_** WRONG.

**We MUST act now.** I'm hoping to review the next 100,000 signatures by midnight tonight, so please add your name before then. **The most secure link to use is right here:** **[www.dscc.org/Education](http://go.dscc.org/go/21472?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250506-KirstenGillibrand-EDSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250506-KirstenGillibrand-EDSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=20190%2E9716520%2EdL8kg2)**

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **We are in danger.** **In just days, Republicans plan a vote to GUT Medicaid.** [](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxUHU0LT1iKOs5hSmDDbhwvbygWHyQJvfHHn7lKZDaqbVWADFPYVnHYn3Od3hkvnrOK2Q0ZimupaY0NJS8CR8B6FADn7B2Oh7mYcZU3upGa8z2xS6LpJ0z-oExby2IRmmqfrnEVmHpJ-QBK6B_m1Zjxn_TbSDJZA1nUfrrTc4SecBkWfO--VfGXFyDR9ZFH0GADruCbHO2KA9vf5OJb_wAQ6O1g4_znbW5sFA5aALHilV5jH0SWtRfmf7nU-0r5Twpb8IME2QnpjzJnvtJPBH-TYzQXjsT6jr6NMY3ZnaqlaWKeZslw-X_fN_AJx0k8a1UByaDkGKbVLf57C6bXS8WTw/4g9/1zzpoDNLQz2XZRF0CwH6zw/h0/h001.23ZXotGmer31IJwrL2LXEhKo1Pwavloz_f9awc066NU)
**[Take action NOW! Sign on to DEMAND that your members of Congress protect it!](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxUHU0LT1iKOs5hSmDDbhwvbygWHyQJvfHHn7lKZDaqbVWADFPYVnHYn3Od3hkvnrOfIpAX3IqFXNhXRx6zAWdJBoiujGLrs6OkC7gOJd9wRVUNTvwJzebTBS_iWvAopVCg9m3v_XkS25uQ9ZvwHt36s0QfMyDnSrWaxJv9BDhg-pguBkslKGy6wj1gtSnFB6znJXZU3AFpA6XVuQe9NoQ6ODuxLFedihKqtE7aiG0s3tyuJpxylgA2ZR1DiL3-gRdBLPWCrEWT-W0VTdN3pHsF2Dn2U84bc8mn4dq5ILyAUCltRTGa8-ZxHPVwXV8znbZfaR-R_vIimQOO-fT1KvAOg/4g9/1zzpoDNLQz2XZRF0CwH6zw/h1/h001.GCFv80Uk74ASUtVn4VnvsSCQXXgZbYsSA2gPtrQe0PY)**
* * *
Approximately [76 percent](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdr7qM1BES0rR7oV9aihvNEss5MUpQIHoQpaT-IVFMcRGetyCmrOo07ap-Z0BDzOJtAieuKOzabXoKPkUEWWipJ99xGLx_G4oTkLMLTTdyJR-onxuhKFRw7A0OnXd5awfm6JlhFE3HSzZpb3AICdxOAjdtxXgDIhKgNMfDgS0V8VLLg3Mn1DrG1TeJEVOfMIfgEQoSRSw5FSbaVWeSTkziR5OZdOQr7FqjlUQdgJzTGIuLTbVNOoP5PJzILesO6Mk_LEQyMvu-3l3bAZ_fosDfRIk5VfbNZLeDfIMYbkglIxs0Ji-cMtDxRGUUBs5pL4E-nCFQZ0jRhIbc9HUXU1Fle5tYDz8xJMu8fdAzO_bTBv/4g9/1zzpoDNLQz2XZRF0CwH6zw/h2/h001.QdGDHfqfa13QtQAVSzpK_IaB9t5Vq7MlOt70j22RnO8) of Americans oppose cuts to Medicaid, but Republicans plan severe cuts to the program that would jeopardize healthcare for millions. These cuts are part of a plan to lower taxes for America's millionaires and billionaires and boost military spending.
Slashing Medicaid, a key safety net supporting 72 million Americans, including low-income families, children, seniors, and individuals with disabilities, would lead to widespread loss of coverage, potentially causing [50,000](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMS1a9iwo-hNQFChws2CVysDuPymlIu4F2dPvCb5Y4xHiJehGNkpliAdGcCc1QZRnbQ4hYOafADsFUiMNWaxv7l24wqiSBlugX9rpKADF7vGK2ue2MrCUXydgduhMOuj36J5AcJJUAbl6cXhmb-pKQiV9eH8V8Uuod_3sKLVv_vc3wLWup7C6klRIA7o6n9DMv8dNUa8tJpWxWTtek7jtpGG43mXUWnge5dvQ0f2A2hahBW45Ens1l9S_nkraTHZS5z58gDmJqTuBfM8czYTCl3e6W6ST-xhx2qF5bUAqf9aeptXvJKDq2QNy8fb89aGQHo3AbUCIOe_jSrTk_rRsVM47tkysQML89EN1psumO4mGRxDNK_ZTxpWDizHxbUidUFWor7HSXxYoCJoXKI7gsvJKc-QfQVGoA_mCbWDPJnH9_-H2-j6neZQ-DocXlBcDRQ/4g9/1zzpoDNLQz2XZRF0CwH6zw/h3/h001.O8UWFlkEwJk1PbCG47hBDBcG5iDLv31jE85R-pOtm1o) deaths annually.
Medicaid is crucial to the healthcare system, supporting underserved hospitals and clinics. Cutting funds would harm beneficiaries and weaken care, raising costs and reducing services for all. **
** **Republicans may vote on gutting Medicaid the week of May 12th!**
******[This is an emergency and time is of the essence! Stand with Able Dems and demand Congress protect Medicaid NOW!](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxUHU0LT1iKOs5hSmDDbhwvbygWHyQJvfHHn7lKZDaqbVWADFPYVnHYn3Od3hkvnrOVn1Zk6mu9SPDaC8Pvka3QRjb3KsQMhDVz47acri1QSchMsw_XxLkCFmzYtDoPlh7tQdHqvN1YWjDF8mtLsdfmlsxVbezExmALsLnq45hLTlIeJrRmsKm_qifmTe8WfWE3YGdMN0C_SYCi0uHX52WmvaKSW1AdkMDo9-xkRapxTe3Oghq8JMe3FTTs29wN3L3stZ7L7R2LrMvlOlaUaOQtRqWp6ZA4r7WIrhF-zhFo2J-xKZ6akPVG3UwAM9BkPzJo0rK2NoNB5gEaNTE_MCZgA/4g9/1zzpoDNLQz2XZRF0CwH6zw/h4/h001.SmyIRUED0bGydvs7C37yvptZS-LQbhxhl_3h0_NoDPw)

Medicaid is intended as a crucial safety net for low-income individuals facing illness or injury. The Republican cuts threaten healthcare access for 20 million Americans, mostly children and the disabled community.

clean_body: | | | We are in danger. In just days, Republicans plan a vote to GUT Medicaid. Approximately of Americans oppose cuts to Medicaid, but Republicans plan severe cuts to the program that would jeopardize healthcare for millions. These cuts are part of a plan to lower taxes for America's millionaires and billionaires and boost military spending. Slashing Medicaid, a key safety net supporting 72 million Americans, including low-income families, children, seniors, and individuals with disabilities, would lead to widespread loss of coverage, potentially causing deaths annually. Medicaid is crucial to the healthcare system, supporting underserved hospitals and clinics. Cutting funds would harm beneficiaries and weaken care, raising costs and reducing services for all. Republicans may vote on gutting Medicaid the week of May 12th! ** | Trump and Republicans have unveiled their 2026 budget, breaking their promise by targeting Medicaid while allocating a trillion dollars to defense. Medicaid is intended as a crucial safety net for low-income individuals facing illness or injury. The Republican cuts threaten healthcare access for 20 million Americans, mostly children and the disabled community. People will feel these deep and dangerous cuts. Our healthcare is in danger! **** Thank you for your advocacy. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. subject: Sign: Demand the Supreme Court stand up and REJECT Trump’s power grab
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell the Supreme Court to stand up to Trump's power grab >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66820a40-f653-4797-9a0b-b04fa386f33f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbbf5946d-4004-41c2-af0d-ecf64d24e4dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump and his allies are working to strip power from the judiciary and give it to the White House – but the Supreme Court conservative majority isn’t saying a word about it. Only the Democratic appointees in the minority are pushing back (most recently, Judge Jackson). Chief Justice John Roberts is notably quiet as a church mouse, even though he is the head of the Judicial branch, and was recently sued by a group called America First, which was founded by Trump lackey Stephen Miller. Here’s [more](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99acc09d-d5cd-4d54-932e-bab2194ef2d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) on the lawsuit: The case ostensibly proceeds as a FOIA lawsuit, with the Trump-aligned group seeking access to judiciary records. But, in doing so, it asks the courts to cede massive power to the White House: the bodies that make court policy and manage the judiciary’s day-to-day operations should be considered independent agencies of the executive branch, the suit argues, giving the President, under the conservative legal movement’s theories, the power to appoint and dismiss people in key roles. This is a massive power grab by Trump, it guts the judicial branch in defiance of the Constitution, and the Supreme Court needs to stand up to him. Trump is hoping his hand-picked Supreme Court Justices will allow him to continue on his path to dictator unchecked. They need to come out strong against this lawsuit and act as a check on Trump – or the consequences will be dire. [Sign your name to demand the Supreme Court stand up to Trump's power grab >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4fc29e8-d0f3-498d-bbdf-b1422a325ebe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Center for American Liberty
subject: It’s not racism if the victim is white?
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e118620/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvUGVrZEtydms2WQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDY/LbmNscTY3dW92dg/qP2hpZHM9bmNFbTZ1NWVlaDdwejVscw/gaBoxfA/s1n93a9c856)
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | Dear Friend, What would you do if your child or grandchild was bullied in front of his classmates -- not just by other kids, but also by the school principal and teachers? That's what happened to Brooks Warden when he was in middle school in Austin, Texas. Over the course of three years, Brooks was taunted, threatened, and harassed by students and staff -- simply because he wore a MAGA hat on a field trip. And instead of stepping in to stop it, the teachers and administrators joined in**.** One teacher called him "Whitey" in class. His classmates regurgitated the media's lies about Trump supporters. Students called Brooks a "racist," a "Nazi," and even accused of being in the Ku Klux Klan. Another student beat up Brooks at school. Even the **principal** joined in by pulling earbuds out of Brooks’s ear and asking him if he was listening to "Dixie." This isn't just bullying -- it's racial and political discrimination, and the school participated in it. **[That's why the Center for American Liberty stepped in and is bringing Brooks Warden's fight for justice to the Supreme Court.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** This wasn't just a single bad day... **_...it was three years of targeted abuse._** When the Warden family asked the school for help, they were ignored. So the Center for American Liberty stepped in. We filed a lawsuit on behalf of Brooks Warden against the Austin Independent School District, arguing that the school violated Title VI of the Civil Rights Act by allowing racially motivated harassment to go unchecked. But when the case went to federal court, the judge dismissed it -- claiming the bullying was "primarily political," and the racial discrimination Brooks suffered wasn't "severe or pervasive" enough. Think about that: A student was called “Whitey” by teacher, beaten up and bullied by his classmates, and publicly humiliated by a principal, and a federal court says it doesn't count because the politics were louder than the racism. We refused to accept that. We appealed to the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, which en banc split 9–9. Now, we've filed a petition for certiorari with the U.S. Supreme Court to make one thing absolutely clear: **Racial harassment in public schools is unconstitutional -- whether it targets a student who is white, Black, Hispanic, conservative, liberal, or anything else.** But Friend, taking a case to the Supreme Court is incredibly expensive. And we're up against a well-funded school district... The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. We don't take a dime of government funding. We rely entirely on generous patriots like you who believe no child should be harassed for their conservative beliefs or race. **[Will you chip in $35, $50, or even $100 to help us bring Brooks Warden's case to the highest court in the land?](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** We're not just fighting for Brooks -- we're fighting for every student whose rights have been ignored because they don't fit the Left's narrative. And we're fighting for every student, who like Brooks, wants to wear a MAGA hat to school without fear of being beaten up and discriminated against. This case could set a national precedent. Let's make sure the Supreme Court hears it loud and clear: **there is no double standard under the Constitution.** Thank you for standing with Brooks -- and with us. Sincerely,
---
| | **Mark Trammell** CEO, Center for American Liberty

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, What would you do if your child or grandchild was bullied in front of his classmates -- not just by other kids, but also by the school principal and teachers? That's what happened to Brooks Warden when he was in middle school in Austin, Texas. Over the course of three years, Brooks was taunted, threatened, and harassed by students and staff -- simply because he wore a MAGA hat on a field trip. And instead of stepping in to stop it, the teachers and administrators joined in. One teacher called him "Whitey" in class. His classmates regurgitated the media's lies about Trump supporters. Students called Brooks a "racist," a "Nazi," and even accused of being in the Ku Klux Klan. Another student beat up Brooks at school. Even the principal joined in by pulling earbuds out of Brooks’s ear and asking him if he was listening to "Dixie." This isn't just bullying -- it's racial and political discrimination, and the school participated in it. This wasn't just a single bad day... ...it was three years of targeted abuse. When the Warden family asked the school for help, they were ignored. So the Center for American Liberty stepped in. We filed a lawsuit on behalf of Brooks Warden against the Austin Independent School District, arguing that the school violated Title VI of the Civil Rights Act by allowing racially motivated harassment to go unchecked. But when the case went to federal court, the judge dismissed it -- claiming the bullying was "primarily political," and the racial discrimination Brooks suffered wasn't "severe or pervasive" enough. Think about that: A student was called “Whitey” by teacher, beaten up and bullied by his classmates, and publicly humiliated by a principal, and a federal court says it doesn't count because the politics were louder than the racism. We refused to accept that. We appealed to the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, which en banc split 9–9. Now, we've filed a petition for certiorari with the U.S. Supreme Court to make one thing absolutely clear: Racial harassment in public schools is unconstitutional -- whether it targets a student who is white, Black, Hispanic, conservative, liberal, or anything else. But Friend, taking a case to the Supreme Court is incredibly expensive. And we're up against a well-funded school district... The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. We don't take a dime of government funding. We rely entirely on generous patriots like you who believe no child should be harassed for their conservative beliefs or race. We're not just fighting for Brooks -- we're fighting for every student whose rights have been ignored because they don't fit the Left's narrative. And we're fighting for every student, who like Brooks, wants to wear a MAGA hat to school without fear of being beaten up and discriminated against. This case could set a national precedent. Let's make sure the Supreme Court hears it loud and clear: there is no double standard under the Constitution. Thank you for standing with Brooks -- and with us. Sincerely, | | Mark Trammell CEO, Center for American Liberty | | | | | | Mark Trammell Executive Director Center for American Liberty | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 |

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: When Flames Kill
body:
Paul Davis | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Paul Davis_ :__ Murder by fire_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6dbd6f2ea5&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| ''Fire is one of the most destructive forces on earth.

I know firsthand the destructiveness of fire, as I attended a U.S. Navy firefighting school in 1970 when I was an eighteen-year-old sailor serving on the aircraft carrier USS Kitty Hawk prior to our tour of duty on 'Yankee Station' in the Gulf of Tonkin during the Vietnam War.

We entered concrete buildings in firefighting gear and equipment, and we put out real fires, and we put out oil fires on the ground that stretched across parking lots..."

## About Paul Davis:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c31ddae48f&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Paul Davis is a South Philadelphia writer and frequent contributor to _Broad + Liberty_. He is also a regular contributor to Counterterrorism magazine, and he writes the “On Crime” column for the _Washington Times_. He enlisted in the U.S. Navy when he was 17 and served two years aboard the aircraft carrier USS Kitty Hawk during the Vietnam War. He also served two years aboard a Navy harbor tugboat at the U.S. nuclear submarine base at Holy Loch, Scotland. He performed security work as a Defense Department civilian employee after serving in the Navy, and later became a full-time writer. His work has also appeared in the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ , the _Philadelphia Daily News_ , _Philadelphia Weekly_ , and other publications.

With how fast the news cycle moves, some people have become too accustomed to the cycle of another mass shooting, “thoughts and prayers,” then willful inaction that follows. _Not me._ **[I’ve channeled those thoughts and prayers into action by championing legislation that will crack down on gun violence. I want to tell you more about what I’m doing in Congress to accomplish this, but first can I ask you to give any amount to help me keep up this fight in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107194174/543892056/569836602?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_GunViolence_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJlMmYyZS05MzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0RwnWHxMaYMFhF45RYRZcaJtehrG0IJCoOwvnQrAWtQ=)** [HELP ME COMBAT GUN VIOLENCE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107194176/543892058/569836602?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_GunViolence_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJlMmYyZS05MzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0RwnWHxMaYMFhF45RYRZcaJtehrG0IJCoOwvnQrAWtQ=) We can’t continue the reality of parents who are worried about sending their children to school out of fear of gun violence. Or the instinctual response of scoping out the nearest exit/getaway route when in larger groups of people. _This is a uniquely American experience._ **Of all major economic countries, the United States has made up 76% of total public mass shootings from 2000 to 2022.** The cycle of fear, death, and grief needs to come to an end. That’s why I’m proud to have introduced four bills to prevent violence in schools. The EAGLES Act, the Single Application for School Safety Act, the Measures for Safer School Districts Act, and the ALYSSA Act. First and foremost, the job of a public servant must be protecting every American. I’ve always believed that, and it’s why I’m working hard (even across the aisle) to reduce the scourge of gun violence. **In a historically unproductive Congress with a MAGA majority that’s hellbent on sidelining progress, it’s more important than ever that we win districts like mine to help Democrats retake the House and act definitively on gun violence once and for all.** **[Will you join me in this fight by giving any amount to help our campaign win reelection and continue to fight for a future without gun violence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107194179/543892060/569836602?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_GunViolence_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJlMmYyZS05MzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0RwnWHxMaYMFhF45RYRZcaJtehrG0IJCoOwvnQrAWtQ=)** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [CHIP IN $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107194181/543892062/569836602?express_lane=true&amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_GunViolence_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJlMmYyZS05MzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0RwnWHxMaYMFhF45RYRZcaJtehrG0IJCoOwvnQrAWtQ=)

body:
Democrats want to erase Trump’s legacy. Stand with America NOW!

| | | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztn4n0d3u4oq9nu4eo882u44ff8jqss8fhkrhi5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm8or6chh2bs)
---
| | Friend, **The Radical Left is at it again — this time, they’re trying to hijack Trump’s Gulf of America.** President Trump did something HUGE — he renamed the Gulf of Mexico the Gulf of America to put America First, boost our sovereignty, and send a message to the world: **AMERICA IS BACK!** _But the DEMOCRATS CAN’T STAND IT._
---
| | | [SIGN THE GULF OF AMERICA PETITION →](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zsb2pmv7rohh956ustnqebkdc537nnvu8hda27p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm8or6chh2bs)
---
| | They’re already working to BLOCK Trump’s legacy and ERASE the Gulf of America from history. Why? Because it was Trump’s idea, and they _can’t stand_ the fact that **TRUMP WINS and America comes first.** **I** T GETS WORSE. Now, these America-hating liberals are pulling out all the stops. They want to:
* SCRUB the name “Gulf of America” from the record
* CANCEL any legacy that Trump built for the American people
* HURT our country to protect their globalist agenda

They’re going after our PRESIDENT. They’re going after YOU. **BUT WE’RE NOT BACKING DOWN.** We need 100,000 Patriots to stand up and defend the Gulf of America — to make sure that the Left can’t tear it down. Will you sign the petition and make your voice heard? Tell Congress: PASS THE GULF OF AMERICA ACT NOW.
---

| | The Republican Women’s Caucus is on the front lines of the fight for **faith, family, and freedom.** __We’re not career politicians or D.C. elites__ —we’re bold, unapologetic conservative women working alongside President Trump to defend the American Dream from the Left’s radical takeover. We know that **American issues are women’s issues** —and we’re taking that message straight to Washington. While the Democrats try to erase our values, we’re rising up louder and stronger than ever before.

* Protect Women’s Sports from the Left’s gender insanity

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Sign your name: Fight back against Trump’s tariffs
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107195321/543895122/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGJhMzliNi05MzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a5ouvsMlkED7AKWVi-eN2ygCLr9maZpZUjPFH0ZRtrw=)
Peter, For the first time since before I entered Congress, our economy shrank. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107195326/543895125/-655204457?refcode=em-5.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGJhMzliNi05MzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a5ouvsMlkED7AKWVi-eN2ygCLr9maZpZUjPFH0ZRtrw=&emci=1ac29256-6b2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e8ba39b6-932a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=18052858) That’s right, Trump’s first quarter in office was our worst economy in years. And the reason is pretty simple: Tariffs. **Tariffs are a tax on you, me, and every other hardworking average American.** In certain situations, targeted tariffs can be effective, absolutely. But the current tariffs, and blanket tariffs in general, are completely reckless. **From the car dealership to the grocery store to the gas pump, you’ll pay more. And that’s if local businesses can afford the supplies to keep shelves stocked.** And none of this has been a surprise to anyone but Donald Trump and his enablers. Every economist – Republican and Democrat – predicted tariffs of this size and scale would hurt American businesses. And right now, in my visits across IL-17 – from the mom-and-pop store on Main Street to national leaders like Caterpillar – everyone is feeling the pain right now. I’ve introduced legislation to prevent this tariff madness from jacking up costs and killing jobs, and I hope you’ll rally behind me as I push to restore consistency and normalcy to our economy. [**Help protect our communities from skyrocketing prices and economic retaliation. clean_body: | = Peter, For the first time since before I entered Congress, our economy shrank. That’s right, Trump’s first quarter in office was our worst economy in years. And the reason is pretty simple: Tariffs. Tariffs are a tax on you, me, and every other hardworking average American. In certain situations, targeted tariffs can be effective, absolutely. But the current tariffs, and blanket tariffs in general, are completely reckless. From the car dealership to the grocery store to the gas pump, you’ll pay more. And that’s if local businesses can afford the supplies to keep shelves stocked. And none of this has been a surprise to anyone but Donald Trump and his enablers. Every economist – Republican and Democrat – predicted tariffs of this size and scale would hurt American businesses. And right now, in my visits across IL-17 – from the mom-and-pop store on Main Street to national leaders like Caterpillar – everyone is feeling the pain right now. I’ve introduced legislation to prevent this tariff madness from jacking up costs and killing jobs, and I hope you’ll rally behind me as I push to restore consistency and normalcy to our economy. | Fighting for better for all of us, -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington.
