name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Jacky told me I could reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
| | |
---
Hey folks, I’m running for reelection to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
**[Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help build this campaign from the ground up?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107196056/543897577/-277551543?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5524-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE5Yjc5Mi05NDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkXKaB9WdU5RYwXcE4dS9ZO1qKZ2k-Sf1TbGqHSopYk=)**
| | [Donate Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107196057/543897578/-277551543?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5524-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE5Yjc5Mi05NDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkXKaB9WdU5RYwXcE4dS9ZO1qKZ2k-Sf1TbGqHSopYk=)
---
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107196058/543897579/-277551543?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5524-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE5Yjc5Mi05NDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkXKaB9WdU5RYwXcE4dS9ZO1qKZ2k-Sf1TbGqHSopYk=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107196059/543897580/-277551543?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5524-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE5Yjc5Mi05NDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkXKaB9WdU5RYwXcE4dS9ZO1qKZ2k-Sf1TbGqHSopYk=)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and national Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
**[That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5—about the cost of two Wynkoop pints—to help us build a winning campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107196060/543897581/-277551543?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5524-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE5Yjc5Mi05NDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkXKaB9WdU5RYwXcE4dS9ZO1qKZ2k-Sf1TbGqHSopYk=)**

| | [Donate another amount →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107196062/543897583/-277551543?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5524-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE5Yjc5Mi05NDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkXKaB9WdU5RYwXcE4dS9ZO1qKZ2k-Sf1TbGqHSopYk=)

I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems.

Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,

John

clean_body: I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado | | | Hey folks, I’m running for reelection to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington. = | | = Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – a great deal compared to mainstream options! Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint. Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days! = = I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator. And together, we’ve gotten things done: Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and national Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back. = | | = | | = I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems. Thanks for being part of the team. Giddy up, John | *

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: RSVP: Sick of It Tour
body:
|

---

Dear Friends,
On Saturday May 10, at 1:00pm, I will be launching our 'Sick of It' Tour. It is paramount that we stand up to this Administration and the harm they are causing. As you well know, we have a public health crisis brewing in our nation - a crisis perpetrated by Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., the U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services. Secretary Kennedy is a danger to our nation. He's a danger to our children, and we the American people are _**SICK OF IT**_. This is a person who, during his confirmation hearings, did not know the difference between Medicare and Medicaid. A dangerous vaccine skeptic who not only said vaccines cause autism in children, [but told me during a hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14182.8006883.5307503.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1885036716928483424&redir_log=644271641036333) that Black people needed a different vaccine schedule than White people. Secretary Kennedy has advocated to remove fluoride from drinking water that prevents cavities and tooth decay for low income families and wants to promote raw milk, something proven to cause illness and hospitalizations at far higher rates than pasteurized milk. He has single-handedly perpetuated the spread of a measles outbreak that is killing children across the country; he has called for a registry for people with autism, and has used offensive language to describe individuals with disabilities. Above all, he's decimating government agencies that perform life saving research and oversight, which puts Marylanders and Americans at risk. Secretary Kennedy and President Trump have fired 20,000 civil servants who worked on behalf of the American people at the Department of Health and Human Services agencies. They abruptly terminated billions of dollars in critical public health grants, including $200 million to Maryland that would go towards vaccination programs, disease surveillance, and alleviating health disparities. And he slashed billions in research funding that supports new life-saving cures for Americans - from our newborns to our seniors, from children battling rare cancers to our service members injured in battle. These cuts will cost lives. Our children are in danger. Our families are in danger. If you feel the way I do, I would like to invite you to join me for our _**Sick of It**_ Rally on Saturday, May 10, 2025 at 1:00pm -- please arrive by 12:30pm. Click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14182.8006883.5307503.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fforms.gle%2fQsf8yC7YXbL5R6vW9&redir_log=454788569831229) to RSVP, and for location information. Ahead of Mother's Day, we will gather to demand action, and to demand that RFK, Jr., President Trump and his Administration stop endangering the lives of American families. [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14182.8006883.5307503.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdocs.google.com%2fforms%2fd%2fe%2f1FAIpQLSeY8mJ1XAIOD29eB8d35jXzbBdIBd5p4AjDLk7j16DjnSZPRQ%2fviewform&redir_log=878460824021647) Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14182.8006883.5307503.7190525)

clean_body: | = Peter, We're gonna be brutally honest: our fundraising has basically fallen off a cliff. = Yikes. We're raising just a tiny fraction of what we were last fall. Look, we saw this coming. But it's hard to swallow when we've got special elections starting next week , and competitive House races already heating up for 2026. Republicans have one of the slimmest majorities in history, but that doesn't guarantee it's going to be easy to flip the House come next November. We're going to have to fight hard to ensure Democrats retake the House and get to work delivering solutions that give working families a fair shot. We wouldn't reach out if it wasn't important, Peter: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The work we put in now is going to pay off at the polls, so thank you for stepping up when it's needed most! — Fair Shot PAC Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican Women’s Caucus Fund and are not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Democrats want to erase Trump’s legacy. Stand with America NOW!

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zocmtabil3e7imsbnf4p8p9h62jqke6dtaffa77o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm4pb2cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, **The Radical Left is at it again — this time, they’re trying to hijack Trump’s Gulf of America.** President Trump did something HUGE — he renamed the Gulf of Mexico the Gulf of America to put America First, boost our sovereignty, and send a message to the world: **AMERICA IS BACK!** _But the DEMOCRATS CAN’T STAND IT._
---
| | | [SIGN THE GULF OF AMERICA PETITION →](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z514pm8qbfvq10i5eggdushq8uatjrhbvfo4moug_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm4pb2cdh2bs)
---
| | They’re already working to BLOCK Trump’s legacy and ERASE the Gulf of America from history. Why? Because it was Trump’s idea, and they _can’t stand_ the fact that **TRUMP WINS and America comes first.** **I** T GETS WORSE. Now, these America-hating liberals are pulling out all the stops. They want to:
* SCRUB the name “Gulf of America” from the record
* CANCEL any legacy that Trump built for the American people
* HURT our country to protect their globalist agenda

They’re going after our PRESIDENT. They’re going after YOU. **BUT WE’RE NOT BACKING DOWN.** We need 100,000 Patriots to stand up and defend the Gulf of America — to make sure that the Left can’t tear it down. Will you sign the petition and make your voice heard? Tell Congress: PASS THE GULF OF AMERICA ACT NOW.
---

| | The Republican Women’s Caucus is on the front lines of the fight for **faith, family, and freedom.** __We’re not career politicians or D.C. elites__ —we’re bold, unapologetic conservative women working alongside President Trump to defend the American Dream from the Left’s radical takeover. We know that **American issues are women’s issues** —and we’re taking that message straight to Washington. While the Democrats try to erase our values, we’re rising up louder and stronger than ever before.
---

* Protect Women’s Sports from the Left’s gender insanity
* End Woke Indoctrination in our schools
* Secure Our Border and STOP the flood of illegal immigration
* Defend Life and stand for the unborn
* Restore Election Integrity and demand Voter ID
* Keep America SAFE, STRONG, and FREE

subject: Briefing Unlocked: Rubio’s mission needs public backup

body:
Our success depends on unified support from patriots like you.

|
---
| | | **Mission Overview:**
Secretary of State Marco Rubio has been tasked with streamlining U.S. foreign policy by consolidating key agencies under one leader. This critical move will eliminate inefficiency and ensure a unified, powerful American presence abroad.

**Immediate Action Needed:**
We need your support. Sign the official House GOP letter backing Rubio's efforts to strengthen our foreign policy. **His success depends on unified support from patriots like you.**

**[Sign the letter here:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zijnq21m29a7jbc8ho239ji92alv4rbaitsjdq6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm4pb6c1h2bs "Sign the letter here:")** **[https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/TYSecRubio](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi08jhp5mgb4bqpsqvbpvg9re2uvjdd706cevq3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm4pb6c1h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/TYSecRubio")**

Time is of the essence. Stand with Secretary Rubio today.

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: No stranger to tough fights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d1f283935ef2465b9293e2cec304a3f2&_e=J7shjdlrWPIaOZwRnc7PLPJ_nIa440zm8ngN5PsafG4OfCGhHDAIZozeLyeyDF1LpllTtr773M8tbYMZ4keUeFsplHD6Nyz_R2Jbn_4zuYsRGeaRfZXgUGFJUPJNXbSmzrd30NgsuBnW3gEK18SjWfj_ilhMmDGQZ_35HmLqD02qj09cGxxwjWXiG4TQhIElE7eArK7CZElOQuc6qm1Z37GzS-nivXTr-nWpexnrmAVg9AXRMzlF1qJ9F7Yj5ff-iUv8GFY3Y58zRS7UIf4OWVts4xgzHn8dczSSVte5SfYX2hyhDVMnvbrxGRjdRTYV6W0B6kwqdvKYVOOrxFAWukWuGLeLsuAKHCD5s00qqiD7EoI5u_r1tTQuFZFBwy_JkNTCeCSwOj_8OlG0nKXj3Q%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

The biased hacks at Politico have decided to take aim at me, a Navy SEAL, for daring to shake up their cozy DC bubble.

I came to Congress with a mission: to serve our nation as fiercely as I did on the battlefield. As a SEAL, I learned to confront threats head-on, and that’s precisely what I’m doing against the entrenched elites and corrupt insiders running our government into the ground. But the liberal media, desperate to protect their cronies, smeared me for my resolve to drain the Swamp.

I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and _**I’m fighting to dismantle the status quo, but I’m up against a ruthless coalition of fake news outlets, spineless RINOs, and vengeful Democrats.**_

Fellow Conservative, _**[I need your support to stay in this fight and keep the pressure on those who would rather live in a dystopian, egalitarian society than the free and great nation our forefathers have spent the last 300 years building.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d1f283935ef2465b9293e2cec304a3f2&_e=J7shjdlrWPIaOZwRnc7PLPJ_nIa440zm8ngN5PsafG4OfCGhHDAIZozeLyeyDF1LpllTtr773M8tbYMZ4keUeFsplHD6Nyz_R2Jbn_4zuYsRGeaRfZXgUGFJUPJNXbSmzrd30NgsuBnW3gEK18SjWfj_ilhMmDGQZ_35HmLqD02qj09cGxxwjWXiG4TQhIElE7eArK7CZElOQuc6qm1Z37GzS-nivXTr-nWpexnrmAVg9AXRMzlF1qJ9F7Yj5ff-IPuJaNAXkwAm_ibX66XgBAZBovD-ovJ6evxgQyNwXpCKI8zRtPrnvTjP96Duzwq-Uw_A3YQcd99X9lOmrQ5OkQsaTj9eYY3lP7v0F-U3oTOsXbB8__0gf2lTgGDgIN0gB9YmilWb3YtHApeImmd1QA%3D%3D)**_

[**Chip in $10 to aid me in my fight**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d1f283935ef2465b9293e2cec304a3f2&_e=J7shjdlrWPIaOZwRnc7PLPJ_nIa440zm8ngN5PsafG4OfCGhHDAIZozeLyeyDF1LpllTtr773M8tbYMZ4keUeFsplHD6Nyz_R2Jbn_4zuYsRGeaRfZXgUGFJUPJNXbSmzrd30NgsuBnW3gEK18SjWfj_ilhMmDGQZ_35HmLqD02qj09cGxxwjWXiG4TQhIElE7eArK7CZElOQuc6qm1Z37GzS-nivXTr-nWpexnrmAVg9AXRMzlF1qJ9F7Yj5ff-hPlrRAhb47fG0XF4_9F6KgtGo_TBdGJUlf1N51AfBjdhmW7I9lf12x1L79p6iUogrU1LDKqvCYtBBwMEXRGVycYPEgh7b7Qn4IBSJ1DQ01w6Uj8U4a0en1XrB5BVyS_49S0KtPnV2L9V3p3eYb5cfg%3D%3D)
The mainstream, liberal media attacks me for my SEAL mindset—the unyielding drive to complete the mission. They ridicule my loyalty to President Trump’s America First agenda, which dares to put our country back on top. _**They hate that I’m exposing the waste and fraud in our government, now laid bare by Trump’s DOGE initiative.**_

But here’s the truth: they’re terrified because YOU elected me and President Trump to upend their corrupt system.

Let’s be clear: Politico’s hit job is a calculated move to shut me down. If they can muzzle me, they’ll come for you next. I’m holding the line, but I need your help to fuel this battle for America’s future:

[**Chip in $10 to aid me in my fight**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d1f283935ef2465b9293e2cec304a3f2&_e=J7shjdlrWPIaOZwRnc7PLPJ_nIa440zm8ngN5PsafG4OfCGhHDAIZozeLyeyDF1LpllTtr773M8tbYMZ4keUeFsplHD6Nyz_R2Jbn_4zuYsRGeaRfZXgUGFJUPJNXbSmzrd30NgsuBnW3gEK18SjWfj_ilhMmDGQZ_35HmLqD02qj09cGxxwjWXiG4TQhIElE7eArK7CZElOQuc6qm1Z37GzS-nivXTr-nWpexnrmAVg9AXRMzlF1qJ9F7Yj5ff-VBb9k6JEO7c8NE4XCJxW_O3XxMux9sj_4a6idH_3hS5dzx42LLnuvZ1Qj_ros2FSp_z2V6q4dfzZAjNV0S-FT9Vehgc_PHRtmsqYpbljcEhi7zD6NwBfCtQDxN59NljZylAEDsTRXhXttyWiTmMJ-Q%3D%3D)
I appreciate your continued assistance. ****

I appreciate your assistance,
Tim Sheehy
U.S. Senator - Montana

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d1f283935ef2465b9293e2cec304a3f2&_e=J7shjdlrWPIaOZwRnc7PLMSNS-6hLAyGiqO0gtBRKxmDNYwY5MuxeE80_pO0hwUmvvVqgv1SgjjSABzHRYi-iJpnZbsKiUwgdTVC-gDpn1Aj2S8W0QhFjrfQoweJovtClr0lr34YNnbC3QWOT9fhdfTvfXrAfcYXsdIU5lzExbOaUPPfrid0v-8XdbMezSb9VXkQt7TlXk2BCWkd1JWiog%3D%3D)

clean_body: Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | Fellow Conservative, The biased hacks at Politico have decided to take aim at me, a Navy SEAL, for daring to shake up their cozy DC bubble. I came to Congress with a mission: to serve our nation as fiercely as I did on the battlefield. As a SEAL, I learned to confront threats head-on, and that’s precisely what I’m doing against the entrenched elites and corrupt insiders running our government into the ground. But the liberal media, desperate to protect their cronies, smeared me for my resolve to drain the Swamp. I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I’m fighting to dismantle the status quo, but I’m up against a ruthless coalition of fake news outlets, spineless RINOs, and vengeful Democrats. Fellow Conservative, The mainstream, liberal media attacks me for my SEAL mindset—the unyielding drive to complete the mission. They ridicule my loyalty to President Trump’s America First agenda, which dares to put our country back on top. They hate that I’m exposing the waste and fraud in our government, now laid bare by Trump’s DOGE initiative. But here’s the truth: they’re terrified because YOU elected me and President Trump to upend their corrupt system. Let’s be clear: Politico’s hit job is a calculated move to shut me down. If they can muzzle me, they’ll come for you next. I’m holding the line, but I need your help to fuel this battle for America’s future: I appreciate your continued assistance. ** I appreciate your assistance, Tim Sheehy U.S. Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Honoring 169 Years of San Mateo County – Join the Celebration and Unveiling
body:
You're Invited: San Mateo County's 169th Anniversary & 500 County Center Dedication | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/325cb5ae6b39/honoring-169-years-of-san-mateo-county-join-the-celebration-and-unveiling?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### Join us:

**May 15th, 2025 in Redwood City**
---
| | |
---
| | | |

**Celebrating Our Story**

San Mateo County and the San Mateo County History Museum cordially invite you to attend the 169th Anniversary of San Mateo County and the Dedication and Unveiling Ceremony for 500 County Center.

**_Schedule_**
_**5:00 p.m.:**_
Gather at the San Mateo County History Museum (2200 Broadway, Redwood City) for a program exploring the County's start with reenactors and live music.

_**5:30 p.m.:**_
Procession led by the **[Woodside High School marching band](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=426cc31ecf&e=c0babbc643)** to 500 County Center for Dedication and Unveiling of the new building.

_**6:00 p.m.:**_
• Enjoy a short video of the building and explore the lobby and board chambers.
• Explore the county's past with kids' crafts.
• Live music by DJ John Beaver

Thursday,
May 15, 2025
FREE Event Parking at the San Mateo County Jury Parking Garage
(400 Middlefield Road, Redwood City)

Kindly RSVP by May 12, 2025.
bmurdock@smcgov.org or 650-363-4572
[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8637e5a186&e=c0babbc643)

President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Thank you to our nurses
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
I want to take a moment to appreciate all the hardworking nurses in Northwest Washington.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107197142/543902548/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTM0ZDU1OS05NzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgP5Eq61tTHSwyuHGVrtcADmzA2BobMIefYIvTMxr9U=&emci=6bc08187-d129-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=3534d559-972a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Today is National Nurses Day.** I want to take a moment to appreciate all the hardworking nurses in Northwest Washington. They have given so much. Every day, our nurses work on the front lines of health care, excruciatingly long hours, to take care of all of us.**Nurses are an essential part of ensuring we all have access to health care.** Right now, nurses and medical professionals nationwide are at the frontlines of the fight for quality, affordable patient care, and health education. Medical disinformation, budget cuts, and attacks on reproductive freedom all complicate an already challenging job. Now, under the Trump administration and his Republican Rip-Off, Medicaid is under threat. Medicaid plays a crucial role in Washington. **Medicaid provides health coverage to 1.5 million Washingtonians, 20.3% of all Washingtonians.** This is a breakdown of who relies on Medicaid for health coverage in Washington:
* **38.3%** of all children
* **35%** of moms giving birth and their newborn babies
* **39.8%** of working-age adults with disabilities
* **59%** of people living in nursing homes
* **15%** of Medicare beneficiaries
* **16.1** % of adults aged 19-64

These indiscriminate budget cuts on Medicaid will impact health care providers, force doors to close, and impact nurses in Washington:
* Washington hospitals received**$828.8 million in Medicaid payments in 2023** , including $418.7 million in Medicaid Disproportionate Share Hospital (DSH) and other supplemental payments that help to offset uncompensated care for Medicaid patients and the uninsured
* Washington mental health facilities, nursing facilities, and intermediate care facilities for people with disabilities received nearly**$1.2 billion in Medicaid payments in 2023**.

**On this National Nurses Day, it is important to recognize all the hard work nurses put in for our community, and push back against this administration and their budget cuts that will negatively impact health care all over Washington.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: I want to take a moment to appreciate all the hardworking nurses in Northwest Washington. | | | | Today is National Nurses Day. I want to take a moment to appreciate all the hardworking nurses in Northwest Washington. They have given so much. Every day, our nurses work on the front lines of health care, excruciatingly long hours, to take care of all of us.Nurses are an essential part of ensuring we all have access to health care. Right now, nurses and medical professionals nationwide are at the frontlines of the fight for quality, affordable patient care, and health education. Medical disinformation, budget cuts, and attacks on reproductive freedom all complicate an already challenging job. Now, under the Trump administration and his Republican Rip-Off, Medicaid is under threat. Medicaid plays a crucial role in Washington. Medicaid provides health coverage to 1.5 million Washingtonians, 20.3% of all Washingtonians. This is a breakdown of who relies on Medicaid for health coverage in Washington: 38.3% of all children 35% of moms giving birth and their newborn babies 39.8% of working-age adults with disabilities 59% of people living in nursing homes 15% of Medicare beneficiaries 16.1 % of adults aged 19-64 These indiscriminate budget cuts on Medicaid will impact health care providers, force doors to close, and impact nurses in Washington: Washington hospitals received$828.8 million in Medicaid payments in 2023 , including $418.7 million in Medicaid Disproportionate Share Hospital (DSH) and other supplemental payments that help to offset uncompensated care for Medicaid patients and the uninsured Washington mental health facilities, nursing facilities, and intermediate care facilities for people with disabilities received nearly$1.2 billion in Medicaid payments in 2023. On this National Nurses Day, it is important to recognize all the hard work nurses put in for our community, and push back against this administration and their budget cuts that will negatively impact health care all over Washington. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: This is what we could be doing, friend.
body:
|
#
Friend, I am in DC this week, where there will be a lot of debate over the budget negotiations. Here’s what we all need to keep in mind:_we have clear choices:_ We _could_ pass a commonsense agenda that actually prioritizes working families – an agenda Democrats and Republicans alike campaigned on. That means:
* – Cutting taxes for working families, and expanding the Child Tax Credit,
* – Defending programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid,
* – Investing in infrastructure and manufacturing,
* – Supporting our law enforcement and military,
* – And actually standing up to China – not just blustering about it.

That’s what we could be doing.

**But instead, what we’re seeing from the far-right extremists running this week’s hearings is something very different:**
* – Tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy,
* – Loopholes that let mega-corporations dodge their taxes,
* – And dangerous proposals to slash essential programs like Medicaid and SNAP in ways that will devastate communities here in Michigan.

This budget fight comes down to a simple, clear choice: do we prioritize our kids and our communities, or hand out more tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations? I know where I stand, and I know you do too. [**That’s why I’m asking you to take a stand with me. Add your name to say you REJECT the GOP’s billionaires-first budget and demand a budget that puts working families first.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107197644/543904042/-1192425086?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzEwZWEwZC05ODJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IOavRcbFfERBh7fRwd5VKCjsMU8fme3WTP0gJmERlw8=&emci=296410dc-6c2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b710ea0d-982a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=27257697) | [Sign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107197645/543904043/-1192425086?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzEwZWEwZC05ODJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IOavRcbFfERBh7fRwd5VKCjsMU8fme3WTP0gJmERlw8=&emci=296410dc-6c2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b710ea0d-982a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=27257697)

Kristen

But instead, what we’re seeing from the far-right extremists running this week’s hearings is something very different: – Tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, – Loopholes that let mega-corporations dodge their taxes, – And dangerous proposals to slash essential programs like Medicaid and SNAP in ways that will devastate communities here in Michigan. This budget fight comes down to a simple, clear choice: do we prioritize our kids and our communities, or hand out more tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations? I know where I stand, and I know you do too. | Thank you, Kristen = | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Michael told me I could reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act]
Hey folks, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Michael's to help build this campaign from the ground up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act]
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – a great deal compared to mainstream options!
Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act]
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
And together, we’ve gotten things done:
Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong
But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.
That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5—about the cost of two Wynkoop pints—to help us build a winning campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act&amount=5]
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act&amount=5]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jwh?refcode=X_250506_hicklaunch_spl_jwh_act]
I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John
https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet [https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet] https://x.com/MichaelBennet [https://x.com/MichaelBennet] https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet [https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet]
Bennet for Governor

Louisville, CO 80027

body:
Our success depends on unified support from patriots like you.

|

| | | **Mission Overview:**
Secretary of State Marco Rubio has been tasked with streamlining U.S. foreign policy by consolidating key agencies under one leader. This critical move will eliminate inefficiency and ensure a unified, powerful American presence abroad.

**Immediate Action Needed:**
We need your support. Sign the official House GOP letter backing Rubio's efforts to strengthen our foreign policy. **His success depends on unified support from patriots like you.**

**[Sign the letter here:](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmub4reccathc4tn1crde882cilaqf93b6sb98eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm2pj6c5h2bs "Sign the letter here:")** **[https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/TYSecRubio](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9lacht8ei747gnrr2ohk9rnfmnf07s8dipu42io_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm2pj6c5h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/TYSecRubio")**

Time is of the essence. Stand with Secretary Rubio today.

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Stop utility companies from charging YOU for their lobbyists and lawyers
body:
Action needed: write your lawmakers to support “getting junk out of our utility bills” TODAY.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107198617/543907329/-1353810674?contactdata=3RQ7D+DniQak+8ADfVotTHKhJa+npuDhoAad3mJsddJuVrL1BQ93ndF0s6WXZTs+Qlr8ZQ+2Lb18X9caRh46c91MKJbCpw+Y7kazDxch5T1X5y5Cvmt7up4zChoynEMQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiZGU1MDc5LTliMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w0Sx6QC9OkMzh6YOg5Ef3ezw3a4xX2F2vvqiY74fO4c=&emci=088b5fbe-062a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=abde5079-9b2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, As Oregonians struggle with skyrocketing utility bills, Oregon's largest utilities are raising rates, making profits, and passing unnecessary costs on to us. Our utility bills are paying for things like expensive lawyers, lobbyists, marketing, and industry association fees. That’s millions of dollars of “junk” on our utility bills every year. Tell your legislators to support Senate Bill 88 - Get the Junk Out of Rates which will help keep Oregonians’ utility bills low by holding large utility companies accountable. **[Can we count on you to contact your lawmakers in support of this bill?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107198619/543907332/-1353810674?contactdata=3RQ7D+DniQak+8ADfVotTHKhJa+npuDhoAad3mJsddJuVrL1BQ93ndF0s6WXZTs+Qlr8ZQ+2Lb18X9caRh46c91MKJbCpw+Y7kazDxch5T1X5y5Cvmt7up4zChoynEMQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiZGU1MDc5LTliMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w0Sx6QC9OkMzh6YOg5Ef3ezw3a4xX2F2vvqiY74fO4c=&emci=088b5fbe-062a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=abde5079-9b2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230) **
---
[ **Make your voice heard** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107198621/543907334/-1353810674?contactdata=3RQ7D+DniQak+8ADfVotTHKhJa+npuDhoAad3mJsddJuVrL1BQ93ndF0s6WXZTs+Qlr8ZQ+2Lb18X9caRh46c91MKJbCpw+Y7kazDxch5T1X5y5Cvmt7up4zChoynEMQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiZGU1MDc5LTliMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w0Sx6QC9OkMzh6YOg5Ef3ezw3a4xX2F2vvqiY74fO4c=&emci=088b5fbe-062a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=abde5079-9b2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
**Oregon’s largest for-profit utilities have raised customers’ bills by about 50% in four years.** Cutting unnecessary charges from our utility bills is an easy way for state leaders to deliver relief to families struggling with rising costs. [Please make your voice heard, Peter, to get the junk out of our rates!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107198623/543907336/-1353810674?contactdata=3RQ7D+DniQak+8ADfVotTHKhJa+npuDhoAad3mJsddJuVrL1BQ93ndF0s6WXZTs+Qlr8ZQ+2Lb18X9caRh46c91MKJbCpw+Y7kazDxch5T1X5y5Cvmt7up4zChoynEMQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiZGU1MDc5LTliMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w0Sx6QC9OkMzh6YOg5Ef3ezw3a4xX2F2vvqiY74fO4c=&emci=088b5fbe-062a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=abde5079-9b2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Make your voice heard** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107198625/543907338/-1353810674?contactdata=3RQ7D+DniQak+8ADfVotTHKhJa+npuDhoAad3mJsddJuVrL1BQ93ndF0s6WXZTs+Qlr8ZQ+2Lb18X9caRh46c91MKJbCpw+Y7kazDxch5T1X5y5Cvmt7up4zChoynEMQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiZGU1MDc5LTliMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w0Sx6QC9OkMzh6YOg5Ef3ezw3a4xX2F2vvqiY74fO4c=&emci=088b5fbe-062a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=abde5079-9b2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
We can protect our families and our budgets by transitioning to affordable clean energy, making energy efficiency upgrades, and holding large utility companies accountable. OLCV and the Building Resilience coalition are working to pass proposals that would help [keep utility bills manageable](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107198627/543907340/-401923353?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiZGU1MDc5LTliMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w0Sx6QC9OkMzh6YOg5Ef3ezw3a4xX2F2vvqiY74fO4c=&emci=088b5fbe-062a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=abde5079-9b2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230) for Oregonians. Oregonians need healthy, affordable homes that run on clean energy. We will get there by putting people over profit to ensure clean, affordable energy for all. Onward,
---
---

clean_body: Action needed: write your lawmakers to support “getting junk out of our utility bills” TODAY.| | | Dear Peter, As Oregonians struggle with skyrocketing utility bills, Oregon's largest utilities are raising rates, making profits, and passing unnecessary costs on to us. Our utility bills are paying for things like expensive lawyers, lobbyists, marketing, and industry association fees. That’s millions of dollars of “junk” on our utility bills every year. Tell your legislators to support Senate Bill 88 - Get the Junk Out of Rates which will help keep Oregonians’ utility bills low by holding large utility companies accountable. Oregon’s largest for-profit utilities have raised customers’ bills by about 50% in four years. Cutting unnecessary charges from our utility bills is an easy way for state leaders to deliver relief to families struggling with rising costs. We can protect our families and our budgets by transitioning to affordable clean energy, making energy efficiency upgrades, and holding large utility companies accountable. OLCV and the Building Resilience coalition are working to pass proposals that would help for Oregonians. Oregonians need healthy, affordable homes that run on clean energy. We will get there by putting people over profit to ensure clean, affordable energy for all. Onward, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director PS: If you want to learn more, follow! | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

How do you respond to horrid bigotry, especially when it's in response to condemning documented racism? **Let 's Address This **in a new issue of "**Hate Mail of the Weak**."
I periodically share this more personal side of my advocacy for human rights because it is important to me that you, my gracious supporters, see what I see. Apologies in advance for the vulgar language in the screen shots below.
**I am doing everything in my power to uphold justice for all people, and I cannot do it alone. Join 130,000+ thoughtful activists and add your name below.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZvrMV8Be2K5UEGdld9Z7pZbC8566PqbZybPhBtdmS1Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162970291)
## How It Started
It started when I posted two notes about how systemic racism in the United States has always been extremely profitable, while Black lives simply haven't mattered.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cec846e3-dd47-4e68-8739-06267f5e0272?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I followed up with another example of how white supremacy has always been lucrative in this country, at the expense of Black and brown lives. And how when I, as a non-Black person speak up for something as critical as reparations for Black Americans, white supremacists respond with similar vitriol.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e336b15-1a1d-469b-9bda-f363fe35059a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Both posts gained popularity, ultimately gaining over 6800 and 16,000 likes, respectively.** That drew the attention of racists, who unleashed grotesque bigotry in response.
## The Racist Response
Last night, I received this from a racist who decided to use his email address, so I have no problem sharing that here. Content warning: Vile racism.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9bbaa96a-975c-4461-b680-ab7b0f28dd7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Remarkably, racists responded with the exact racism I warned they would respond with. Similar dehumanizing racism followed the post online. For example:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3cec5f35-db3f-4c22-953b-8913e98e5e3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Next, racists attempted to gaslight the reality of white supremacy by claiming "Black supremacy" also exists. This is a deliberate strategy to confuse and sanitize the vileness of white supremacy terrorism.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/256b7e2f-920d-41a0-ac07-a1a11eee815e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Note, there's no such thing as "Black supremacy" in terms of race, because as we know race is a social construct. The troll may have had a point about Black supremacy if he was talking about fashion, cooking, music, dance moves, or scholarship given the world's oldest university was established by a Black African Muslim Queen named Fatimah Al-Fihri, but somehow I doubt that was his point. Anyway, and unsurprisingly, what followed was more sanitization of white supremacy by deflecting to so-called "illegal aliens."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04ff2bc5-07b7-474a-9928-e04c9c473695?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's your reminder that immigrants, including undocumented immigrants, have _always_ lower crime rates than native-born U.S. citizens. This has been consistently documented over not just decades, but over centuries. A Northwestern University study looked at [data going back to 1870 and found](https://substack.com/redirect/3f152faa-9e3a-4d3d-b325-145aa64998ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Using incarceration rates as a proxy for crime, a team of economists analyzed 150 years of U.S. Census data and found immigrants were consistently less likely to be incarcerated than people born in the U.S. They also found beginning in 1960, the incarceration gap widened such that immigrants today are 60% less likely to be incarcerated than the U.S.-born. "Our study shows that since 1870, it has never been the case that immigrants as a group have been more incarcerated than the U.S.-born," Jacome said.
In other words, the more immigrants you have in your neighborhood, the statistically safer is your neighborhood.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZvrMV8Be2K5UEGdld9Z7pZbC8566PqbZybPhBtdmS1Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162970291)
## The Bottom Line
I share these experiences because I want you, my readers, to see and understand the unfiltered reality in which so many immigrants, minorities, and Black and brown people experience on the daily. Accordingly, **let me reemphasize my appreciation to each of you for supporting my work and advocacy.** I want you to know that when you subscribe, [whether for free or at $6/month](https://substack.com/redirect/6907c516-5e87-46e2-b43c-25565f67823d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), your support helps me continue to build a platform committed to justice as human rights. Your support matters, and I am immensely grateful to those who help me grow this platform.
**Second, I emphasize again I want each of you to see how the most common response to condemning racism, is more racism.** This is done to maintain the status quo of racism and demonize anyone working to change that status quo. This is why it is simply not enough to be _not_ racist, but we must be actively _anti_ -racist to counter this hate and vitriol. Thank you to those with the courage to lead accordingly.
**Third and finally, all this means we must respond by speaking up loudly. We cannot sit silent, but must continue to speak out.** As I've written before we do this when we tell our stories and share our stories. We do this by investing our time and resources to elevate people doing the work and building that more just and compassionate future. You have my promise to always speak up and uphold justice above all else, period. Let us continue to demand that more humane and just future for this generation and the next.
_**Are you in?**_
**Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Join our movement by subscribing below.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZvrMV8Be2K5UEGdld9Z7pZbC8566PqbZybPhBtdmS1Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162970291)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e9af487-3dae-422a-a882-22d6b7293cd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

| | Dear Fellow American,

Is it possible to repair the CIA?

**[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/dUpa5NLChjVebRdeod_QeXeOewxCgy3mfgFVZZIBo5LPEOje80a6XBcPcWaWy9T_qVDrMgRm0XcWZVmrHAQNtRoVYjT_mXRadGvNhr5JuXDKmqHH0MR3XC40sJhBnZ_0gS3qAOF5BHVZI5ExvpbZLf3-1TT3xLKI5FOnXyAM-QDbReLA5BWDhecKfR3V8sxjqHkCpm17Ldd7t73qOD-myP2_lPRp0Lut6IGE2Qoj5ok9HljDHe6-UZrZi6FkpS0dB0XeRfINxPEPsiplysVH_TtupzxdfquNO-skB37pMDVl2Y7Ye6tjQbznJ18ba33MKNl9kp34mB9Le-rhKjRR57lqaEphLB_-C6gN-RIMwDL85nabuScfR9MCfTOtLw9mSl_sobgtgiRpQebrfi1toH69RqlLGLlL2jDKxDudoQ0vcJQdv_7z3ZxqmMFC/-YdBvgwXqgALopaE8wMO-sER299fnavu/8)****[To answer this question, Hillsdale College has created a FREE online video series on the history of U.S. intelligence](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/-T0sObmjyQT7ZBeAh0F0QgGjlZDvEyJR8Oo5tHuYo_s41X0YiCGeNh4IEjfKPk5REQPItvhB7WJV6lXdP-EKyUosca4tR46UB-plZ1FyP325z-HQhiglNEWkqSnXJ_UHxRaVjmi3ePsSZoLkq_RGeFW-FmsvuQOdu9rIq70a4dkMvX1Z7MyBRxI3wSnrAfqre2UvMfdaZzjawNOdWWAMd5b8ixngtmneZc84IXkesB_MVnOavv0J0TVuLQSprEH6NQIppizkw5Rp9YFjjSzoUub3RpXYfHsIKdBmEqmUzorLyamexS-BcfbmRzPxmFRTmg3VuQht4-3XJPkwA_ILMyNBCYT6ULB8P6PSdiIAV3woqm_OtsyVD4tS3ZrZOxiK6nl1eRYz8aAVTajIB9R8qmvI0YmSTpONfuzqxaj6TGfrYFBzbVccHcL6t2vR/5prJ2xWTqKvQy8GEZGDvBwbW6d0xljtS/8).**

In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn why we need intelligence and how it is used against American citizens and duly elected leaders.

The CIA--originally founded as the OSS--was created in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor to help protect America from foreign threats. But in the last few decades, this agency...
* FAILED to foresee the 9/11 attack and then took over a decade to find Osama Bin Ladin

* COVERED for the Obama administration after the assault on our embassy in Benghazi that led to four American deaths

* THREATENED the sovereignty of the American people with the Russia collusion hoax

* FAILED to warn Americans about COVID-19

* HID the origins of the Hunter Biden laptop and declared it Russian disinformation

America's Founders would not recognize this notorious intelligence agency.

We still need intelligence to help protect us from foreign threats. We needed it in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor, and we need it even more today.

But in recent years, the CIA served its own interests...not those of the American people.

And so it was no surprise that anyone in power who went after the CIA was soon _not_ in power.

You might remember when New York Senator Chuck Schumer told MSNBC, **" Let me tell you, you take on the intelligence community, they have six ways from Sunday at getting back at you."**

Whether or not Schumer meant to make such a revealing statement, it is further evidence that you and I live in a country in which powerful government agencies rarely operate according to the consent of the governed.

How did we get to this point? And how can we reform the CIA and our other intelligence agencies?

**I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free video series, U.S. Intelligence: History and Controversies.**

**You can receive instant access to this series right now using this secure link:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/us-intelligence-cca](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/coeTE1tcatKT2mZ8EYdxE_a7Xzbx63xelRYmIDyERXd6EzC_quo4CLy8j9aAdJlKAbGLPhRBM-IBBHIs5WsXvA0qYxnOVyZ0l8ITtsoGSYFw15UnmcB7TnKgMRMjY1m51UXC-g2wDNlENJrWz4EHNr4TvHqpOaM9_e2OZ1V7tjdYqSHgDHMv43XFCde-9BvDCACantwfNwTSNg9Waw8hYeRQfaxos8VFqblRwJaeFwAGkAERZbdu9UcvP9sxuWv8PsImByIjFQOCOH-Le4BxYNzopxaKce9ebvW5afoIZDsaFreEfgptWzX3c5n6nq1uYPYjYQW5RFk_1Fm6G4VKTCFFkP5_KI5hWRLCG8xgOCR_7qpg6WpZRGx-yffH0C07QifffhaQgRX_xdTO6hryBeX11vDtGSZ4aP3Ya8ZWyTwZDaCaWYssSImpnBrS/k-lIKA8lytz2l-qHdqXWhj4KcKECvIJh/8)

Learning about the history of U.S. intelligence is essential to understanding our current situation. I urge you to watch your free online video series on U.S. intelligence today.

Larry P. Arnn

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/8SBsLETbqPRNFx_CLfyaOIeKJfbXrm71d3c8Rhk-05mPsKeSTVZqScJgCic12g0T2CpBxCX-BiwWCxjm_88YAjTR0hPHnUcggTSsY_VsCSPL4-W9zLFnZ6F0pBUjtBDqXqKbVc1Gd4Vq8T9nDgaGV0mAy9v7NI8k788_HWqg4u0Gmyc7XJzncVD8w0SxUGo_6Fe_DNmQtAfeMqJuSBWcAo4-3_cs-u5X5homig8sEHWLbpoa60WAOc4YCSxro-z9NIC4I4qO9W1eBgrB0fHuQ95gPaWRmWr65RWX7Yo6x2SIIZ1pV2kJHXxLUc310Bi0_W4d9IUUtBMjxUZhx5tM_GAgSxH3Vcj8aKWYqFEn_FHyiAEvmSif3G8d2jS7F2T1latAs6BPfDSBIoeSGhE9BpueJnZqhEct_w5cfwmazaII7pdpJ36XlkLvpfBNTPMAp7Qoxg74sDhCjDSB-sbVxA/ZKkimIbqlYa959WFrURM4Y-hDnmpBi3R/8) Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **[National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/nKxyOoM-O5Nmy0FG0wQj23b-LKSstWkFWmpjECMts791jt72riccGBY7fiKNJZ3UMZQmFgNK7dNtZ8St-F_fEbn-KBT1tgrrnCQgVw1DkzF4nHGGBfIeB90P0if3Pfo_oeurHs_h9wbbIYggd2JNZp0-KL0kAlxR9k4eM7nk7CmXLXWCSNVk69BdhllqUi3BgVwcSbzcSXnLJ9Xp9jXCdsGRUQnUGTZHKnvmmxzwVCxyTDYl-8HpfAyVkfu_nfvdOGjP8ff1bnHMfkhjVUodEoVLID5DHntnyP3nBBrCpR9_QzZzHHBtx2WXziVOpJDarjIlG3E345MZLpRhfs370bfho0E4sDx8yYuRUeO2fiTFGdsdavS-nzeJg8jxdWDqHLpXkgOtO4sgk4rqz39C6AWxBWRJOO8Zrk6QpqJurYqCQVa1P4WoVMO03lNe_590QT-2ytwONUdX_m3DQWLhnA/NUXNtimbvSbhGWwZTcRNALuhfyJpNTYx/8)** is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans.

To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following...
* An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending

* The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong

* An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state

* An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty

* An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions

The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists.

**If we don 't fix this crisis ...**

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people.

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms.

**And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic?_

Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/oqsdgMFhxE6AHoNQnvX5PD-PGZKzpItnbiwoBrcLY_p9qIjS0hyDJVUWF6ajt5oMjBtsWywI4hGM0YGeqh_eRwKOPe52lnr2NWF6WlNJpSsP5g5ZEBf1_-ODLpBFlMIhBgv8Kcl04j2Q-BG6gT4DpvmBuD2ELMyMVzQqzZzFpI7tOEYwX27OEA8BStSYXYj4yPvmBC-f88nID8x10UawIul-EIFS9l4S08DPKrI1wSLkhU0SKPTaaKgABcZ4cr0seSy-IDiQ-zfhDgIM1Gd8SwCzr-BGlWO1C4PPqpPYimm5y3enHtE_xcq-nDYl5sNl6KsqLxVwyH3qdDWjqmaH8iaDgD01FClg-4hF97AyJslIGh3IfwX-E-c1z_y75S5ODa_9_sqEHjkbpOCPNS4YTz9pTXFL0njoJDHDBtsR57EljeMTaHv_1N3vzK54irxdyxCA0Qou9DBovUlNF4XKSA/nAt25CyzlxeDIzKvm4_ZvWugCIkjuse7/8)

Larry P. Arnn

name: Tywana Hampton, =?UTF-8?Q?God=E2=80=99s?= Ballot
subject: Winsome Earle-Sears and I were both Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common:

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr5np7o8vcl4l9jk17cifpmrj4ie9i2e6vb76eao_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmaoj2cph2bs)
---
Friend, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. **Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. **

I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, _"_Obama, of course_!"_
Then my husband introduced me to a book, _Please Stop Helping Us._ This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be __meant__ to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. **But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only _hold folks back_ from rising to the middle class. **

In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?"

I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." _It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. _

As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life.

I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it.

**It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. **

[**Now, Winsome Earle-Sears is running to be Governor, and I 'm so proud to support her and be there for her again. I'm doing her a favor today and emailing you asking you to support her campaign and make history:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcj8uunnkl9skvpcjudeivh4pa5fceugiafpl7mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmaoj2cph2bs)

---
Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on.

**[I hope you'll join me in helping Winsome Earle-Sears win this year!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za9sv807hi3cft1fqu10l774ndh2l50md6p1gdjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmaoj2cph2bs)**

Tywana Hampton

Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z15fcltlr1c86ougv2qgksjgngo9s6osmj7uvc20_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmaoj2cph2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

clean_body: Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: | | | Friend, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, "Obama, of course!" Then my husband introduced me to a book, Please Stop Helping Us. This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be meant to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only hold folks back from rising to the middle class. In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?" I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life. I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it. It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on. Thanks for your time, Tywana Hampton | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107199455/543910142/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg2MDg5Mi05YjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l2rTu570oaVIwll5t5ynrKbsN_yMf8S4cs9VALMCtVs=)
Ever since Donald Trump was sworn back into office, we’ve seen his complete disregard for the Constitution and the rule of law...
* – Disregarding court rulings,
* – Targeting political opponents,
* – Issuing sweeping executive orders that bypass Congress,
* _– And much much more._

**But now, he’s saying the quiet part out loud:**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107199457/543910144/-209663064?refcode=em-5.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg2MDg5Mi05YjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l2rTu570oaVIwll5t5ynrKbsN_yMf8S4cs9VALMCtVs=) **‘I don’t know’: Trump stumped on whether he must uphold the U.S. Constitution**
---
Let that sink in.

The man who took an oath to preserve, protect, and defend the Constitution... now admits he doesn’t even know if he has to follow it.

Horrifying.

[**Our Democratic Secretaries of State are working every day to protect democracy where it begins: the ballot box. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
Hey Derek, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
[**Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff to help build this campaign from the ground up?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.zQGp61&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
[DONATE NOW →](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.CD8zqO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
---
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.zQGp61&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.zQGp61&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service — first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
[**That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5 — about the cost of two Wynkoop pints — to help us build a winning campaign?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.BzosjV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
[DONATE $5 →](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.BzosjV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT →](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.CD8zqO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
---
I know we can win this the Colorado way — by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=may2025_abs_em_hickenlooper.X8yQS4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=8540%2E5257348%2E2YiTb2)**

I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service — first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator. And together, we’ve gotten things done: Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong But there’s still so much more to do — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back. I know we can win this the Colorado way — by bringing people together and solving problems. Thanks for being part of the team. Giddy up, John | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. body:
Texas Organizing Project's aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=wc5eKKFA9YJDXRPyKuaWfn8LYTF501SVh8DiW4JbrdRJF91nglcXmAgj6rJonfXfJ5xUhIGYMzMiEaNDF9AOjUaCiJgw%2Bn811p0625obd1anOzJh3p4PqTrXd%2B%2Bpx9qBLa%2BMs%2FGrFWWuxvSJaHh%2FFmNymMh3%2BnZrFG1RXudbntIR2wxzckCvRvppGdHdK670Cr1CwWv7NVlaCo9dMybH%2F3gh%2F6Sq2iFVX%2F0W3H9ypYZ9OYVfjzW9cZPnUiPBb4Y9kXkHaoEFCvBw9x7BwAvgakuZU6colh4159Y2Z6Y4GE5p5TMdaY16yOp05Rv7jZZcIhjyS4Qm7iNXAD%2FnjI6IwxWgBoHGJnUDV5Sc68D2XnS8QOS%2Fihvd%2FwNl4HkL6JRyFtBxsbKXR%2BHz0YjbRKOGk3g%2Bm%2FWmxClk4E3OzWqFjv8%3D]

CBS Austin: Abbott signs SB14 into law, giving his office DOGE-like powers in Texas

Gov. Abbott is on a power trip so huge you’d think he was trying to copy Elon Musk. Oh wait – he totally is. He even referred to the signing as a nod to DOGE himself.

SB14, the bill he just signed into law, will create an agency just like DOGE for our state government.

It’s the same deal, Peter. They’re trying to position themselves as saving taxpayers money by getting rid of waste, but really they’re costing us jobs, services, support, and critical infrastructure that Texans can’t afford to lose.

This is YET ANOTHER example of Abbott embracing far-right extremism, and if we don’t respond, it could be a disaster for Texas families.

We need to fight back now and keep Abbott’s DOGE out of Texas. Can you chip in to send the message that we’re fired up and ready to fight back?

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_050625_ABBOTT_ATO_D1_S1_RES1

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project's aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] CBS Austin: Abbott signs SB14 into law, giving his office DOGE-like powers in Texas Gov. Abbott is on a power trip so huge you’d think he was trying to copy Elon Musk. Oh wait – he totally is. He even referred to the signing as a nod to DOGE himself. SB14, the bill he just signed into law, will create an agency just like DOGE for our state government. It’s the same deal, Peter. They’re trying to position themselves as saving taxpayers money by getting rid of waste, but really they’re costing us jobs, services, support, and critical infrastructure that Texans can’t afford to lose. This is YET ANOTHER example of Abbott embracing far-right extremism, and if we don’t respond, it could be a disaster for Texas families. We need to fight back now and keep Abbott’s DOGE out of Texas. Can you chip in to send the message that we’re fired up and ready to fight back? – Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] TOP organizes Black and Latino communities in Dallas, Harris, Bexar, Fort Bend, and Tarrant counties with the goal of transforming Texas into a state where they have the power and representation they deserve. Every single day we see Trump’s authoritarianism reach new heights, and

of Pennsylvania.

Bernie can’t do this alone. Our Revolution urgently needs your help to

name: Tywana Hampton, =?UTF-8?Q?God=E2=80=99s?= Ballot
subject: Winsome Earle-Sears and I were both Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common:

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg6g6n4o4vgij01s7s09rb6vcaqlb9q22hd71nl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
Friend, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. **Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. **

I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, _"_Obama, of course_!"_
Then my husband introduced me to a book, _Please Stop Helping Us._ This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be __meant__ to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. **But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only _hold folks back_ from rising to the middle class. **

In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?"

I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." _It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. _

As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life.

I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it.

**It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. **

[**Now, Winsome Earle-Sears is running to be Governor, and I 'm so proud to support her and be there for her again. I'm doing her a favor today and emailing you asking you to support her campaign and make history:**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd8mkv2j13rvml9rp8aetgqhci55rhcg6vih1cn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $25 >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zii81d62tsu0sorjiffv7sre8m62r8v3ub0ecog0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $50 >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8hiqno4pgdv231pnm0j2qg9bc1nodu43i3tjmio_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $100 >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6r63993uu9ksegmq4pirv7i4qqje9v9ic4kpvf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE TODAY >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlmj9efot7i2gol1srhltj5b4dllnq88lrqlb4ho_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on.

**[I hope you'll join me in helping Winsome Earle-Sears win this year!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1qttelher65prh3jg552bo5e6fk80cb15o7e0ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)**
---
[ DONATE TODAY >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8pr6kltlhf9orb4374e1bv2gn43e8e88sf9q1i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
Thanks for your time,
Tywana Hampton
---

|
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpag04mdfb6rui5fcvup4n6urrhkvdnfvra49j8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbj6ugdh0l2cc3a2ntuu32gdoqp5u1p942cl06s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.
---
[ **LEND A HAND** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt6742k5je6t6jqg5rbdk62a1lul8p2sf69rl8jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhm6p36cjh2bs)
---
| |
---

name: Team Crenshaw
subject: President Trump’s First 100 Days — What Do You Think?
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

President Trump just delivered the most consequential first 100 days of an American presidency in a generation.

But while the media ignores his wins and the Left tries to rewrite the narrative, we want to hear directly from YOU.

[👉So please take our 100 Days of Winning Survey now and tell us what you think about the job President Trump has been doing and what you want to see next.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Here’s just a few accomplishments from President Trump’s first 100 days:

✅ Signed the Laken Riley Act to stop violent illegal criminals
✅ Cut DEI mandates and brought merit back to government
✅ Created over 340,000 jobs
✅ Lowered energy prices and unleashed American energy

The results are real — but the fight isn’t over.

We need your voice to help push back against the spin and help us pave the way forward as we continue fighting against the Left to help President Trump keep his promises to the American people.

[Take our 100 Days of Winning Survey now and make your voice heard.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Thank you,

Team Crenshaw

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: I’ve got some not-so-great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
The Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega warchest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress.

|
---
Patriot,

**I have some not-so-great news to share with you.**

I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy.

_**We just missed our most important deadline to date. Our team was only a few bucks away from meeting our goal, but we came up short.**_

This fundraising deadline had a lot of purpose behind it. Ever since conservatives won the House Majority, we've been targeted left and right by Democrats looking to unseat us at any cost.

My team anticipated meeting this goal and beginning our counterattack plan against the Left, but it didn't pan out.

**And get this - the Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega war chest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress.**

I want to make this right and make up this ground. I've asked my finance team, and after some back and forth, they decided to give us ONE MORE PUSH to get it right.
