clean_body: The Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega warchest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress. | Patriot, I have some not-so-great news to share with you. I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy. We just missed our most important deadline to date. Our team was only a few bucks away from meeting our goal, but we came up short. This fundraising deadline had a lot of purpose behind it. Ever since conservatives won the House Majority, we've been targeted left and right by Democrats looking to unseat us at any cost. My team anticipated meeting this goal and beginning our counterattack plan against the Left, but it didn't pan out. And get this - the Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega war chest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress. I want to make this right and make up this ground. I've asked my finance team, and after some back and forth, they decided to give us ONE MORE PUSH to get it right. | To make sure we hit our target, I've offered to email every single conservative I know to try and help out. Listen, I'm asking for even just $1 to make things right here. Everything helps. Thank you, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | Fellow Patriot,
As you know, _America First Legal has been at the forefront of the fight to secure our elections_. Clean elections are essential to safeguard our nation and protect the rule of law — and now we’re celebrating a BIG WIN in our election integrity lawsuit in Arizona.
**Thanks to our lawsuit, all 15 counties in the politically crucial State of Arizona will now be able to work to REMOVE ILLEGAL ALIENS from the state’s voter rolls! This is a major blow to the far left’s open-border agenda. **
The legal settlement in our lawsuit forced Arizona’s County Recorders to work with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security to verify the citizenship status of nearly 50,000 registered voters who have not provided proof of citizenship. _That’s potentially 50,000 fewer illegal alien votes in future elections!_
We applaud President Trump for his bold action via executive order to make Department of Homeland Security resources available to states to fulfill existing verification requirements.
_And we can’t thank our dedicated supporters enough for fueling our America First fight!_

---

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I'm running to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us
body:
Lauren Boebert has failed the families in my hometown. I’m running to defeat her.
| | |
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107201014/543916027/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk10-fr-wm-1-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzE0YzEtOWYyYS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9RtmH1kX0AY7QGKY6vFMSiS8XWUa6RAympfVMY4bmvQ=)
---
Peter, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D) – and I’m running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown.

**In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I’m in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House.[So if you’re ready to join our movement, please chip in $5 or more now to defeat Boebert and build a better future for Colorado.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107201019/543916032/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk10-fr-wm-1-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzE0YzEtOWYyYS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9RtmH1kX0AY7QGKY6vFMSiS8XWUa6RAympfVMY4bmvQ=)**

My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child care provider. From the beginning, they’ve been my models of what servant leadership means.

When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I’ve ever done.

It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are – and I couldn’t believe that our members of Congress weren’t doing more to fix them. **So that’s what I’m doing: I’m running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown.**

That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home.

I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat.

**So, Peter, I’m asking you to join our movement today:[Will you please give $5 now to defeat Lauren Boebert, take back the House for Democrats and give working families the voice they deserve in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107201024/543916039/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk10-fr-wm-1-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzE0YzEtOWYyYS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9RtmH1kX0AY7QGKY6vFMSiS8XWUa6RAympfVMY4bmvQ=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107201029/543916044/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk10-fr-wm-1-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzE0YzEtOWYyYS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9RtmH1kX0AY7QGKY6vFMSiS8XWUa6RAympfVMY4bmvQ=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107201033/543916050/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk10-fr-wm-1-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzE0YzEtOWYyYS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9RtmH1kX0AY7QGKY6vFMSiS8XWUa6RAympfVMY4bmvQ=)

| | [Donate another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107201040/543916058/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk10-fr-wm-1-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzE0YzEtOWYyYS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9RtmH1kX0AY7QGKY6vFMSiS8XWUa6RAympfVMY4bmvQ=)
---
Thank you for your early support. There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing.

In solidarity,

Trisha Calvarese

Derek-
With just days to go, I'm making one last call for sponsors to support the Young Democrats of America and the Minnesota Young DFL as we host our **Spring National Meeting** in**Minneapolis, Minnesota,** from **May 9 -11** at the Royal Sonesta Downtown.

We're expecting nearly 150 Young Democrats from across the country for a powerful weekend of training, networking, and organizing under the theme: "**Winning and Governing: The Minnesota Blueprint for Progress.** " This is a critical moment to invest in the next generation of Democratic leaders. **YDA is a completely volunteer-led organization, every dollar you give goes directly to supporting our mission** -- helping us run accessible, high-impact programming that prepares young Democrats to win elections and govern effectively.

We're doing a last call for persons or campaigns interested in supporting the Young Democrats of America at our **Friends of Young Democrats** (**$100), Bronze ($250)**,**Silver ($500)** , and **Gold ($1000)** sponsorship levels.

Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, Young Democrats of America qocama@yda.org 651-367-4724 | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hey folks, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.

Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Jason Crow to help build this campaign from the ground up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper?amount=]

DONATE NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper?amount=]

Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – a great deal compared to mainstream options!

Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.

Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper]

I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service — first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.

And together, we’ve gotten things done:

* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

But there’s still so much more to do — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.

That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5 — about the cost of two Wynkoop pints — to help us build a winning campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper?amount=5]

DONATE $5 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper?amount=5]

DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-em-hickenlooper?amount=]

I know we can win this the Colorado way — by bringing people together and solving problems.

Thanks for being part of the team.

Giddy up,

John
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “rightwing extremists”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Let’s be clear: That refers to you and me...

| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgn1s3d6665dsvjkl24o9v7suu0k5fp3vv5f9878_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmep76c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Something deeply troubling is happening in our country.
---
Judges are inciting legal warfare against our Republic...
---
...A rogue judge issued a restraining order against Elon Musk to shut down the Department of Government Efficiency.
---
...A rogue judge wants the Trump Administration to get individual warrants for EACH illegal alien that the Administration deports!
---
**_And now, the fate of my freedom – and frankly, my _life_ – is in the hands of a judge appointed by Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary, Janet Napolitano._**
---
_This is the same Homeland Security Secretary who issued a report to crack down on “rightwing extremists” in America._
---
Those so-called rightwing “extremists” are you and me: _people who believe in freedom, individual rights, true justice, and limited government._
---
**And now I’m being put on trial in a sham state case where President Trump has NO AUTHORITY to pardon me.**
---
_When I hear the Left call us “rightwing extremists,” I’m reminded of the time Democrats arrested me in one of the most violent jails in America and called me_ **_P01135780_**. _
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6ls8kpfbrp5bfk31n57k188l5raj44qpbed3370_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmep76c1h2bs)
__
---
_The “P” in my mugshot number is supposed to stand for “prisoner.” But to me, it stands for**PATRIOT!**_
---
_The Left sees all of us freedom-minded individuals as prisoners, deplorables, and extremists. But we’re one thing and one thing alone – _PATRIOTS_._
---
**And as a red-blooded patriot, I will fight for my rights, I will fight for my justice, and I will fight for my LIFE so that I do not spend my 100th birthday in a prison cell as an innocent man.**
---
But to WIN against the cabal of rogue judges that want to treat us like political prisoners for simply believing that we have a God-given right to life and liberty, I’m going to need your support funding my Legal Defense Trust – which truly stands as my last remaining hope.
---
**_But if you cannot afford to, please just stop reading here and go about your day. I mean it!_**
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to help me fight for my freedom, justice, and ultimate vindication as the Democrats try to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zblr88g4mnfnuqb690nukto719656038k5o8uha8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmep76c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z05j3n65uv19aeph33396bsdkke2vdvvufnrack8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmep76c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqqo4luphlapf73glvthcqilns5e31dmuanjhkoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3clhmep76c1h2bs)
---

clean_body: Let’s be clear: That refers to you and me... | Friend, Something deeply troubling is happening in our country. Judges are inciting legal warfare against our Republic... ...A rogue judge issued a restraining order against Elon Musk to shut down the Department of Government Efficiency. ...A rogue judge wants the Trump Administration to get individual warrants for EACH illegal alien that the Administration deports! And now, the fate of my freedom – and frankly, my life – is in the hands of a judge appointed by Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary, Janet Napolitano. This is the same Homeland Security Secretary who issued a report to crack down on “rightwing extremists” in America. Those so-called rightwing “extremists” are you and me: people who believe in freedom, individual rights, true justice, and limited government. And now I’m being put on trial in a sham state case where President Trump has NO AUTHORITY to pardon me. When I hear the Left call us “rightwing extremists,” I’m reminded of the time Democrats arrested me in one of the most violent jails in America and called me P01135780. The “P” in my mugshot number is supposed to stand for “prisoner.” But to me, it stands forPATRIOT! The Left sees all of us freedom-minded individuals as prisoners, deplorables, and extremists. But we’re one thing and one thing alone – PATRIOTS. And as a red-blooded patriot, I will fight for my rights, I will fight for my justice, and I will fight for my LIFE so that I do not spend my 100th birthday in a prison cell as an innocent man. But to WIN against the cabal of rogue judges that want to treat us like political prisoners for simply believing that we have a God-given right to life and liberty, I’m going to need your support funding my Legal Defense Trust – which truly stands as my last remaining hope. But if you cannot afford to, please just stop reading here and go about your day. I mean it! Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: John Hickenlooper is running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Retaking the Senate Majority in 2026 is one of my top priorities, and it’s one of the best ways to hold Donald Trump accountable.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202697/543922368/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=&emci=5c350634-982a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Retaking the Senate Majority in 2026 is one of my top priorities, and it's one of the best ways we have to hold Donald Trump accountable for his abuses of power. That means we need to both flip seats and return all current Democratic Senators. **That's why I'm asking you to support my good friend Colorado Senator John Hickenlooper's re-election campaign.** Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take his competitive seat back. I've known John for a long time. He's not afraid to take on the powerful and privileged, and that's exactly why they want him gone. Take a moment to read his story below, and then, if you can, [**donate any amount to support his campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202703/543922387/610112215?refcode=2025-05-06-merkleyhickenlooper&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=) Onward! _Jeff_
* * *
Hey, I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington. [**Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you donate to help build this campaign from the ground up?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202709/543922404/610112215?refcode=2025-05-06-merkleyhickenlooper&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202727/543922417/610112215?refcode=2025-05-06-merkleyhickenlooper&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=) Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_ **Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there's hardly anything that can't be sorted out over a refreshing pint.** Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop's early days! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202731/543922449/610112215?refcode=2025-05-06-merkleyhickenlooper&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202740/543922464/610112215?refcode=2025-05-06-merkleyhickenlooper&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=) I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator. **And together, we've gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado's economy strong

**But there's still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn't be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.** [**That's why I need you in this fight. Will you donate $5—about the cost of two Wynkoop pints—to help us build a winning campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202744/543922505/610112215?refcode=2025-05-06-merkleyhickenlooper&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107202751/543922533/610112215?refcode=2025-05-06-merkleyhickenlooper&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b837f0-a32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I4MzdmMC1hMzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_FUmGPcZVWgS5TFwxKw-5hydkRPHFpNW-jyfqmigTA=) I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems. clean_body: Retaking the Senate Majority in 2026 is one of my top priorities, and it’s one of the best ways to hold Donald Trump accountable. | | | | Retaking the Senate Majority in 2026 is one of my top priorities, and it's one of the best ways we have to hold Donald Trump accountable for his abuses of power. That means we need to both flip seats and return all current Democratic Senators. That's why I'm asking you to support my good friend Colorado Senator John Hickenlooper's re-election campaign. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take his competitive seat back. I've known John for a long time. He's not afraid to take on the powerful and privileged, and that's exactly why they want him gone. Take a moment to read his story below, and then, if you can, = Onward! Jeff Hey, I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington. = = Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – a great deal compared to mainstream options! Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there's hardly anything that can't be sorted out over a refreshing pint. Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop's early days! = = I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator. And together, we've gotten things done: Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado's economy strong But there's still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn't be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back. = = I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems. Thanks for being part of the team. Giddy up, John | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Rebecca Cooke HQ
subject: Putting Wisconsin first
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107203678/543926028/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIyNjIxNy1hNTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GILAFXHJvYinvyspAVErxMGIieng9hIQhGjGKxekSk8=&emci=b1226217-a52a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b2226217-a52a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=5944223)
Peter, Wisconsin families face far too many struggles right now. **From the rising costs of healthcare to affording groceries, we need real relief, not oligarchy and extremism. And Derrick Van Orden has proven he’s only here to make the problem worse.** Van Orden is more concerned with cozying up to caviar conservatives than protecting Medicare and Social Security. In fact, he backs this administration's tariffs that are already causing serious negative implications for our manufacturing industry, agricultural sector and on prices to consumers. **That’s why we need to elect leaders who will put real, working class Wisconsinites first.** In Congress, Rebecca WILL:
* Protect Social Security and work to expand Medicare to cover vision, dental and hearing
* Support our unions and their efforts to elevate working class Wisconsinites

And she WON’T:
* Undercut our manufacturers and our farmers
* Try to sell out our seniors for billionaire tax cuts

Rebecca knows what working families need, because she’s part of one. And when elected, she’lll make policy that works for us -- not the elite. But if we’re going to make that worker-first government a reality, she needs your support:

[**Will you consider chipping in a $3 contribution to help elect a real representative for WI-03? Every dollar goes a long way in this swing district.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107203679/543926029/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIyNjIxNy1hNTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GILAFXHJvYinvyspAVErxMGIieng9hIQhGjGKxekSk8=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107203680/543926030/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.6.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIyNjIxNy1hNTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GILAFXHJvYinvyspAVErxMGIieng9hIQhGjGKxekSk8=)******

clean_body: | Peter, Wisconsin families face far too many struggles right now. From the rising costs of healthcare to affording groceries, we need real relief, not oligarchy and extremism. And Derrick Van Orden has proven he’s only here to make the problem worse. Van Orden is more concerned with cozying up to caviar conservatives than protecting Medicare and Social Security. In fact, he backs this administration's tariffs that are already causing serious negative implications for our manufacturing industry, agricultural sector and on prices to consumers. That’s why we need to elect leaders who will put real, working class Wisconsinites first. In Congress, Rebecca WILL: Protect Social Security and work to expand Medicare to cover vision, dental and hearing Support our unions and their efforts to elevate working class Wisconsinites And she WON’T: Undercut our manufacturers and our farmers Try to sell out our seniors for billionaire tax cuts Rebecca knows what working families need, because she’s part of one. And when elected, she’lll make policy that works for us -- not the elite. name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’d be the first gay man in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
My community showed me what’s possible.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17bd3cfd-0dc4-4791-bb59-0358d4a2e23e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| When I was a kid, reading this kind of headline would have been unimaginable, Peter: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b100c66-8aae-444d-a84e-5bbdb9a8614a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Growing up as a gay person in New Hampshire, I never imagined I could live openly — let alone run for U.S. Senate. But my community showed me what's possible. You helped me win four times in one of the most competitive congressional districts in the country. We’ve made tremendous progress since I was younger. But there’s still something we’ve never done. We’ve never elected a gay man to the Senate. To be clear I’m not running for Senate just to make history. I’m in this race for the people of New Hampshire – all of us. But the prospect of moving the needle of progress forward is deeply meaningful to me. This is an opportunity for representation in the Senate. It’s also important that LGBTQ+ people have more seats at the table at a time when our rights are coming under attack. We can win this election for the people of New Hampshire, charting a path forward for our shared future – and we can tear down barriers and make history at the same time. [Will you split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now to stand with me in this historic fight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta601fb4d-8eda-4cd2-b496-2db5427b9fd7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for supporting me in this campaign, Peter. No matter who you are, who you love, who you pray to, or where you're from — know that I'll always have your back. With gratitude, Chris

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb3ce8d7-d00f-4e60-a238-74186499d6c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Sharice Davids
subject: There’s nothing we can’t build together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I understand that thinking about the future right now is scary

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107203782/543926421/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNDI1NS1hNTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igP4pH3UZaHqRVVj35EY2kYBBZyXnVhY2JDQQou5hG0=) I understand that thinking about the future right now is scary. Access to affordable health care is in flux, everyday life is getting even more unaffordable, and the President of the United States has even turned a blind eye to the rule of law itself. Listen, the actions of Donald Trump and National Republicans are truly hitting people where it hurts. But despite these immense challenges, I am still hopeful for the future. **Because I won’t give up this fight — and I know you won’t either.** Over the last four months, I’ve witnessed the grit, determination, and tenacity of supporters like you firsthand. I’ve seen folks in Kansas and across the country, including many who were previously tuned out of politics, protest in their communities, organize their neighborhoods, and get involved. That patriotism is truly inspiring. It inspires me to fight for a future where every Kansan has the opportunity to not just get by, but to get ahead. A future where people’s basic needs are met. A future where everyone’s fundamental freedoms are protected. And a future where our government works for _all of us_ , not just the rich and powerful. **That’s the future I’m proud to fight for every day in Congress, and I won’t let anyone get in my way.** [_**If you’re committed to building that future with me, I’d be extremely grateful to have your support. We know that National Republicans will stop at nothing to spread lies, smear my record, and kick me out of office, so I really need your help to fight back and keep KS-03 blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107203783/543926422/-945052836?refcode=email_050625_Future&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNDI1NS1hNTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igP4pH3UZaHqRVVj35EY2kYBBZyXnVhY2JDQQou5hG0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107203784/543926423/-945052836?refcode=email_050625_Future&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNDI1NS1hNTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igP4pH3UZaHqRVVj35EY2kYBBZyXnVhY2JDQQou5hG0=)

clean_body: I understand that thinking about the future right now is scary = I understand that thinking about the future right now is scary. Access to affordable health care is in flux, everyday life is getting even more unaffordable, and the President of the United States has even turned a blind eye to the rule of law itself. Listen, the actions of Donald Trump and National Republicans are truly hitting people where it hurts. But despite these immense challenges, I am still hopeful for the future. Because I won’t give up this fight — and I know you won’t either. Over the last four months, I’ve witnessed the grit, determination, and tenacity of supporters like you firsthand. I’ve seen folks in Kansas and across the country, including many who were previously tuned out of politics, protest in their communities, organize their neighborhoods, and get involved. That patriotism is truly inspiring. It inspires me to fight for a future where every Kansan has the opportunity to not just get by, but to get ahead. A future where people’s basic needs are met. A future where everyone’s fundamental freedoms are protected. And a future where our government works for all of us , not just the rich and powerful. That’s the future I’m proud to fight for every day in Congress, and I won’t let anyone get in my way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can’t thank you enough for your continued support. | | Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky. But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get _enough_ of attacking me for: not being rich. What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need _more_ of. **We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need _you_ , Peter.** [**_If you believe in having representatives who can _actually_ represent the lives real people live, will you chip in to my campaign right now? Every dollar helps me keep fighting for us in Congress, and build a fair future for the working class >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/E5dvyVXRxIWAQ4tTvlluRw~~/AAPPABA~/mKKdVDrA0k2nBNrn5ZoH5sc1wxLewOVgjh9j_NW-bo9A_CruTkzex_YuLkAaNiIBxo-BJywQ_3HAyjfAxiqOqK7T3FErhRnzSqWhWkRkuLsD6Q8wJTG9rFVbl6dOylalmBEYM263R-TEJCzesqtP0CUkEenXz32DeCBj9wQb5ZyG6npLoO7tjKp6TQxOeRHY-P75wqcQm0B3iI-HrzE_jm7dqXGPOMaExpTE7fQHfzpwSe_H3Wa5v6UUgE9pk-GqnYzNo04M2UyfTmqBBvGU6L3adlIPO94oUM-65lJ9fi_KhJ6kmZ4EbRYQvXLpVsH2O5PWpJJerJFqnWD9E_JfuXynme3zGbQji82bqOfB9EY~) | [DONATE $27 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/0YnDsuPQb-2Cqx6lqxoAAA~~/AAPPABA~/mKKdVDrA0k2nBNrn5ZoH5sc1wxLewOVgjh9j_NW-bo9A_CruTkzex_YuLkAaNiIBqTYGvdIG0zpm0DoBl81kPQCzXdQm3FVLyUD_CoXR_dr-HHFsZsa_ECSCWOq1PglVKpJ09P0E0ZILbX7OZtM-lhcOxm_jZUpS7M21rpP_xr8Mr5LOHE0BW03RHMKjeaB69uqNDjdjOCv-dPf8xaNSuDytsGnzlIFOQtCyQz0gqTYvJSD0qMPdm3tJkvx54aG7HiKJORWEWXiRgUP7esrcCPGlh04btve3_O3zBB_0J4lCOIKug7XgfCI5xQumH5B4Yn4VFzN721MnO5OdJui4cCm6xaodf31ki0PROz3MxVA~)

I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family _fought_ to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot.
It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, Peter. Because working people know – we’re in this together.
But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class _priorities._ **You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care.
**
[**_I’m fighting to stay in Congress because I care, Peter. But the born-rich Republican donor class hates that, and will spend whatever it takes to hold me back. I need your help to stay here and build the world we deserve despite them. Will you rush $27 or whatever you can afford to my campaign right now to help me fight for working people? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/E5dvyVXRxIWAQ4tTvlluRw~~/AAPPABA~/mKKdVDrA0k2nBNrn5ZoH5sc1wxLewOVgjh9j_NW-bo9A_CruTkzex_YuLkAaNiIBxo-BJywQ_3HAyjfAxiqOqK7T3FErhRnzSqWhWkRkuLsD6Q8wJTG9rFVbl6dOylalmBEYM263R-TEJCzesqtP0CUkEenXz32DeCBj9wQb5ZyG6npLoO7tjKp6TQxOeRHY-P75wqcQm0B3iI-HrzE_jm7dqXGPOMaExpTE7fQHfzpwSe_H3Wa5v6UUgE9pk-GqnYzNo04M2UyfTmqBBvGU6L3adlIPO94oUM-65lJ9fi_KhJ6kmZ4EbRYQvXLpVsH2O5PWpJJerJFqnWD9E_JfuXynme3zGbQji82bqOfB9EY~)

Ridiculous.

Secondly, the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office released an analysis saying that Republicans aren’t going to be able to make the kind of budget cuts they’re promising without slashing Medicaid.

It doesn’t matter that they know that more than 70 million Americans rely on Medicaid for health care. Or that Medicaid insures one out of every three children with cancer in the United States. Or that depending on how deep their cuts go, we could see rural hospitals close down.

**Republicans want to rip health care away from MILLIONS of Americans to give tax cuts to the wealthiest few. They’d rather do whatever it takes to keep their rich, well-connected special interests happy than protect the health care of those they were elected to represent.**

I promise I’ll fight these dangerous cuts every step of the way, but today, I’m asking if you’ll join me, because this isn’t a fight I can win alone. I need you to speak up and fight back.

Or that depending on how deep their cuts go, we could see rural hospitals close down. Republicans want to rip health care away from MILLIONS of Americans to give tax cuts to the wealthiest few. They’d rather do whatever it takes to keep their rich, well-connected special interests happy than protect the health care of those they were elected to represent. I promise I’ll fight these dangerous cuts every step of the way, but today, I’m asking if you’ll join me, because this isn’t a fight I can win alone. I need you to speak up and fight back. Thank you for making your voice heard in this fight, Mark Warner * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

# [The 2026 Democratic Challenger Guide](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162990958&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyOTkwOTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY1NTY4MDcsImV4cCI6MTc0OTE0ODgwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.lg3jM0dOdb28NgpCqVjK_O6X77mfH4XyU2Lpi9E5tHc)
### A mathematical analysis of who's the most MAGA Democrat
May 6
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162990958&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyOTkwOTU4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjU1NjgwNywiZXhwIjoxNzQ5MTQ4ODA3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.3pbD_wg3zwbxs2Y1PKNfSalEvOrOQ4MiAznv67VIPh8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162990958&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyOTkwOTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY1NTY4MDcsImV4cCI6MTc0OTE0ODgwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.lg3jM0dOdb28NgpCqVjK_O6X77mfH4XyU2Lpi9E5tHc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162990958&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyOTkwOTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY1NTY4MDcsImV4cCI6MTc0OTE0ODgwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.lg3jM0dOdb28NgpCqVjK_O6X77mfH4XyU2Lpi9E5tHc)
---
| | [](https://substack..uiGbPN3yHLTP0UN15qFS0TiUPfMiwRXg5WZtaHHJMnw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/the-2026-democratic-challenger-guide?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Based on the voting records and bill proposals of every member of the Democratic Party in the U.S. House of Representatives in 25 key legislative votes1, I've developed an index which Democrats should use as a guide for challenging those in our ranks who do not support us or democracy in 2026.
I looked at legislation during the 118th and 119th congressional sessions in which only a small percent of Democrats broke with the party in voting for GOP-sponsored legislation.
Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OkXAul0gvZMuKFPN2Yv01wOCtyL77tV34NTBkipHU0c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162990958)
Most of the legislation considered fell under one of five umbrellas: immigration, the environment/climate change, economic welfare, free speech, and MAGA "show laws" (_like the absurd "Gas Stove Freedom Act"_).
This is not simply a liberal-or-conservative scale and it does not consider tweets, dramatic speeches on the house floor, or one-liners and talking points on the news, only their legislative record.
Which, at the end of the day, is all that really matters when electing someone to congress to legislate.
There are 213 Democrats currently serving in the House of Representatives.
Sixty-one Democrats scored highly enough to be considered outside the normal clustering pattern for the party, though there were 32 amongst them who broke away even from that group.
The top nine voted more with the GOP on divisive legislation than they did with Democrats.
_I will warn you_ : you might see representatives on this list that you like. I was surprised and even hurt to see someone I campaigned for in the last cycle on this list.
But this is the reality.
Remember that a large part of running for and staying in Congress now is marketing.
What someone says and what they actually do on their job can be two entirely different things.
Based on the index, **here are the representatives Democrats need to start working toward primarying, starting with the worst for our democracy:**
1. Moskowitz (FL)
2. Perez (WA)
3. Davis (NC)
4. Golden (ME)
5. Gillen (NY)
6. Gottheimer (NJ)
7. Costa (CA)
8. Cuellar (TX)
9. Landsman (OH)
10. Craig (MN)
11. Gonzalez (TX)
12. Gray (CA)
13. Lee (NV)
14. Pappas (NH)
15. Suozzi (NY)
16. Ryan (NY)
17. Shrier (WA)
18. Kaptur (OH)
19. Torres (NY)
20. Morelle (NY)
21. Horsford (NV)
22. Soto (FL)
23. Vindman (VA)
24. Budzinski (IL)
25. Case (HI)
26. Davids (KS)
27. Goldman (NY)
28. Harder (CA)
29. Houlahan (PA)
30. Scholton (MI)
31. Stanton (AZ)
32. Wasserman-Schults (FL)

* * *
_**What about the good ones?**_
If you want to know who is out there voting to save democracy, the way I created this index allows me to pull out lists from within subject areas.
Here are the top 10, starting with the highest scoring at #1, for those working hardest to ensure our civil rights and freedoms are not trampled out, that our universities are not dismantled, and that agencies continue to protect the people as they're supposed to.
1. TLAIB (MI)
2. OMAR (MN)
3. OCASIO-CORTEZ (NY)
4. PRESSLEY (MA)
5. LEE (PA)
6. GARCIA (IL)
7. CASAR (TX)
8. RAMIREZ (IL)
9. FROST (FL)
10. GARCIA (CA)

On these issues, for example, Moskowitz (FL) ranks #357 out of 438 for all representatives -- in the bottom 20% of ALL of the House of Representatives (even Republicans).
If you want to know who is working the hardest on fighting for economic justice, working class people and families, and unions, here are your top ten, from the highest scoring at #1.
1. GARCIA (TX)
2. TURNER (TX)
3. ANSARI (AZ)
4. BELL (MO)
5. WATERS (CA)
6. CASTEN (IL)
7. JAYAPAL (WA)
8. CLARKE (NY)
9. SIMON (CA)
10. SCHAKOWSKY (IL)2

1
_Some of the key legislation considered included:_
H.Res. 189, S.5., HR 867, H.Res. 845, H.J.Res.88, H.R. 22, H.R.1048, S.J. Res.11, H.J.Res.42, H.J.Res.61, H.R.1640, H.J.Res.20, H.R.35, H.R.26, H.R.23
2
Schakowsky [announced this week ](https://substack.com/redirect/7dda5786-21a9-41a8-a318-e59d1d352aaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that she does not intend to run for re-election in 2026, which leaves the seat to an open primary. Illinois' 9th district is entirely urban and based in the greater Chicago area. It is a safe seat for Democrats that will be determined in the primaries.

Peter,
Over the weekend, Donald Trump openly admitted what we’ve known for years: **he doesn’t care about upholding the Constitution. **
In a jaw-dropping interview, Trump was asked if every American has a right to due process. His response: “I don’t know.” When pressed on whether he needs to uphold the Constitution, the very document he swore to defend, he repeated: “I don’t know.”
**Trump is no longer hiding his disregard for the rule of law. That’s why we need leaders like Attorney General Keith Ellison.**
It’s Keith’s job to protect our rights and uphold the Constitution. In the past three months, he has joined several lawsuits and successfully blocked some of the Trump administration’s most disastrous and unconstitutional policies.
But this fight is far from over. Keith needs to know we’ve got his back so he can keep focusing on holding Trump accountable.
Thanks to Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, **you can support Keith and his work at no cost to you.** All you need to do is make a contribution of $75 (or $150 for couples), and you’ll receive a full refund from the Minnesota Department of Revenue.

clean_body: Over the weekend, Donald Trump openly admitted what we’ve known for years: he doesn’t care about upholding the Constitution. | = Peter, Over the weekend, Donald Trump openly admitted what we’ve known for years: he doesn’t care about upholding the Constitution. In a jaw-dropping interview, Trump was asked if every American has a right to due process. His response: “I don’t know.” When pressed on whether he needs to uphold the Constitution, the very document he swore to defend, he repeated: “I don’t know.” Trump is no longer hiding his disregard for the rule of law. That’s why we need leaders like Attorney General Keith Ellison. It’s Keith’s job to protect our rights and uphold the Constitution. In the past three months, he has joined several lawsuits and successfully blocked some of the Trump administration’s most disastrous and unconstitutional policies. But this fight is far from over. Keith needs to know we’ve got his back so he can keep focusing on holding Trump accountable. Thanks to Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, you can support Keith and his work at no cost to you. My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. clean_body: | | | | | | | My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | |

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I’m running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
Hey there, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.

[**_Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand to help build this campaign from the ground up?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206021/543933876/-122925818?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_Hickenlooper-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDYyMmYzMy1hYjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4iByd-XCB1K_i3t0VNlKzjG2vvAGqGGqxGTqNarZFk=) | | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206022/543933878/-122925818?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_Hickenlooper-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDYyMmYzMy1hYjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4iByd-XCB1K_i3t0VNlKzjG2vvAGqGGqxGTqNarZFk=)
---
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint — _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_

**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**

Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206023/543933880/-122925818?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_Hickenlooper-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDYyMmYzMy1hYjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4iByd-XCB1K_i3t0VNlKzjG2vvAGqGGqxGTqNarZFk=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206024/543933882/-122925818?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_Hickenlooper-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDYyMmYzMy1hYjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4iByd-XCB1K_i3t0VNlKzjG2vvAGqGGqxGTqNarZFk=)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service — first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.

**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**

[**_That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5 — about the cost of two Wynkoop pints — to help us build a winning campaign?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206025/543933884/-122925818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.06_Hickenlooper-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDYyMmYzMy1hYjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4iByd-XCB1K_i3t0VNlKzjG2vvAGqGGqxGTqNarZFk=)

I know we can win this the Colorado way — by bringing people together and solving problems.

Thanks for being part of the team.

John

name: Andie Levien, DNC
subject: The DNC’s lawsuit against Trump
body:
I’m Andie, the DNC’s General Counsel.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=567%2E2563979%2EbgRw3E)

I’m Andie, the DNC’s General Counsel — which means it’s my job to oversee all legal issues related to the Party’s work. This means that in addition to helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot, I’m in charge of holding Republicans accountable to the Constitution.
Trump recently signed an executive order that attempts to suppress voters, upend voter registration systems, stop states from counting eligible mail ballots, and withhold federal funding from dozens of states in the process.
Democrats have one message for him: We’ll see you in court.
The DNC, along with other Democratic committees and key Democratic leaders, has filed a lawsuit against President Trump, DOGE, and other departments within the Trump administration to block Trump’s unconstitutional order.
Trump’s order not only violates multiple federal laws but also attacks the right to vote by mail and makes it harder for married women who have changed their names and military members to have their votes count.
The order also allows DOGE to access sensitive personal information and makes it harder for states to run their own free and fair elections.
It's anti-American, and Democrats are using every tool at our disposal — including taking Trump to court — to stop this power-grab that undermines our democracy.
But we need your help to fight and win.
[**Going up against Trump and the richest man in the world is not easy — but Democrats are committed to keeping up the fight. If work like this is important to you, I hope you’ll consider contributing to the Democratic National Committee to help fund it.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250506d&refcode2=567_2563979_bgRw3E&akid=567%2E2563979%2EbgRw3E)

clean_body: I’m Andie, the DNC’s General Counsel. I’m Andie, the DNC’s General Counsel — which means it’s my job to oversee all legal issues related to the Party’s work. This means that in addition to helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot, I’m in charge of holding Republicans accountable to the Constitution. Trump recently signed an executive order that attempts to suppress voters, upend voter registration systems, stop states from counting eligible mail ballots, and withhold federal funding from dozens of states in the process. Democrats have one message for him: We’ll see you in court. The DNC, along with other Democratic committees and key Democratic leaders, has filed a lawsuit against President Trump, DOGE, and other departments within the Trump administration to block Trump’s unconstitutional order. Trump’s order not only violates multiple federal laws but also attacks the right to vote by mail and makes it harder for married women who have changed their names and military members to have their votes count. The order also allows DOGE to access sensitive personal information and makes it harder for states to run their own free and fair elections. It's anti-American, and Democrats are using every tool at our disposal — including taking Trump to court — to stop this power-grab that undermines our democracy. But we need your help to fight and win. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you again for your support as we fight back against Trump to protect our democracy. I’ll keep you posted. Andie Andrea Levien General Counsel Democratic National Committee Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.

name: Becca Balint
subject: When enough of us say no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
This will all end when enough of us say no. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206175/543934342/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDBlNTNjOS1hYjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-l8LrWeWUH3ys-OCIrN1Czi7dkSol7uNg9nrIiTz-Do=)
---
How is this all going to end? When are we going to get ourselves out of this mess? A lot of people keep asking me that, Peter, My answer to them is pretty simple: **This will all end when enough of us say no. ** When enough of us say no to attacking immigrants and migrants. When enough of us say no to attacking the judiciary and checks and balances. When enough of us say no to this asinine trade policy When enough of us say no to a tax policy that only works for the wealthy and no one else. When enough of us say no to cutting Medicaid and Social Security, and other support programs that families need. When enough of us say no to an administration that does not give a damn about working people. That’s how we get out of this mess, Peter. It’s going to take real courage, and it’s going to take all of us. **But we have to come together and use every single voice that we can muster to say no.** That’s when it will end. **[If you’re ready to stand with me and thousands of other folks on this team to say no to Donald Trump’s extreme agenda, pitch in any amount today. clean_body: This will all end when enough of us say no. | = How is this all going to end? When are we going to get ourselves out of this mess? A lot of people keep asking me that, Peter, My answer to them is pretty simple: This will all end when enough of us say no. When enough of us say no to attacking immigrants and migrants. When enough of us say no to attacking the judiciary and checks and balances. When enough of us say no to this asinine trade policy When enough of us say no to a tax policy that only works for the wealthy and no one else. When enough of us say no to cutting Medicaid and Social Security, and other support programs that families need. When enough of us say no to an administration that does not give a damn about working people. That’s how we get out of this mess, Peter. It’s going to take real courage, and it’s going to take all of us. But we have to come together and use every single voice that we can muster to say no. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206543/543935818/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjQyNTY1ZS1hYzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NrwCGahv4pU2qpyuUuibsQEUE24uu25Z4QB8zw0nts=)
This is important, Peter:

**The Trump administration recently proposed a 25% cut to NASA in the largest-scale attack on the agency in history.**

If the budget proposal passes, the scale of the devastation to NASA and the scientific community would be unprecedented. It would:

❌ End critical missions and risk our scientific leadership in the US and abroad
❌ Scale back the workforce and harm our ability to grow the future in STEM
❌ Harm our ability to monitor climate hazards including devastating wildfires

**These attacks are personal to me: I served as NASA’s Chief of Staff under President Obama.** I saw firsthand how people of all stripes and political beliefs put aside their differences to move the country forward together.

Now, our ability to make progress in space and science are at risk of being irreconcilably altered by this administration’s rash funding decisions.

**[It’s downright irresponsible, and with your help, we can fight back. If you’re with me, will you sign onto my petition to protect NASA right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206545/543935819/-635348808?refcode=em-5.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjQyNTY1ZS1hYzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NrwCGahv4pU2qpyuUuibsQEUE24uu25Z4QB8zw0nts=&emci=cd2b8c57-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=7b42565e-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Sign now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206546/543935820/-635348808?refcode=em-5.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjQyNTY1ZS1hYzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NrwCGahv4pU2qpyuUuibsQEUE24uu25Z4QB8zw0nts=&emci=cd2b8c57-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=7b42565e-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=36198509)****
---

We must stand together in defense of science before this funding proposal is passed.

Thanks for being with me in the fight,

George

body:
Stand with PBS and NPR as they fight for funding >>

| | **Last week,** Trump issued an executive order stripping NPR and PBS of federal funding threatening the future of public broadcasting altogether!

**This past weekend,** PBS’s chief executive, Paula Kerger, warned that **some local stations could lose up to half of their funding.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107206598/543935965/-583442086?refcode=NDCAF_20250506_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M4ZjE1MC1hYzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0gVoeK40sXbQKZkOkwAH8yz5fXQY2l4gYgyKl5d-uFc=&emci=e0100302-8d2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=6cc8f150-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=48524772)****[Tthese are lifelines for trusted news, children’s programming, and emergency information that we can’t risk losing — especially in small and rural communities! name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: There’s power in our purpose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
Team — I have exciting news to share:
My new book, _The Purposeful Warrior_ , comes out today!
It started as my take on what it was like to stand up to a President and protect the votes of Michiganders in 2020. And then it evolved into a book about the power we all have to define a better world — for ourselves, the people we love, and the places we call home — even in turbulent times.
I started writing this book right after the 2020 election when folks were anxious and scared about their future. Now in 2024, we’re in that situation of chaos, confusion, and concern once again.
From my early years investigating extremist groups to defending our democracy and election integrity even in the face of armed protestors at my home, I’ve committed myself to being a warrior for good, even in turbulent times.
[**As the next Governor of Michigan, I will be a purposeful warrior for everyone in our state, working tirelessly to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home. Please pitch in to help elect this purposeful warrior as our next governor!**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q22025.lB2dD6&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q22025.a7vAC6&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q22025.QdisXL&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q22025.YpMn4N&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q22025.YCwtNX&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
---
I bet you’re a purposeful warrior too, even if you don’t know it yet!
As I wrote in my book,
_Choosing to be a purposeful warrior helps us channel our passion and beliefs, unique and authentic to ourselves, into**a powerful pathway that advances our ideals and values.** It entails not accepting the world as given to you, the definitions others place on you, or the limits you worry might define you. Instead, you take your skills, talents, faith, and wherewithal and channel it all into aspirations that are entirely yours. And when you encounter the proverbial wind in your face that might deter you on your mission, you respond by redefining what’s possible. **The power of the warrior ethos allows you to embrace the fight and _win it._**_
I’m traveling around Michigan, sharing my vision for the future of our state with people from Detroit to the Upper Peninsula and everywhere in between.
There are purposeful warriors everywhere you look — and together, we’re building a stronger, safer, more affordable, and prosperous state for us all.
[**There’s power in our purpose — and right now, I believe my purpose is to lead our state forward. Please chip in to help elect me as governor!**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)
Thank you!
— Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=10&akid=281%2E181023%2EWf5ZQM)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

Together, we can send Trump and the pundits a RESOUNDING message – but only if we band together ASAP to deliver a historic grassroots response. Peter, I recently had the pleasure of connecting with dedicated Democrats in Lenoir County, North Carolina, engaging in meaningful discussions about the challenges we face and the solutions we can pursue together. _Rural outreach is crucial, and town halls like this are where change begins._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107207101/543937462/-1527836139?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk3MDBlOS1hYzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k66Hy1JPFMcYW5QmNcBN-or2soHl9egdOLa6Lx22F3Q=&emci=229700e9-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=239700e9-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=28008880) **At the town hall, we addressed critical topics impacting North Carolinians every day. We spoke on the threats posed by billionaires who are undermining essential services like Medicare and education, making it harder for our families to thrive. We also tackled the issue of political insiders like Thom Tillis, who consistently put personal gain and political agendas ahead of the well-being of our communities.** His lack of leadership is in line with Washington Republicans which results in policies that cater to the ultra-wealthy and special interests, often at the expense of hardworking North Carolinians. Under Tillis's watch, working families face rising costs, fewer fundamental rights, and reduced access to essential services. And I’m seriously concerned about the national debt. But let’s be clear — Republicans are the ones driving it up with massive tax cuts for billionaires. _It’s hypocrisy, plain and simple and working families are the ones left footing the bill._ **At the town hall, your voices made it clear: it's time for leadership that prioritizes people over profit and listens to those who truly need representation.** Together, we can bring about the change that North Carolinians deserve, focusing on real solutions that uplift our communities. _Thanks to Lenoir County Dems for having me out to talk about the mess in Washington and how we can work together and fight back!_ Now, I want to hear from you. If I could, I’d speak with each and every one of you to hear your thoughts and concerns directly, Peter. But responding to this email is the next best thing — your input is crucial in helping us shape policies that truly reflect the needs and priorities of North Carolinians. Your perspective can drive solutions. **[Please take 30 seconds to complete my survey. What is the most pressing issue you believe North Carolina faces today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107207102/543937463/-1527836139?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk3MDBlOS1hYzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k66Hy1JPFMcYW5QmNcBN-or2soHl9egdOLa6Lx22F3Q=&emci=229700e9-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=239700e9-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=28008880)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107207103/543937464/-1527836139?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk3MDBlOS1hYzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k66Hy1JPFMcYW5QmNcBN-or2soHl9egdOLa6Lx22F3Q=&emci=229700e9-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=239700e9-ac2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=28008880)
