clean_body: | = Peter, I recently had the pleasure of connecting with dedicated Democrats in Lenoir County, North Carolina, engaging in meaningful discussions about the challenges we face and the solutions we can pursue together. Rural outreach is crucial, and town halls like this are where change begins. At the town hall, we addressed critical topics impacting North Carolinians every day. We spoke on the threats posed by billionaires who are undermining essential services like Medicare and education, making it harder for our families to thrive. We also tackled the issue of political insiders like Thom Tillis, who consistently put personal gain and political agendas ahead of the well-being of our communities. His lack of leadership is in line with Washington Republicans which results in policies that cater to the ultra-wealthy and special interests, often at the expense of hardworking North Carolinians. Under Tillis's watch, working families face rising costs, fewer fundamental rights, and reduced access to essential services. And I’m seriously concerned about the national debt. But let’s be clear — Republicans are the ones driving it up with massive tax cuts for billionaires. It’s hypocrisy, plain and simple and working families are the ones left footing the bill. At the town hall, your voices made it clear: it's time for leadership that prioritizes people over profit and listens to those who truly need representation. Together, we can bring about the change that North Carolinians deserve, focusing on real solutions that uplift our communities. Thanks to Lenoir County Dems for having me out to talk about the mess in Washington and how we can work together and fight back! Now, I want to hear from you. If I could, I’d speak with each and every one of you to hear your thoughts and concerns directly, Peter. But responding to this email is the next best thing — your input is crucial in helping us shape policies that truly reflect the needs and priorities of North Carolinians. Your perspective can drive solutions. | Join us as we stand up for a North Carolina that prioritizes its families over powerful interests. Your support and participation can drive the change we need in Washington. Thank you for your feedback and belief in a better future for North Carolina. name: Deb Haaland
subject: A bit of free advice for Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Trump is looking for ways to incentivize Americans to have more children.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)
Did you see this?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250506_1_babybonus?amount=5&refcode=em20250506-1779&refcode2=1779_400544_oG67Y6&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)
Right now, Donald Trump is looking for ways to incentivize Americans to have more children. Their solution? A one-time payment of $5,000 as a “baby bonus” for new moms.
**As someone who raised my child as a single mom, I have a few thoughts.**
Raising my child Somáh on my own was a choice I made, and it was never easy. I went to Planned Parenthood for essential health care. When times were tough, we relied on food stamps and WIC to get on our feet. We didn’t have much, but we were able to scrape by because of the safety nets that were there for us when we struggled.
[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250506_1_babybonus?amount=5&refcode=em20250506-1779&refcode2=1779_400544_oG67Y6&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)_We didn’t have much money, but our struggles made us fierce._
When it was time for Somáh to attend preschool, I had no idea how I’d cover the costs. Luckily, I found a school that allowed parents to volunteer to clean up classrooms in exchange for a discount on tuition. There was no other way I could’ve afforded to send Somah to preschool, given the huge price tag.
[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250506_1_babybonus?amount=5&refcode=em20250506-1779&refcode2=1779_400544_oG67Y6&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)_I volunteered in my child’s classroom for a discount on tuition._
Today, families across New Mexico are getting crushed by the rising costs of housing, child care, health care, and food prices. **In many cases, Trump’s proposed “baby bonus” won’t even cover the cost of giving birth, let alone provide the vital support young parents rely on to raise their families.**
I understand the struggles that parents across New Mexico are facing. I know the stakes. And I know that together, we can implement the bold solutions it will take to tackle our state’s toughest challenges and make New Mexico a great place to raise a family. [**If you’re with me, I hope you’ll donate $5 today to support our people-powered campaign for New Mexico.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250506_1_babybonus?amount=5&refcode=em20250506-1779&refcode2=1779_400544_oG67Y6&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250506_1_babybonus?amount=5&refcode=em20250506-1779&refcode2=1779_400544_oG67Y6&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)**
Here’s a bit of free advice for Donald Trump on how he can _actually_ support new moms:
❌ Stop defunding Planned Parenthood, which ensures expectant and new mothers can access quality, affordable maternal health care.
❌ Stop attacking Medicaid, which covers 55% of births in New Mexico.
❌ Stop taking aim at WIC, food stamps, and school lunch programs which keep young children and their families fed.
❌ Stop gutting our public school system so that our children can get a good education.
**I’m running for governor because I know New Mexico can be a great place to raise a family – but we have a lot more work to do.** I know from personal experience that we must invest in affordable child care and public schools, prioritize public safety to create safe neighborhoods, and guarantee quality maternal health care to everyone who needs it.
[**Will you donate $5 to our campaign so we can win this race and build a New Mexico that actually works for families? We know the solutions to our state’s biggest challenges, and we must be fierce enough to choose them.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250506_1_babybonus?amount=5&refcode=em20250506-1779&refcode2=1779_400544_oG67Y6&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)
Thank you for hearing my story. 💛
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250506-1&t=2&refcode2=1779_400544_oG67Y6&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1779%2E400544%2EoG67Y6)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: James Carville
subject: As important as it gets
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A bellwether for the entire country
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-may25.qgLMOb&refcode=em250506-1-b&t=1&akid=10396%2E3935704%2ERABKGn)
---
Team,
I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you:**this one is as important as it gets.**
The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.
[**So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution to Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia and GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-may25.qgLMOb&refcode=em250506-1-b&t=2&akid=10396%2E3935704%2ERABKGn)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-may25.qgLMOb&refcode=em250506-1-b&t=3&akid=10396%2E3935704%2ERABKGn)**
Here’s what’s got me terrified:
The experts have called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.
If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen.
Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.
That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.
[**Will you contribute right now to GIFFORDS PAC and Abigail Spanberger to help Abigail win this race and deliver a major victory for Democrats?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-may25.qgLMOb&refcode=em250506-1-b&t=4&akid=10396%2E3935704%2ERABKGn)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between GIFFORDS PAC and Abigail Spanberger:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-may25.xJ8fx8&amount=3&refcode=em250506-1-b&t=23&akid=10396%2E3935704%2ERABKGn)**

subject: JD Vance just attacked Ilhan

body:
No matter your politics, the Vice President of the United States should not be using their platform to elevate conspiracies and make personal attacks.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1628%2E791427%2EuoQCag)
Friend,
JD Vance just attacked Ilhan and tried to incite the far-right against her once again.
A fear-mongering, conspiracy-peddling social media account took an 8-year-old video of Ilhan and clipped it out of context.
Then JD Vance amplified the false smear — calling Ilhan a “disgrace” and “sick”.
[**The attacks are only going to ramp up from here with Donald Trump and his far-right nationalist buddies back in power. Can you please rush a $5 donation to Ilhan’s campaign today to help us fight back against their lies and smears?**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250506-1-180&t=2&akid=1628%2E791427%2EuoQCag)
No matter your politics, the Vice President of the United States should not be using their platform to elevate conspiracies and make personal attacks.
The clip they chose was an important and nuanced conversation about a report that said white supremacists were responsible for 78 percent of “extremist-related murders.”
They tried to remove all context from that to say Ilhan was calling for genocide.
That’s rich coming from the people actively supporting a genocide in Gaza.
But this is how the far-right operates. We know that they will do anything they can to take down Ilhan. Their billionaire cronies and super PACs will spend limitless sums on smear attacks just like this.
So we have to fight back.
[**Please, if you can, make a $5 donation to stand with Ilhan and help us keep her critical voice in Congress. She cannot do this alone.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250506-1-180&t=3&akid=1628%2E791427%2EuoQCag)

clean_body: No matter your politics, the Vice President of the United States should not be using their platform to elevate conspiracies and make personal attacks. Friend, JD Vance just attacked Ilhan and tried to incite the far-right against her once again. A fear-mongering, conspiracy-peddling social media account took an 8-year-old video of Ilhan and clipped it out of context. Then JD Vance amplified the false smear — calling Ilhan a “disgrace” and “sick”. No matter your politics, the Vice President of the United States should not be using their platform to elevate conspiracies and make personal attacks. The clip they chose was an important and nuanced conversation about a report that said white supremacists were responsible for 78 percent of “extremist-related murders.” They tried to remove all context from that to say Ilhan was calling for genocide. That’s rich coming from the people actively supporting a genocide in Gaza. But this is how the far-right operates. We know that they will do anything they can to take down Ilhan. Their billionaire cronies and super PACs will spend limitless sums on smear attacks just like this. So we have to fight back. name: Patty Murray
subject: re: Social Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
None
| | |
---
Peter,
Social Security is a __**_promise_ **that the American people should be able to count on after paying into it their entire lives and a vital lifeline for over **73 million** retirees, widowed Americans, and folks with disabilities or mobility limitations.
Donald Trump once swore that he and his unelected co-president Elon Musk – who referred to Social Security as "the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time," and people who rely on it as 'parasites' – **_wouldn't cut one cent of our benefits._**
**But it shouldn't come as a surprise that it was all one big lie.**
* When the already-overstretched agency is at a 50-year staffing low and Trump and Musk want to push out thousands more staffers, **that's a benefits cut.**

* When you make it impossible for recipients and applicants to get help from customer service representatives over the phone, **that’s a benefits cut.**

* When people have to wait even longer for in-person appointments and rural folks have to travel up to 135 miles to make them, **that’s a benefits cut.**

**So that's why I just voted NO on Trump's nominee to lead the Social Security Administration.**

Look, Peter: if anyone is defrauding the U.S. government, it’s not the hard-working Americans who rely on Social Security to retire with dignity.

**It’s billionaires like Elon Musk and Donald Trump, decimating the Social Security Administration and other government agencies they know nothing about, all to enrich themselves on the taxpayers' dime.**
**And if we don't plan a course of action to get their hands OFF Social Security right now, there could** _ _**be people who don’t get their benefits next month. [Will you take my Social Security strategy survey by tonight's 11:59 p.m. deadline to help me save this vital lifeline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107207727/543939829/-1945169624?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk484-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmIzYTkxZS1hZjJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA8FkOqIq2Ug7MY-JDKlEQfFzUqZC_RQFzy7Mgh9XzU=&emci=39c1d2e1-d026-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=86b3a91e-af2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13116610)**

President Trump is leading a **powerful America First comeback** --and on June 14th, he's taking it to the streets with a**historic military parade** honoring his 79th birthday and the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army.

But this isn't just about honoring our military--it's about reclaiming national strength and putting _American security, veterans, and defense back at the TOP of the agenda._

That's why President Trump and Senate Republicans are launching a [**National Security Survey**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=19751ec3e295434a85e3cf06024f7bd0&_e=Tv0YLdbv3k4e_lKYkuFjqtDiENEg5tINPHE7smWePq5842MoZO8dzjtKyYgcjSWgke-kHSalMCCp31DGGUcSqhurh3MuTiRklpZffakddc8fF6FkpKT7fVmwat45mn8h2U9RI55ylkZVkde42j28H2K3tJzreqBBTVkb3iTWGHg-AYN3Df9PoNCwzXzrdOCD9ay2eutk7l_k3I8n4vNOQbYN3impUtdfx3NCClSK5yZ-hSr7LW1UIuGxMnXiVrk4kruYoG5tNgkblOZ-eeGpQhQo-4swK1k0rb9UCpaaYAkLcsZZI-TcIIuOiCt3ssmI5g_iywyjZASpAh_F-7X3RmQ3U6uLN4NhDQtO96qZde6xlSKCf_wFL0BuooiVETf7tST1Mpso5d8zPc0HtWN5omGcrdm5FhDhiH2jAgQQd9HPU3MY-NzOYIkgUq2qN3AfjNEDCPxHhlQ4xFIFdapJm7q_PUZ6K9KkR1LYvcyVuZucieCntujpjMlwXlEyP1pn)--and we need YOU to be part of it.

**🇺🇸 DO YOU BELIEVE IN AMERICA FIRST SECURITY?🇺🇸**
This survey will help shape the next wave of America First policy:

✅ Military readiness and modernization
✅ Veterans' care and respect
✅ Border security and law enforcement
✅ Standing up to global threats like China and Iran
✅ Defending peace through strength&mash;not weakness

If you believe in President Trump's vision for American strength, take the [**National Security Survey**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=19751ec3e295434a85e3cf06024f7bd0&_e=Tv0YLdbv3k4e_lKYkuFjqtDiENEg5tINPHE7smWePq5842MoZO8dzjtKyYgcjSWgke-kHSalMCCp31DGGUcSqhurh3MuTiRklpZffakddc8fF6FkpKT7fVmwat45mn8h2U9RI55ylkZVkde42j28H2K3tJzreqBBTVkb3iTWGHg-AYN3Df9PoNCwzXzrdOCD9ay2eutk7l_k3I8n4vNOQbYN3impUtdfx3NCClSK5yZ-hSr7LW1UIuGxMnXiVrk4kruYoG5tNgkblOZ-eeGpQhQo-4swK1k0rb9UCpaaYAkLcsZZI-TcIIuOiCt3ssmI5g_iywyjZASpAh_F-7X3RmQ3U6uLN4NhDQtO96qZde64MM1ryr5rarAKjYeQx0MgUDbi7VZzZfOkbLJhXT5ut8fd8fhY7T1F6Qq69a_DTLkLciF5Pf0pPLZQFBM_7xGmgfRcTTLzohKbUcWtyOvNkO65JZGy2rXQwz1f_xWLsAt-F8ZQQ71LWoM4Ofl3g0Mf) today to support this critical effort.

[TAKE THE SURVEY
SUPPORT THE MOVEMENT -> ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=19751ec3e295434a85e3cf06024f7bd0&_e=Tv0YLdbv3k4e_lKYkuFjqtDiENEg5tINPHE7smWePq5842MoZO8dzjtKyYgcjSWgke-kHSalMCCp31DGGUcSqhurh3MuTiRklpZffakddc8fF6FkpKT7fVmwat45mn8h2U9RI55ylkZVkde42j28H2K3tJzreqBBTVkb3iTWGHg-AYN3Df9PoNCwzXzrdOCD9ay2eutk7l_k3I8n4vNOQbYN3impUtdfx3NCClSK5yZ-hSr7LW1UIuGxMnXiVrk4kruYoG5tNgkblOZ-eeGpQhQo-4swK1k0rb9UCpaaYAkLcsZZI-TcIIuOiCt3ssmI5g_iywyjZASpAh_F-7X3RmQ3U6uLN4NhDQtO96qZde65H-xFikIMwW5TZ29IaTTY3ZMcEKt1freUTn96NVVGz1nM8H9XQcA8mcMt8KSAKg5W1pCFmiofikcY1i4Voyx8RVX9LBRgaxfcjRw8JYoNk9kGNSlaGkYlq0U579QdwX_fQt1UqggFBRYHSD3FEI1f)

Our Republican opponents are doing everything they can to win. They’ve already invested six figures into ads attacking Democratic incumbents in four of our most competitive districts.
The DLCC has committed to investing seven figures into Virginia’s legislative races this year, but we can’t compete without the support of this team. We need your help to ensure our candidates have the resources they need to win all over the country.

And this November, every single seat in the House is on the ballot, meaning extreme Republicans will have an opportunity to take over. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Virginia is shaping up to be one of the most consequential elections of 2025. The DLCC has committed to investing seven figures into Virginia’s legislative races this year, but we can’t compete without the support of this team. Well, it turns out people really love a good throwback. When we launched my workout memorabilia giveaway to celebrate the 43rd anniversary of my first workout tape, I figured a few of you might be excited. I did not expect the flood of support that came pouring in. **More people entered than we ever expected, and let’s just say, those leotards still have some star power.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107208806/543943745/481203468?refcode=ea.c5d5c873-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.c5d5c873-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1ZDVjODczLWI0MmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6bxvO-jDqmtAD9E5kFsxR4yj4Hl-FfEZjw_qU8Yd1Q=) _Photo by Jacob Whittaker_ Because of the overwhelming excitement, **I’m pleased to announce that JanePAC is extending the giveaway through May 15th.** Yes, that means more signed memorabilia is officially up for grabs — the VHS tapes, the Rolling Stone cover, and a few secret gems I’ve pulled from my personal vault. **[Chip in any amount you can afford before May 15th, and you’ll be automatically entered to win. We’ll handle the shipping. You just bring the heart.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107208807/543943746/481203468?refcode=ea.c5d5c873-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.c5d5c873-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1ZDVjODczLWI0MmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6bxvO-jDqmtAD9E5kFsxR4yj4Hl-FfEZjw_qU8Yd1Q=)** | [**ENTER NOW →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107208808/543943747/481203468?refcode=ea.c5d5c873-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.c5d5c873-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1ZDVjODczLWI0MmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6bxvO-jDqmtAD9E5kFsxR4yj4Hl-FfEZjw_qU8Yd1Q=)

clean_body: The response was overwhelming. | Well, it turns out people really love a good throwback. When we launched my workout memorabilia giveaway to celebrate the 43rd anniversary of my first workout tape, I figured a few of you might be excited. I did not expect the flood of support that came pouring in. More people entered than we ever expected, and let’s just say, those leotards still have some star power. = Photo by Jacob Whittaker Because of the overwhelming excitement, I’m pleased to announce that JanePAC is extending the giveaway through May 15th. Yes, that means more signed memorabilia is officially up for grabs — the VHS tapes, the Rolling Stone cover, and a few secret gems I’ve pulled from my personal vault. = | = Every dollar from this giveaway helps us power JanePAC’s work to elect climate champions who refuse fossil fuel money and show up for our future like it actually matters. Because it does. So whether you’ve been with me since ’82 or just joined the movement, this is your chance to own a piece of the story and help shape what comes next. = Thanks for keeping the movement alive, – Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: MASSIVE PETITION ATTACHED [Democracy on the Line PAC]
subject: STOP the attack on PBS and NPR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Your signature could stop this. Take 30 seconds now.

|
---
**BREAKING: Trump signs executive order to DEFUND PBS and NPR** Peter – this is outrageous:

**Trump just issued an executive order to HALT ALL FUNDING to PBS and NPR.**

That means:

❌Local public media stations across the country SHUT DOWN.
❌Trusted national programs like _PBS NewsHour_ GONE.
❌1,500 stations in all 50 states SILENCED.

_Why?_ Because Trump says public media is “radical left” – and wants to destroy one of the last bastions of independent journalism in America.

**We won’t let that happen. That’s why we’re launching an EMERGENCY PETITION to stop Trump’s authoritarian attack on public media.** **[We need 100,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT to show massive public opposition. Will you add your name now to SAVE PBS and NPR?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107209257/543945468/-33615004?refcode=DOTL_20250506_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjOTkzYWI1LWI0MmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F5nNZkOZZt2OTQrgJ_pbYhq7URI_g9Ig9c9w6CwC6hs=&emci=7deb9b2d-9e2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1c993ab5-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=14887570)** | **[→ SIGN THE PETITION ←](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107209258/543945469/-33615004?refcode=DOTL_20250506_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjOTkzYWI1LWI0MmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F5nNZkOZZt2OTQrgJ_pbYhq7URI_g9Ig9c9w6CwC6hs=&emci=7deb9b2d-9e2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1c993ab5-b42a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=14887570)**

Here’s the deal, Peter – public media is a _lifeline_ in rural, urban, and underserved communities alike.

But Trump doesn’t care. He’s trying to wipe it out with the stroke of a pen.

And just like his war on the free press, this is part of a broader assault on truth, accountability, and democracy.

**We’re fighting back with everything we’ve got – but we need YOU.**

## ICYMI: Trump's White House TROLLS Legacy Media...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e43edc2d-047f-45a2-9539-023c6d85c83a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Stories I'm reading...
[Trump's Three Steps to Economic Growth](https://substack.com/redirect/41d7923a-031e-4bc9-86d4-a04ce7a3a762?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Wall Street Journal
[Biden Aides Decided Against a Cognitive Test in Early 2024, Book Says](https://substack.com/redirect/8b343a14-9182-46f0-9775-9f21b2eb75ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via New York Times
[Musk gets his Texas wish. SpaceX launch site is approved as the new city of Starbase](https://substack.com/redirect/130463de-43b4-4487-9462-0ddb3c36141d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via AP News
**Plus, check out my op-ed in The Daily Caller:[SEAN SPICER: Medication Can Be Affordable -- Even Without Taxpayers Footing The Bill](https://substack.com/redirect/9fdc2ffa-671a-4d55-9ff9-f16ad92c4643?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
We've got a full week, Jim McLaughlin gave us an honest polling update last night ([here if you missed it](https://substack.com/redirect/3889bfe8-fd02-49c8-a1a1-c439d2143b65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and we've Trish Regan tonight! Wednesday, we've got Rep Beth Van Duyne, and on Thursday a great panel with Dan Turrentine, Elizabeth Mitchell, and Sara Gonzales. Then, tune in Friday for the CEO of X Strategies, Alex Bruesewitz.
[Subscribe so you don't miss it!](https://substack.com/redirect/d7979471-1c16-4a34-862c-80d6ad503975?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Draining the swamp...
Trump is making good on his promise to make America great again.
We've seen it in the border, in rolling back the DEI nonsense, and in bringing biological reality back to the government.
Now Trump and Republicans in Congress are setting their sights on the federal budget - and I think it's not a moment too soon.
Congress is currently working on a budget bill to reduce federal spending and lock in his tax cuts from 2017: what Trump has coined the "big, beautiful bill."
It's time to get it passed.
Washington talks a lot about reducing spending, and this is a real opportunity to do it - to achieve real results.
For decades, politicians on both sides of the aisle have discussed eliminating wasteful spending and it's amounted to just that: talk.
Meanwhile, the national deficit has skyrocketed. We're $36 trillion in the hole, having run a yearly deficit at a rate of $2 trillion a year
This is the moment to fix it.
We have control of the executive and legislature -- there's no better time to put our money where our mouth is (pun intended) and enact positive change for the American people.
But it's not just in the hands of Congress, Trump is making moves too......

clean_body: Exploring federal budget cuts and the spending bill | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Exploring federal budget cuts and the spending bill | | | May 6| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ICYMI: Trump's White House TROLLS Legacy Media... Stories I'm reading... \- via Wall Street Journal \- via New York Times \- via AP News Plus, check out my op-ed in The Daily Caller: This week on The Sean Spicer Show... We've got a full week, Jim McLaughlin gave us an honest polling update last night () and we've Trish Regan tonight! Wednesday, we've got Rep Beth Van Duyne, and on Thursday a great panel with Dan Turrentine, Elizabeth Mitchell, and Sara Gonzales. Then, tune in Friday for the CEO of X Strategies, Alex Bruesewitz. Draining the swamp... Trump is making good on his promise to make America great again. We've seen it in the border, in rolling back the DEI nonsense, and in bringing biological reality back to the government. Now Trump and Republicans in Congress are setting their sights on the federal budget - and I think it's not a moment too soon. Congress is currently working on a budget bill to reduce federal spending and lock in his tax cuts from 2017: what Trump has coined the "big, beautiful bill." It's time to get it passed. Washington talks a lot about reducing spending, and this is a real opportunity to do it - to achieve real results. For decades, politicians on both sides of the aisle have discussed eliminating wasteful spending and it's amounted to just that: talk. Meanwhile, the national deficit has skyrocketed. We're $36 trillion in the hole, having run a yearly deficit at a rate of $2 trillion a year This is the moment to fix it. We have control of the executive and legislature -- there's no better time to put our money where our mouth is (pun intended) and enact positive change for the American people. But it's not just in the hands of Congress, Trump is making moves too...... name: Sarah McBride
subject: I voted no. Now I’m asking for your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I hope you’ll take a moment to read this email.
#
This is a long email, but it’s a deeply personal one. I hope you’ll take a moment to read it because what’s at stake right now couldn’t be more important.
**I voted no on the Republican budget plan in Congress** — a framework that advances reckless cuts to Medicaid and other lifelines that millions of Americans depend on.
Let’s be clear: This proposal would rip health care away from millions of people to fund tax breaks for billionaires. And I won’t stand for it.
**When I think about what these cuts would mean, I think about Andy.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250506-1?refcode=em20250506-1971&refcode2=1971_21716_14qsqN&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)
Andy was my husband. Just one year into our relationship, he was diagnosed with cancer. Overnight, we went from planning our future together to fighting for his life. I became his primary caregiver. During his battle with terminal cancer, I held his hand through appointments, treatments, and, ultimately, when he passed away.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250506-1?refcode=em20250506-1971&refcode2=1971_21716_14qsqN&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)
But we were lucky. Andy had access to health care. It gave us precious time together. But I also saw firsthand how fragile access can be — and how devastating it is when people don’t have it.
**Not everyone is as lucky as we were.** Too many families are forced to make impossible choices — between seeing a doctor or keeping the lights on, between paying for a life-saving prescription, or putting food on the table for their children.
Health care is a human right. In the wealthiest country on earth, no one should have to make choices like these.
But right now, Republicans are threatening to make things even harder by slashing Medicaid and cutting off care for millions of Americans — including 1 in 4 Delawareans.
That’s why I voted no. It’s why I’m continuing to speak out. And it’s why I’m asking for your help.
**The truth is, there’s still time to protect Medicaid, but only if we show up and fight back together.**
* * *
**HIGH EARNERS:** If you’re in a position to give more right now, a larger gift can help us meet this moment with the urgency it demands. [**Please make a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or as much as you can give now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250506-1?refcode=em20250506-1971&refcode2=1971_21716_14qsqN&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)
**MEDIUM EARNERS:** If $10, $25, or $50 is more doable, that kind of grassroots support powers everything — from educating voters online to calling out these dangerous cuts head-on. [**Please make a grassroots donation of any amount now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250506-1?refcode=em20250506-1971&refcode2=1971_21716_14qsqN&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)
**EVERYONE ELSE:** And if today’s not the right time to give, that’s okay too. Sharing our message or talking with friends and family goes a long way to ensuring as many people as possible know the impacts of these cuts.
* * *
When I think about the road ahead, I think of Andy. I think about every family that’s fighting to hold on to hope. I think about what it means to lead with compassion and conviction. And that’s what’s fueling my fight.
Thank you for your support today.
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250506-1&t=1&refcode2=1971_21716_14qsqN&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1971%2E21716%2E14qsqN)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/6/2025
body:
Senate Democrats advance HB25-1312 despite mass opposition, custody concerns
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
In case you missed it, tickets went on sale yesterday for our **Mountain Majesty Gala** on June 21 in Golden, CO! Tickets are going fast so make sure you secure yours ASAP. We can't wait to see you there with our special guest, **Eric Trump**!
---
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Now onto the news... Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Despite 700+ testifiers and 17,000 public comments, HB25-1312 is now headed to a [third reading in the Senate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). If signed into law, it will take effect later this year. Critics say it still threatens parental rights and invites legal battles. Lawmakers also advanced SB25-276, expanding [immigrant protections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as the DOJ sues over sanctuary policies.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Michelle Chandler’s tip [stopped a serial predator](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) targeting Colorado women, though investigators fear more victims remain. La Plata Electric members say leadership is [burning through reserves](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) while rates climb. A judge ordered Elizabeth Schools to [return 19 banned books](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and columnist Jon Caldara slammed [Colorado’s $150M “free” lunch program](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as costly “Marxism in a box.”
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** The Trump administration is offering $1,000 to illegal immigrants who [self-deport using a new app](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—an initiative expected to slash deportation costs by 70% as part of a broader mass removal effort. In a major win for animal rights advocates, the NIH has shut down its final [in-house dog experimentation lab](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after more than 40 years of beagle testing, following public outcry and undercover investigations.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Minary argues that conservative principles—like limited government and personal responsibility—are essential for [restoring balance](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a state veering left. Meanwhile, Cole describes how rising costs, weak enforcement, and illegal driving are turning [Denver’s roads into chaos](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), burdening everyday Coloradans and draining public resources.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, May 6, 2025.
– Team RMV
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[“Parents Last”: Senate Democrats Advance HB25-1312 Despite Mass Opposition, Custody Concerns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY TORI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado’s controversial “Kelly Loving Act” is one step away from becoming law, after the state Senate advanced HB25-1312 in a party-line vote Monday night. The bill passed 23-12 following hours of floor debate—nearing an end to a legislative saga that’s drawn over 700 would-be testifiers, more than 17,000 emails from concerned constituents, and ongoing warnings from legal experts, parents, and educators.
The bill started as an expansion of the Colorado Anti-discrimination Act (CADA), aiming to add gender identity and expression as protected categories in schools, courts, and beyond. Even after key changes, Republicans say it still threatens parental rights and opens the door to new legal trouble for those who disagree with progressive gender policies.
“Even though Section 2 was removed, people are still afraid. This bill isn’t just another one—it’s the ultimate assault,” said Sen. Lisa Frizell (R-Douglas). “It deliberately infringes on parental rights.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Michelle Chandler stopped a predator — and uncovered victims who may never know](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Michelle Chandler confronted and restrained a man who was secretly filming women in a Lakewood Nordstrom Rack fitting room. Despite corporate policies preventing employee assistance, she held him until police arrived—30 minutes later.
* Due to police delays and Nordstrom's deletion of surveillance footage, investigators couldn’t identify other victims, even though Chandler’s assailant had filmed at least four to five other women that day.
* Chandler, a survivor of past trauma, is now considering launching a nonprofit to advocate for women’s safety. Her story also highlights concerns about Colorado’s legislative priorities, especially HB25-1312, which critics argue weakens protections for women and parents.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Members left in the dark: LPEA board spends big while margins shrink and bills climb](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* La Plata Electric Association (LPEA) raised rates by 7.72% in April while net income dropped 63% over five years—sparking outrage over rising bills and fiscal mismanagement.
* Despite no growth in customer base or power generation, board members approved major spending increases—including luxury retreats, expensive travel, and rising executive salaries.
* Members feel betrayed after LPEA exited a long-term supply contract without a vote and delayed key financial disclosures. With four board seats up for election, calls for transparency are mounting.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Cole: Illegal driving, rising costs, and scarce patrols—welcome to Denver’s roads](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver’s streets have become chaotic, with drivers ignoring laws, traffic stops dropping nearly 50%, and accidents jumping 48% since 2020.
* With Colorado’s uninsured driver rate among the worst in the nation, residents face soaring premiums, costly accidents, and financial risk—especially low-income drivers.
* Fewer patrols and loosened traffic enforcement laws have left reckless driving unchecked. Cole argues public safety and order are collapsing under political neglect.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Minary: Common principles of Conservatism and why they matter in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY RUSS MINARY****| COMMENTARY | MAY 5** _The majority of Coloradans have become disengaged and disillusioned with Party politics and rhetoric, for good reasons. Both major parties, R and D, have lost their way. So, the largest bloc of voters in CO is now “Unaffiliated._
__
**[The COvid Chronicles April 16–30: From tattletales to tyranny in just 14 days](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | MAY 2** _If the first two weeks of April 2020 made it clear to Coloradans their state was forever changed and would not be going back to the way it was any time soon, the later part of the month crystalized just how difficult earning back any God-given constitutional rights and freedoms would prove to be._
**[O’Donnell: It’s costly to live in Colorado—and now we top the charts in personal debt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | MAY 2** _Since 2021, inflation has been higher in Colorado than in any other state, mostly because of the cost of owning or renting a home. But this is also because the state legislature enjoys imposing new fees (you aren’t allowed to call them taxes) on seemingly anything they can think of._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🌭 DID YOU KNOW?** Americans buy about **350 million pounds of hot dogs** from retail stores each year—roughly 9 billion hot dogs, according to the National Hot Dog and Sausage Council (yes, that exists). But that’s just the tip of the bun. Including restaurants, ballparks, and events, total consumption reaches an estimated 20 billion hot dogs annually.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Sell not virtue to purchase wealth, nor liberty to purchase power." – Benjamin Franklin
|

name: Team Schrier
subject: Trump’s attacks hurt patients. Nurses are picking up the pieces.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[PETITION] [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107209903/543947988/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQ3NDhjNi1iNzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1bgwYJnNapBad_R1z8QM6nYh2y_Xpci_FDNaPl-wa4=&emci=82fccb27-902a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b64748c6-b72a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

It’s National Nurses Week—and as a doctor, **Kim has seen firsthand the power, compassion, and resilience nurses bring to their patients every single day.**

They hold our hands in our hardest moments. They fight for us when we can’t fight for ourselves. They are the lifeblood of our healthcare system— _and they deserve more than just our thanks._

But right now, our healthcare system is under attack. Donald Trump and his Republican extremists are hell-bent on dismantling the progress we’ve made—from attempting to gut the Affordable Care Act to stripping away protections for people with pre-existing conditions. They are now even going after Medicaid and Medicare–healthcare lifelines for so many Americans.

While politicians play games with people’s lives, it’s healthcare workers— _our nurses, doctors, and frontline staff_ —who are left to pick up the pieces and make sure patients’ needs are still being met. We need to have their backs, because our communities, our families, and our nurses deserve better.

[**Sign on now to demand Congress expand access to affordable, quality healthcare for all. Together, we can fight for a healthcare system that protects healthcare workers, fights for patients, and allows everyone to receive and deliver the care that’s needed >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107209904/543947989/-1491242496?ms=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=n7M+F2p4OIOnUgHLdVQ9k+Co4jEPKWDeuqSioKrlUY/s2io+KDJvxSccdc6g1J7GcdcVbcnAYcQv7gFQ4gZCWX+nVKE6WQoDc+AiPjS+NzJ5ZfbS0b7CfIbjL6TiN5y/WJ81A2Xz72HHMfEuf85gA6OoXamFhnjv33P3AXOvCaE=&refcode2=b64748c6-b72a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQ3NDhjNi1iNzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1bgwYJnNapBad_R1z8QM6nYh2y_Xpci_FDNaPl-wa4=&emci=82fccb27-902a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b64748c6-b72a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107209905/543947990/-1491242496?ms=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250506_nurses_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=n7M+F2p4OIOnUgHLdVQ9k+Co4jEPKWDeuqSioKrlUY/s2io+KDJvxSccdc6g1J7GcdcVbcnAYcQv7gFQ4gZCWX+nVKE6WQoDc+AiPjS+NzJ5ZfbS0b7CfIbjL6TiN5y/WJ81A2Xz72HHMfEuf85gA6OoXamFhnjv33P3AXOvCaE=&refcode2=b64748c6-b72a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQ3NDhjNi1iNzJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1bgwYJnNapBad_R1z8QM6nYh2y_Xpci_FDNaPl-wa4=&emci=82fccb27-902a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b64748c6-b72a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338) Thanks for standing with us,

It's about making it._**[Make your gift of any amount today to join our movement, and I'll send your free copy today!](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuelhuIteknop5IdITmad7c953&s=IAODJOIOHDHHBLOP)**_

name: Response Requested [Team MGP]
subject: DIY is in our DNA
body:
| | Peter,

In rural communities like ours, driving isn’t optional—it’s how we get to work, pick up groceries, and see our doctor. As a former auto repair shop owner, Marie understands better than most how vital cars are to everyday life here in Southwest Washington.

It’s critical that ordinary people have the tools and freedom to repair their own things instead of being forced to buy cheap, disposable replacements. That’s why Marie has spearheaded bipartisan legislation to lower repair costs and protect our right to fix what we own, especially our vehicles. Now that the bill has been reintroduced in the Senate, it’s one step closer to becoming law—and towards making a real difference for working people across the country.

**This “right to repair” will make a real, tangible difference for Americans everywhere. Marie needs to know where you stand on this issue, Peter:**
[Do you agree that making your own auto repairs should be affordable and accessible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107210566/543950014/-2030009389?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_180DO_250506_1_1&refcode2=543075c3-b92a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDMwNzVjMy1iOTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5boY-m9sIu76F5cfvrZSXnaLsV2vZEUo7J7NX08MZE=&emci=513075c3-b92a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=543075c3-b92a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=31138575) | | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107210567/543950015/-2030009389?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_180DO_250506_1_1&refcode2=543075c3-b92a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDMwNzVjMy1iOTJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5boY-m9sIu76F5cfvrZSXnaLsV2vZEUo7J7NX08MZE=&emci=513075c3-b92a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=543075c3-b92a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=31138575)****

---

This is pocketbook sustainability that just makes sense, Peter. We want to be able to repair and be good stewards of our stuff, and steer away from reliance on cheap junk that doesn’t last.

We must continue to empower ordinary Americans to make their own repairs with access to the necessary data and tools. And as technology progresses and new fields emerge, Marie remains dedicated to making sure we don’t leave rural communities or working families behind.

**Help Marie drive this work in the right direction by responding to our quick survey today:**

body:
At my wits' end...
The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

|
---
| | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ecb0641b7d0d4ee9ac1f6fda76251e10&_e=LezhMZ_63c1Y-8RdA3VARjxuPflWtVqargV7Uw8aTCkkLS3ySgw6RDxBftzoeQLXVOjYTYgarphbPFRBMVuNkWSN9NRZDnAPeaV2uirDY9rrZaxuWuZb_CNCEGdf_Gb2gsgg9BXjnP7FUZhluvLv-P6PxBsm9K7XHSZH5-g9nRgSSqJOhw7ZjG-3SNTyYjLI7vvc4EjbzBHC9BsUjCWSCZFr78VcZSkiOnABekZ2m6toelAthFCC7OKlo7LD4Q8HlhoNWk4ROJcPKcnNTTHPBrE-_W5HyI0xtqsMyyomPI-R4v0rtZGHC4D9cUAzmU7a80V9PxbcOa_Iw7uXwhOEwqs7hH8gFlLgS4QHfRKGBJFHkfUQ1qRklXdm7v18xAcDGyQPB66IyniyT10C0m-NwQ%3D%3D)
---

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

**[Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ecb0641b7d0d4ee9ac1f6fda76251e10&_e=LezhMZ_63c1Y-8RdA3VARjxuPflWtVqargV7Uw8aTCkkLS3ySgw6RDxBftzoeQLXVOjYTYgarphbPFRBMVuNkWSN9NRZDnAPeaV2uirDY9rrZaxuWuZb_CNCEGdf_Gb2gsgg9BXjnP7FUZhluvLv-P6PxBsm9K7XHSZH5-g9nRgSSqJOhw7ZjG-3SNTyYjLI7vvc4EjbzBHC9BsUjCWSCZFr78VcZSkiOnABekZ2m6toelAthFCC7OKlo7LD4Q8HCHG-7-mWBMNVpKcF3IJlmslNz3qmaE_tCXblNMQEEoJqJwnA8eiA4Xo5fC8sEC66A6cWZ-zsn3O1yzh8x7BUEcd9xpudtO-HP2DP92gCkhUZpwj5rUKFILQLip7eszoA-d5zxu2nPcTGbr6AVe8Utw%3D%3D "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.
In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ecb0641b7d0d4ee9ac1f6fda76251e10&_e=LezhMZ_63c1Y-8RdA3VARjxuPflWtVqargV7Uw8aTCkkLS3ySgw6RDxBftzoeQLXVOjYTYgarphbPFRBMVuNkWSN9NRZDnAPeaV2uirDY9rrZaxuWuZb_CNCEGdf_Gb2gsgg9BXjnP7FUZhluvLv-P6PxBsm9K7XHSZH5-g9nRgSSqJOhw7ZjG-3SNTyYjLI7vvc4EjbzBHC9BsUjCWSCZFr78VcZSkiOnABekZ2m6toelAthFCC7OKlo7LD4Q8H9b6HKYXh2krpdj0LC87uL1vicDAHiZUM0TtMSWgOaMA96Wuj8lYLZaEfMWoPFgmzY37Orp2JFO1LbwhNxWASw7Pnb7mKrfjHhIqmHpbtpYOSlCPd3IgIp3Qk806gPmUUCY_eAPX0U7J4ObEyRfhJGA%3D%3D "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.")**

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | | [Chip In NOW!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ecb0641b7d0d4ee9ac1f6fda76251e10&_e=LezhMZ_63c1Y-8RdA3VARjxuPflWtVqargV7Uw8aTCkkLS3ySgw6RDxBftzoeQLXVOjYTYgarphbPFRBMVuNkWSN9NRZDnAPeaV2uirDY9rrZaxuWuZb_CNCEGdf_Gb2gsgg9BXjnP7FUZhluvLv-P6PxBsm9K7XHSZH5-g9nRgSSqJOhw7ZjG-3SNTyYjLI7vvc4EjbzBHC9BsUjCWSCZFr78VcZSkiOnABekZ2m6toelAthFCC7OKlo7LD4Q8HT7yOiSZ2-L3a4lxo0je0KBd82wWyD-Fu9jUUw64oz0gZIomHB60F6t23mCoA3H3ImryP_duj8AOwlo-6iGhCVxmFz58sGmEExlKWbPWXwDRAjwMYv2vOhybeydUlZ_MTEVND8K96xT1UiOlfLSDFSQ%3D%3D "Chip In NOW!")

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,

Ryan Zinke

clean_body: At my wits' end... The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest. | | | | | Closing the curtains on my campaign. I'm at my wits' end, Friend. The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest. "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue." In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6. In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party. If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation." I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out? | | | "Chip In NOW!" You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. **Latinos Frustrated after 100 days of Trump,
Honoring Latino Journalists, & Baby Billy
with CBS News' Fin Gómez**
The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 13
| Chuck Rocha welcomes **CBS News' political journalist Fin Gómez** to unpack**latest polls revealing Latinos dissatisfaction with Donald Trump's policies after 100-days in office**. They break down the fear, anger, and disappointment felt by many due to rising inflation and unkept promises.

Chuck and Fin also celebrate **Latino excellence in journalism** , reflecting on the 3rd annual Brown and Bougie Brunch, the White House Correspondents' Dinner, and the trailblazing reporters making waves in D.C.

name: Dan Carr
subject: Constitution Matters
body:
Liberty is not inherited. It is preserved.

| |
---|---|---
|
# Constitution Matters
### Liberty is not inherited. It is preserved.
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| May 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
We must never vote for personality over principle, or party over the Constitution. Candidates who do not understand or respect the Constitution are unfit to hold public office, no matter how charismatic or successful they may seem.
_**" In questions of power, then, let no more be heard of confidence in man, but bind him down from mischief by the chains of the Constitution."**_** - Thomas Jefferson**

name: Val Hoyle
subject: This is how we save Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107211355/543953055/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmRjMDYxNy1iZDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fhoIcBBZP6nvylENnqrL9EKAFzUhfyLkYGdy5REghp8=&emci=a5ea4d0d-f429-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c6dc0617-bd2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – When congressional Republicans say they want to cut "entitlements," what they mean is defunding your Social Security. The Trump administration and Republican leadership plan to fire thousands of Social Security Administration workers, close dozens of field offices, and even shut down their toll-free helpline – and now they have more power than ever to do it. It's failure by design. Let's be clear about why they want to do it: Slashing Social Security benefits means they can hand massive tax cuts to their wealthy friends. **So, I'm stepping up to do something about it.** I've introduced the Social Security Expansion Act, a commonsense fix to a simple problem. My act will expand benefits by an extra $2,400 per year and ensure that Social Security is funded and solvent for the next 75 years – all by applying the Social Security payroll tax on all income above $250,000. For the past 80 years, Social Security has lifted millions of seniors out of poverty, supported the disabled and children or spouses who lost their loved ones, and provided the backbone for dignity and security for all. If we pass this bill, it will be safe and secure for another 80. Never let congressional Republicans fool you into thinking this is an "entitlement program" – American workers pay into it for their entire working lives, and we're going to make sure it's there for our children when they need it. Last week, I headed out for a town hall with former Rep. Peter DeFazio and Max Richtman, President of the National Committee to Preserve Social Security and Medicare, to talk about the Social Security Expansion Act and our larger fight to stand up for each other. Hundreds of Oregonians showed up to make their voices heard and learn how to join this fight to save our Social Security. [**Remember: Republicans in charge will go as far as we let them, so what we do right now can make all the difference. If you're ready to fight for Social Security, chip in what you can and I'll see you out there.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107211356/543953057/-1599294071?refcode=2025-05-06-socialsecurity&recurring=&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c6dc0617-bd2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmRjMDYxNy1iZDJhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fhoIcBBZP6nvylENnqrL9EKAFzUhfyLkYGdy5REghp8=) _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Peter – When congressional Republicans say they want to cut "entitlements," what they mean is defunding your Social Security. The Trump administration and Republican leadership plan to fire thousands of Social Security Administration workers, close dozens of field offices, and even shut down their toll-free helpline – and now they have more power than ever to do it. It's failure by design. Let's be clear about why they want to do it: Slashing Social Security benefits means they can hand massive tax cuts to their wealthy friends. So, I'm stepping up to do something about it. I've introduced the Social Security Expansion Act, a commonsense fix to a simple problem. My act will expand benefits by an extra $2,400 per year and ensure that Social Security is funded and solvent for the next 75 years – all by applying the Social Security payroll tax on all income above $250,000. For the past 80 years, Social Security has lifted millions of seniors out of poverty, supported the disabled and children or spouses who lost their loved ones, and provided the backbone for dignity and security for all. If we pass this bill, it will be safe and secure for another 80. Never let congressional Republicans fool you into thinking this is an "entitlement program" – American workers pay into it for their entire working lives, and we're going to make sure it's there for our children when they need it. Last week, I headed out for a town hall with former Rep. Peter DeFazio and Max Richtman, President of the National Committee to Preserve Social Security and Medicare, to talk about the Social Security Expansion Act and our larger fight to stand up for each other. Hundreds of Oregonians showed up to make their voices heard and learn how to join this fight to save our Social Security. = Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: California Democratic Party
subject: Save Our Hospitals Day of Action May 13
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
California Democrats,
Our hospitals are under attack, and we need your help on Monday, May 13th!
Congressional Republicans are rushing to pass deep Medicaid cuts before Memorial Day that would devastate California's healthcare system. With California hospitals receiving between 20-70% of their funding through Medicaid, these cuts wouldn't just hurt those on public insurance—they would impact everyone who relies on our hospitals.
https://fightforourhealth.org/save-our-hospitals/ [https://fightforourhealth.org/save-our-hospitals/]
JOIN OUR HEALTHCARE DAY OF ACTION MAY 13 [https://fightforourhealth.org/save-our-hospitals/]
That's why California Democrats are fighting back! We're organizing rallies at dozens of hospitals throughout the state to show lawmakers that Californians won't stand for these reckless cuts. Our state has been a leader in expanding healthcare access, and we can't allow these Republican cuts to undo that progress.
Please join us in standing up for our hospitals, healthcare workers, and communities.
Team CADEM
Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee.
California Democratic Party
1830 9th St
Sacramento, CA 95811
United States

subject: BREAKING: A.G. Holder’s reaction to the new North Carolina ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
MAGA Republicans can still use this model to try to overturn future elections.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107211762/543954204/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxYzE0ZGJhLWJjMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8uHkbA8fzEnNzQiPuqJ1MksppXgnpgdxrL-ikmO5HmM=&emci=4d89c1fa-b52a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1c14dba-bc2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, **First:** North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Allison Riggs won re-election last November — a victory that was confirmed by not one but TWO separate recounts. **Then:** Her failed GOP challenger, Judge Jefferson Griffin, and his extreme right-wing allies launched an effort to overturn his loss by trying to throw out _tens of thousands_ of legally valid ballots. **Now: A Trump-appointed federal judge just _rejected_ Republican efforts to steal the election and ordered the state board of elections to certify Justice Riggs’ victory — a huge win for voters in North Carolina. ** Here’s Attorney General Eric Holder’s reaction to this breaking news: **“The district court’s ruling reaffirms the truth: Justice Allison Riggs won, and all legally cast ballots must be counted.** “For nearly six months, despite increasing bipartisan opposition, too many Republicans have tried to use the judiciary to sanction a dangerous, un-American effort to steal a free and fair election. **Judge Griffin has embarrassed himself and the state of North Carolina enough by dragging out this process. He must end this charade by finally accepting the results and admitting defeat — right now. The will of North Carolinians must prevail.” ** _– Eric Holder, May 6, 2025_ **But Judge Griffin still hasn’t conceded. He could still appeal this ruling. And there’s every reason to believe MAGA Republicans will use this as a model to try to overturn future elections in other states.** [**While the far right keeps attempting to silence voters — from working to steal elections simply because they don’t like the results to denying fair representation through extreme gerrymandering — we’ll keep fighting back for our democracy. Will you rush a donation to power this urgent work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107211766/543954210/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCRulingRR_email_20250506-NDRC-Tier1-NCRulingRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250506-NDRC-Tier1-NCRulingRR_&utm_campaign=NCRulingRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxYzE0ZGJhLWJjMmEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8uHkbA8fzEnNzQiPuqJ1MksppXgnpgdxrL-ikmO5HmM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: MAGA Republicans can still use this model to try to overturn future elections. | Peter, First: North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Allison Riggs won re-election last November — a victory that was confirmed by not one but TWO separate recounts. Then: Her failed GOP challenger, Judge Jefferson Griffin, and his extreme right-wing allies launched an effort to overturn his loss by trying to throw out tens of thousands of legally valid ballots. Now: A Trump-appointed federal judge just rejected Republican efforts to steal the election and ordered the state board of elections to certify Justice Riggs’ victory — a huge win for voters in North Carolina. Here’s Attorney General Eric Holder’s reaction to this breaking news: “The district court’s ruling reaffirms the truth: Justice Allison Riggs won, and all legally cast ballots must be counted. “For nearly six months, despite increasing bipartisan opposition, too many Republicans have tried to use the judiciary to sanction a dangerous, un-American effort to steal a free and fair election. Judge Griffin has embarrassed himself and the state of North Carolina enough by dragging out this process. He must end this charade by finally accepting the results and admitting defeat — right now. The will of North Carolinians must prevail.” – Eric Holder, May 6, 2025 But Judge Griffin still hasn’t conceded. He could still appeal this ruling. And there’s every reason to believe MAGA Republicans will use this as a model to try to overturn future elections in other states. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As The New York Times put it, “If Judge Myers’s ruling stands, it will bring closure to an election purgatory that has lasted nearly six months. body:
Save Social Security and protect Sen. Elizabeth Warren! >>

Social Security is under ATTACK, and so are the Democrats fighting for it.

**_It’s absolutely critical we stand with Elizabeth Warren in this must-win fight for our benefits!_**

[**We need 32 more Democrats in your state to sign on. Please confirm your signature is submitted before we close this letter at midnight:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89832?t=6&akid=19759%2E878179%2EwCQtmS) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89832?t=7&akid=19759%2E878179%2EwCQtmS) | [**ADD YOUR NAME WHILE YOU CAN: THANK SENATOR ELIZABETH WARREN FOR LEADING THE FIGHT AGAINST TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89832?t=8&akid=19759%2E878179%2EwCQtmS)

Voter Protection Project

FROM: Sign the Letter 📝 (protectvoting.org)
TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com
SUBJECT: re: Elizabeth Warren DROPS THE HAMMER
Elizabeth Warren just wrote a SCATHING op-ed for Fox News slamming Trump’s attacks on Social Security:
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89832?t=9&akid=19759%2E878179%2EwCQtmS)
**The MAGA mob is FUMING — Trump will do anything to force her silence!**

[**We need 500 local Democrats to stand with Warren in her fight: Donate $3 to add your signature to our thank you card! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89832?t=10&akid=19759%2E878179%2EwCQtmS)

TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to save Social Security!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. I REFUSE to stand idly by and let my hard-earned Social Security be stolen by MAGA billionaires!

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to destroy Social Security — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89832?t=12&akid=19759%2E878179%2EwCQtmS) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89832?t=13&akid=19759%2E878179%2EwCQtmS)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My Story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
Hey Peter, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
[**Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to help build this campaign from the ground up?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-hickenlooper.f_qfsx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
[DONATE NOW →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-hickenlooper.X3Furk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
---
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-hickenlooper.f_qfsx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-hickenlooper.f_qfsx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service — first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
[**That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5 — about the cost of two Wynkoop pints — to help us build a winning campaign?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2256?c0=stb-em-hickenlooper.ei7aXo&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
[DONATE $5 →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2256?c0=stb-em-hickenlooper.ei7aXo&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-hickenlooper.X3Furk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250506_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)
---
I know we can win this the Colorado way — by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=11&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=4702%2E35263%2Epg9oiL)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Netanyahu just admitted what we already knew
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Israeli Prime Minister
Benjamin Netanyahu just admitted what we’ve already known: Israel plans to
force out the entire Palestinian population from Palestine, flatten Gaza,
and occupy it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140778?t=1002&akid=36651%2E1203867%2Ea6-VRA ]Tweet from Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib: War Criminal Netanyahu has
announced a plan to forcibly expel and ethnically cleanse the entire
Palestinian population, flatten, and annex Gaza. This comes after 64 days
of blocking food and aid. This was always their plan. The U.S. in an
accomplice in this genocide.

The Israeli Security Cabinet just approved a plan to “flatten any
buildings that remain standing,” displace all 2 million Palestinians, and
occupy ALL of Gaza.

All of this while Israel continues to block food, formula, medical
supplies, and other aid from entering Gaza, creating man-made mass
starvation.

We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: this is genocide and ethnic
cleansing, full stop. No more smokescreens or spin: Israel is laying bare
what it's promised for years, for those who've been listening. This was
always the end game.

Lawmakers too spineless to fight back during Biden's presidency should at
least find the courage to stand up against U.S. funding for this Nakba
under Trump.

May 15 marks 77 years of Israel’s ongoing Nakba against Palestinians.
Nakba means catastrophe in English, and refers to Israel’s efforts to
drive Palestinians from their homeland and try to erase their presence.

For the past three years, Justice Democrats Rep. Rashida Tlaib–the only
Palestinian-American Member of Congress–has introduced historic
resolutions to commemorate the Nakba and call for an end to U.S. support
for Israel’s ongoing dispossession of the Palestinian people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140778?t=1003&akid=36651%2E1203867%2Ea6-VRA ]As Rashida prepares to reintroduce this resolution this year, we need
more members of Congress than ever before to raise their voices against
Israel’s ongoing Nakba. Send a letter to your member of Congress urging
them to speak out and support this resolution now!

Send a Letter

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250506-36651-footer&t=1004&refcode2=36651_1203867_a6-VRA&akid=36651%2E1203867%2Ea6-VRA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=36651%2E1203867%2Ea6-VRA

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

At a time when families are struggling with rising costs, when rural hospitals are closing, and when more Coloradans than ever rely on Medicaid to access basic care — Boebert thinks the solution is to take more from those who have the least, and give it to those who already have everything. I believe we need representatives who protect the people who actually keep our communities running: the workers, the caregivers, the farmers, the families. Boebert’s billionaire MAGA donors won’t feel those cuts — but our neighbors around this District will. With your support, we can flip this district, stop Boebert’s attacks on working families, and fight for affordable health care and economic fairness in Congress. —John Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado
